Our Elasticsearch indexing is failing with 'max_result_window exceeded' for pagination. The default window is 10000 but we need 50000. Need to increase index.max_result_window or use search_after.
The Logstash pipeline is dropping events with 'java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space'. The heap size is 1GB but the batch size is 10000. Need to increase heap to 4GB or reduce batch size.
Our Kibana dashboard is showing 'Request timeout' after 30 seconds. The underlying Elasticsearch query scans 5 billion documents. Need to add a date range filter to limit the time window.

The Beats filebeat is not shipping logs because the registry file is corrupted. The error says 'failed to open file: no such file or directory'. Need to delete the registry and restart filebeat to force resync.
Our Prometheus alertmanager is not sending notifications to Slack. The webhook URL is outdated. The old Slack workspace was renamed. Need to update the receiver URL in alertmanager.yml.

The Grafana dashboard variable 'namespace' is not populating. The Prometheus query 'label_values(kube_namespace_labels)' returns nothing because the metric is missing. The kube-state-metrics deployment might be down.
Our Thanos sidecar is failing to upload blocks to S3 with 'AccessDenied: InvalidAccessKeyId'. The AWS credentials expired. Need to rotate the access key in the thanos secret.
The Loki distributor is dropping logs because of 'too many outstanding requests'. The rate limit is 4MB per second but the volume is 10MB/s. Need to increase limits in the distributor config.
Our Tempo trace ingestion is failing with 'failed to push trace data: context deadline exceeded'. The ingester is overloaded. Need to add more ingester replicas or scale up instance types.
The OpenTelemetry collector pod is crashing with 'failed to export traces: http 500 Internal Server Error'. The backend Jaeger service is down. Need to restart Jaeger or check its logs.
Our Pyroscope agent is not profiling the Python service. The agent cannot find the 'pyroscope' tag. Need to set the environment variable 'PYROSCOPE_APPLICATION_NAME=payment-service'.
The Sentry source maps are not uploading correctly. The release version in the frontend does not match the one in sentry-cli. Need to ensure the same version string is used in both.
Our Honeycomb API key is invalid. The key was rotated yesterday but the environment variable still has the old one. Need to update the value in the Kubernetes secret.
The Datadog profiler is showing 'Segmentation fault' when attached to the Go binary. The Go version is 1.18 but the profiler requires 1.19+. Need to upgrade Go version or disable profiling.
Our AppDynamics agent is not reporting data. The controller hostname is set to 'appdynamics.internal' but the DNS resolution fails. Need to update to the IP address or fix DNS.

The New Relic browser agent is not capturing JavaScript errors. The script is loaded but the error callback is not implemented. Need to add 'window.addEventListener('error', ...)' in the application code.
Our SignalFx detector is alerting on 'CPU usage > 90%' but the metric is missing for 5 minutes. The collector pod was restarted. Need to extend the alert evaluation window to 10 minutes.
The Lightstep saturn proxy is failing to receive spans because of TLS handshake error. The certificate expired. Need to renew the cert and restart the proxy.
Our Instana agent is showing 'Failed to connect to agent backend' because the proxy requires authentication. The agent configuration is missing the proxy user and password. Need to add them.
The Dynatrace OneAgent is using too much CPU (25%). The deep monitoring mode is enabled. Need to switch to 'infrastructure only' mode for non-critical nodes.

Our Checkly check is failing with 'timeout after 30 seconds' for the API endpoint '/api/health'. The endpoint sometimes takes 35 seconds when the database is cold. Need to increase timeout to 60 seconds.

The Uptime.com monitor is reporting 'SSL certificate expired' but the certificate is valid. The monitor checks the wrong hostname. Need to update the monitor to use the correct hostname (api.fintech.com).
Our Statuspage incident sync is not creating incidents from PagerDuty. The API token is invalid. Need to generate a new token and update the integration.
The Opsgenie alert is not escalating to the second responder because the schedule 'sre-weekends' is empty. Need to assign on-call users to the schedule.
Our FireHydrant runbook is out of date. It refers to the old AWS account ID. Need to update the runbook with the new account information.
The Blameless SLO dashboard is showing 0% for the 'payment-api' latency SLO. The service-level indicator (SLI) query is returning no data. The Prometheus metric name changed.
Our Postman monitor is failing with 'Collection run failed: script error'. The test script has a syntax error (missing closing bracket). Need to fix the script and re-run.
The Insomnia test suite is failing because the environment variable '{{API_KEY}}' is not resolved. The variable is missing in the environment file. Need to add it.

Our Swagger UI is loading but the 'Try it out' button does nothing. The JavaScript console shows 'Uncaught ReferenceError: SwaggerUI is not defined'. The bundle failed to load. Need to check the CDN URL.
The Redoc documentation is not showing the request body schema. The OpenAPI spec has the 'requestBody' defined but the 'content' section is missing. Need to add 'content: application/json'.
Our Stoplight project is failing to import from GitHub. The webhook secret is incorrect. Need to update the secret in the Stoplight integration settings.

The API Gateway (Kong) is returning 'no route matched with those values' for the 'settlement' endpoint. The route has a path '/api/settlement' but the request has '/api/settlement/'. Need to add trailing slash option.
Our Tyk gateway is not injecting the authorization header to the upstream. The request passes the header but the gateway strips it. Need to add 'strip_auth_header: false' in the API definition.

The Gloo Edge gateway is reporting 'upstream connection error' for the 'risk-service'. The service is in a different namespace. Need to update the upstream reference to 'risk-service.default.svc.cluster.local'.
Our Ambassador Edge Stack is not routing traffic to the canary version. The weight distribution is set to 90/10 but all traffic goes to the stable version. The canary service has no healthy pods.

The phpMyAdmin interface for our MySQL server is extremely slow. It takes 30 seconds to list tables in the 'transactions' database. The table count is 500, but pagination seems broken. Need to optimize the query or increase server resources.

Our Adminer database management tool keeps disconnecting from the PostgreSQL server with 'PGSQL: Connection reset by peer'. The server's `idle_in_transaction_session_timeout` is set to 10 minutes. Need to increase it to 30 minutes for the Adminer user.

The DBngin local MySQL instance won't start. The error log says '[ERROR] InnoDB: Unable to lock ./ibdata1 error: 35'. Another instance might be using the same data directory. I need to stop all MySQL processes and restart DBngin.

The TablePlus connection to the production replica keeps dropping with 'Connection lost: Unexpected EOF'. The SSH tunnel is unstable. Can we switch to direct TLS connection? The replica endpoint is 'replica.prod.fintech.com'.

Our DBeaver SQL editor is unable to display the execution plan for a complex query. The 'Explain Plan' button is greyed out. The query uses a Common Table Expression (CTE) that the driver doesn't support. Need to break the query into smaller parts.

The MySQL Workbench migration wizard fails with 'Error: Could not fetch data from source' when trying to copy the 'audit_log' table. The table has a BLOB column that exceeds the packet size. Need to increase `max_allowed_packet` on both sides.

Our phpPgAdmin session expires instantly after login. The cookie lifetime is set to 0 in the config. Need to change `session.gc_maxlifetime` to 3600 in php.ini and update the PgAdmin config to use it.

The DataGrip connection to Cassandra keeps failing with 'No host available: All hosts tried for query failed'. The contact point 'cassandra.internal' resolves to an old IP. Need to update DNS or use the new IP directly.
Our PGAdmin server is returning 502 Bad Gateway. The nginx reverse proxy cannot reach the uWSGI backend. The uWSGI process might have crashed. Need to restart the pgadmin container and check logs.

The Redis Commander UI is not loading the list of keys. The scan command returns 'ERR invalid cursor' for the 'user:*' pattern. The key pattern contains a colon that is not escaped. Need to use double backslashes in the search.

Our MongoDB Compass aggregations are timing out. The aggregation pipeline for daily active users runs for 5 minutes and then disconnects. The stage `$group` on a large collection lacks an index on the group field. Need to create an index on 'last_active_date'.

The Robo 3T connection to MongoDB is extremely slow. The UI freezes when opening the 'users' collection (10 million documents). Need to set a limit of 100 documents in the connection settings to avoid loading all.

Our SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) keeps showing 'Timeout expired' when generating reports for the 'ledger' database. The report queries exceed the 30-second default. Need to increase query timeout in Tools > Options > Query Execution.

The Azure Data Studio connection to the PostgreSQL Flex server is failing with 'FATAL: no pg_hba.conf entry for host'. The CIDR allowlist for the server does not include our office IP (203.0.113.45). Need to add it to the firewall rules.

Our HeidiSQL session is unable to SELECT from a partitioned table. The error says 'ERROR 1467 (HY000): Failed to read auto-increment value'. The table `transactions_2025` is missing the auto-increment counter. Need to repair the table or reseed the identity.

The Navicat data sync tool is reporting 'Duplicate entry for key 'PRIMARY'' when syncing production to staging. The destination table already has some rows with the same IDs. Need to use 'ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE' or truncate before sync.

Our Flyway migration script V123__add_timezone.sql contains a `COMMIT` statement that causes 'Warning: No transaction is in progress' on MySQL. The script should not include explicit commits. Need to remove it and run again.

The Liquibase changeset 'add_not_null_constraint' is failing with 'ValidationFailed' because the column already has NULL values. Need to set a default value for existing NULLs before applying the constraint.

Our Sqitch deployment is failing with 'could not connect to database: FATAL: peer authentication failed' for the local PG database. The pg_hba.conf uses 'peer' for local connections but the script runs as 'postgres' user. Need to change to 'trust' or 'md5' for local development.

The Atlas schema migration tool is throwing 'Error: missing schema 'analytics' in target database'. The schema was manually deleted. Need to recreate it with proper grants before running the migration.

Our Bytebase SQL review policy is blocking a PR because the `ALTER TABLE` statement would lock the table for 10 minutes. The policy `must_use_pt_online_schema_change` is enabled. Need to use `pt-online-schema-change` instead of direct ALTER.

The gh-ost migration for the `transactions` table is failing with 'FATAL: Could not connect to any of the given servers: dial tcp 10.0.1.15:3306: i/o timeout'. The master IP changed after a failover. Need to update the migration configuration with the new IP.

Our Yearning SQL audit platform is not displaying the execution results for large queries. The result set has 2000 rows but the UI only shows a blank page. Need to increase the `max_result_rows` setting to 5000.

The SchemaHero plan for the `settlement` table shows that it will drop the `amount` column and recreate it, causing data loss. The diff is incorrect because the `type` changed from `DECIMAL(10,2)` to `DECIMAL(12,2)`. Need to use `ALTER MODIFY` instead of drop/add.

Our Skeema diff tool reports a false positive schema difference for the `users` table. It claims the `email` collation changed from 'utf8_general_ci' to 'utf8_unicode_ci', but they are the same. The tool's cache is stale. Need to run `skeema pull --reconcile` to refresh.

The Toad for MySQL duplicate finder is crashing when scanning the 200GB `transactions` table. The tool runs out of memory. Need to use a sample or run queries directly on the database with `GROUP BY` instead of the GUI tool.

Our Percona Toolkit `pt-table-checksum` is failing with 'Diffs cannot be resolved because replica is not configured to log slave updates'. The replica's `log_slave_updates` is off. Need to enable it and restart replication for consistency checks.

The `pt-query-digest` report for slow logs shows 90% of queries are coming from the `reporting` service. The top query is an unfiltered `SELECT * FROM audit_log`. Need to add a date range to the query or index the `created_at` field.

Our `mysqlreport` output shows 95% table locks for the `orders` table. The storage engine is MyISAM. Need to convert to InnoDB to support row-level locking. The conversion will require downtime. Let's schedule it for Sunday.

The `mytop` monitoring tool for the production MySQL server is not refreshing. The command hangs after showing initial stats. The `max_connections` is set to 500 but there are 600 connections. The server is overloaded. Need to kill idle connections and increase max_connections.
Our Innotop instance shows 'No InnoDB buffer pool stats' because the user does not have the `PROCESS` privilege. Need to grant `PROCESS` to the monitoring user for accurate diagnostics.

The Orchestrator dashboard for MySQL failover is not updating. It still shows the old master (db-1) as writable even after failover to db-2. The replication topology mapping is stale. Need to run 'orchestrator-client -c discover -i db-2' to refresh.

Our ProxySQL query cache is not working for the `balance` lookup queries. The queries use `NOW()` in the WHERE clause, making them uncacheable. Need to replace with a fixed timestamp variable or use a different caching strategy.

The MaxScale router is sending read queries to the master even though the read-only service is configured. The user credentials have `@%` and the load balance algorithm is set to 'least_loaded_master'. Need to change to 'readconnroute' for read/write splitting.

Our Vitess VSchema for the `transactions` table is missing a vindex on the `user_id` column. Queries that filter by `user_id` are not sharded correctly, causing scatter queries across all shards. Need to add `hash` vindex on `user_id`.

The TiDB dashboard shows 'Region is hot' for the `order_history` table. The write hotspot is caused by monotonically increasing primary keys. Need to use `SHARD_ROW_ID_BITS` or `AUTO_RANDOM` to distribute writes.

Our CockroachDB cluster is experiencing high read-amplification. The 'read bytes' metric is 10x higher than data size because of frequent full scans. Need to add secondary indexes on the filtered columns.

The Spanner query is returning 'INVALID_ARGUMENT: Cannot specify both a timestamp and a bounded staleness' in the read-only transaction. The application uses both an exact timestamp and `max_staleness`. Need to remove one of them.

Our YugaByte DB connection pool is exhausting with 'YSQL: FATAL: number of prepared transactions has reached the limit (max_prepared_transactions)'. The limit is 100 but the application uses 200. Need to increase `max_prepared_transactions` to 300.

The Singlestore leaf node is failing with 'Leaf failed to process query: out of memory'. The query `ORDER BY amount` on a large dataset causes excessive memory usage. Need to increase `query_memory_limit` for this query or add a LIMIT.

Our ClickHouse replication lag is 5 minutes for the `events` table. The ZooKeeper session timeout is too low (10s). Need to increase `zookeeper_session_timeout_ms` to 30000 to avoid frequent disconnects.

The Druid indexing task for the `page_views` datasource is failing with 'Task failed: null'. The task logs show 'No segment metadata for interval'. The input data interval is empty. Need to check if there is data for the time range.

Our Pinot table `transactions` is missing segments for the last hour. The real-time ingestion is stuck because the Kafka topic `transactions` has no new messages. The producer might be down. Need to check the Kafka producer health.

The Imply Polaris ingestion spec has a syntax error. The `transform` function `concat` is missing quotes around the separator. Need to change `concat(, field1, field2)` to `concat(' ', field1, field2)`.

Our InfluxDB continuous query is not downsampling data from the `cpu` measurement. The CQ is created but never runs because the time range is set to the future. Need to check the schedule and time interval.

The PromQL query `histogram_quantile(0.99, rate(request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m]))` returns NaN because there are no data points in the last 5 minutes. The metric export from the application stopped. Need to restart the metrics exporter.

Our Graphite carbon-cache is dropping metrics because the whisper database size limit is reached. The retention policy is set to 1 year for 1-second data, which is too detailed. Need to change to 10-second aggregation after 1 day.

The StatsD UDP listener is losing packets under high load. The buffer size is 2048 but we send 5000 metrics per second. Need to increase `statsd_recv_buffer` to 16384 and use TCP mode for critical metrics.
Our Telegraf agent is not sending data to InfluxDB because the token expired. The output plugin shows '401 Unauthorized'. Need to generate a new token and update the Telegraf configuration.

The Collectd plugin for PostgreSQL is reporting 'Cannot read stats: permission denied'. The `pg_stat_statements` view is not readable by the 'collectd' user. Need to grant `SELECT ON pg_stat_statements` to the user.

Our Nagios check for disk space is returning 'WARNING: /var/lib/docker is 82% full'. The alert threshold is 80%. This is a false positive because it's a temporary spike. Need to increase the threshold to 90%.
The Zabbix server is not processing trapper data. The queue shows 50k unsent items. The trapper port 10051 is blocked by the firewall. Need to open the port between the Zabbix proxy and server.

Our Icinga2 monitoring is sending duplicate alerts for the same service failure. The check interval is 30 seconds and the flapping detection is disabled. Need to enable `enable_flapping = true` to reduce noise.
The Checkmk agent on the host 'web-01' is not providing disk I/O metrics. The agent's `diskio` plugin is missing. Need to reinstall the agent with all plugins enabled.
Our PRTG sensor for HTTP latency is reporting 5000ms even though the API responds in 200ms. The sensor uses a global proxy that adds latency. Need to bypass the proxy for internal endpoints.
The SolarWinds Orion poller is timing out on SNMP queries for core switches. The community string is incorrect after the security update. Need to update the community string to the new one.

Our LogicMonitor dashboard for Kafka metrics is missing the 'BytesOut' per topic. The datasource query is using the wrong metric name 'kafka.server:BytesOut' but should be 'kafka.server:BytesOutPerTopic'. Need to update the graph.

The DataDog synthetic API test for the payment endpoint is failing with 'Response time exceeded 2000ms'. The alert is configured to warn at 1000ms and critical at 2000ms. The actual p99 is 1500ms. Need to adjust thresholds to 1800ms/2500ms.

Our Sentry SDK for Django is not capturing exceptions in async views. The `asyncio` event loop swallows the error. Need to use `capture_exception` inside the async function with `loop.call_exception_handler`.
The Rollbar access token for the iOS app is expired. The token was last rotated 90 days ago. Need to generate a new token and update it in the Info.plist via the CI pipeline.

Our Bugsnag alert for 'High Rate of Connection Failures' is firing every hour even though there are no failures. The threshold is 1 failure per minute, but the metric is counting disconnections from the health check. Need to filter out health check endpoints.

The Raygun crash reporting shows 'Error: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined' in the frontend, but the stack trace is minified. The source maps are not uploaded. Need to configure `webpack` to generate source maps and upload them via the Raygun CLI.
Our TrackJS script fails to load because the CDN domain is blocked by the corporate firewall. The domain 'cdn.trackjs.com' is not in the allowlist. Need to add the domain or host the script locally.

The LogRocket session recording is not capturing clicks on the 'Submit' button. The button is part of a dynamically loaded component. Need to initialize LogRocket after the component mounts or use `[data-logrocket]` attribute.
Our FullStory integration is missing events for the payment flow. The `FS.event` call is not firing because of an ad blocker. Need to catch the error and fall back to a different tracking method.
The Hotjar heatmaps are not generating for the 'Checkout' page. The script is loaded but the page is a Single Page App (SPA). Need to call `hj.stateChange()` after each route change.

Our Mixpanel event properties are missing the 'user_tier' field for 50% of events. The property is set asynchronously after the event is sent. Need to move the property setting before the `track` call.

The Amplitude identify call is not merging user properties. The `set` method is called after the user logs in, but the events before login have no user ID. Need to set the user ID before sending any events.
Our Segment source 'Payment API' is dropping events with 'Invalid API key' error. The write key for the source was rotated. Need to update the key in the service environment variable.

The mParticle SDK for Android is crashing with 'Could not initialize class com.mparticle.MParticle' because Google Play Services are missing on the test device. Need to add a check for Play Services before initializing.
Our Freshpaint tracking script is loading twice on the marketing page, causing duplicate events. The script is included in both the base layout and the page template. Need to remove one instance.

The Heap analytics event 'Button Clicked' has a property 'button_name' with value 'undefined'. The DOM element does not have an 'id' or 'data-name' attribute. Need to set a data attribute on all tracked buttons.
Our Piwik PRO custom event is not showing up in the dashboard. The event category or action is too long (100 characters). The maximum length is 50. Need to truncate the values before sending.
The Matomo tracking API is returning 400 for bulk requests. The payload exceeds the 8KB limit. Need to split the batch into chunks of 10 events.
Our PostHog feature flag 'new-checkout-enabled' is not evaluated for anonymous users. The `distinct_id` is set to `null`. Need to generate a session ID for anonymous users to enable feature flags.
The Flagsmith Django integration is caching feature flags for 24 hours. The cache TTL is hardcoded to 86400. Need to reduce to 60 seconds for the 'dynamic-pricing' flag that changes frequently.

Our LaunchDarkly client is not connecting to the stream. The error 'EventSource failed to connect' appears in the console. The proxy server is blocking the SSE connection. Need to add 'X-Forwarded-For' header.

The ConfigCat dashboard is not showing the latest targeting rule for the 'beta_fraud' flag. The rule was saved 30 minutes ago but still not reflected. The cache invalidation might be delayed. Need to trigger a manual sync.
Our Split.io integration is failing with 'Exception: Invalid API Key' in the worker logs. The API key was revoked after the team member left. Need to generate a new key and update the secrets.

The Optimizely Full Stack SDK is not bucketing users consistently across environments. The seed value is the same, but the users are assigned differently. The environment key is included in the hash. Need to override the environment key for consistent A/B tests.

Our GrowthBook feature flag evaluation is returning the default value for 5% of requests because the cache expired and the background refresh failed. The Redis cache connection timed out. Need to increase the timeout and retry settings.

The SQLite database for our local development environment is getting corrupted every few days. The error 'database disk image is malformed' appears after a crash. We need to implement proper WAL mode and checkpointing to prevent corruption.

Our Microsoft SQL Server Agent job for backing up the 'ledger' database failed with 'ERROR: Operating system error 112 (There is not enough space on the disk)'. The backup drive E: is full. Need to delete old backup files and free up space.

The Oracle RMAN backup script is failing with 'ORA-19502: write error on file' for the archived logs. The destination mount point /backup is 100% full. Need to increase storage or move backups to a different location.

Our DB2 instance is reporting 'SQL0964C The transaction log for the database is full'. The log file size is 10GB and the primary log space is exhausted. Need to increase LOGPRIMARY and LOGSECOND parameters.

The Memcached server is crashing with 'overflow in hash table' because the number of items doubled overnight. The hash table size is fixed at 64K. Need to restart with -o hash_algorithm=murmur3 and increase default hash table size.

Our Hazelcast IMDG cluster is showing 'Partition table inconsistency' after a network split. The split-brain syndrome caused data divergence. Need to configure split-brain protection with quorum size and merge policies.

The Geode locator cannot find any servers. The locator logs show 'Failed to connect to server localhost:40404'. The servers are running but on port 40405. Need to update the locator configuration with the correct ports.

Our Ignite cluster is experiencing 'Failed to write to the WAL archive' because the archive disk is full. The archive directory is on /var/log with only 500MB free. Need to move WAL archive to a larger partition and enable compression.

The Aerospike namespace 'transactions' is taking too long to warm up after restart. The cold start loads all indexes from disk, which takes 30 minutes for 1 billion records. Need to enable 'warm-up' with persistence and allow writes during warm-up.

Our Tarantool cartridge is failing with 'ER_CASCADE_ROLLBACK: Transaction has been rolled back due to a conflict' under high load. The conflict resolution is set to 'rollback' but should be 'abort'. Need to change `vinyl_conflict_resolution` to 'abort' for better throughput.

The ScyllaDB query for the 'user_sessions' table is timing out with 'Operation timed out - received only 1 responses from 3 CL=QUORUM'. One of the nodes is down. Need to replace the dead node and rebuild data from replicas.

Our Dgraph Zero leader is failing to assign predicates to Alpha nodes. The error 'Predicate 'balance' is already assigned to group 2' appears because of a conflict after alpha group restart. Need to rebalance the predicates using `dgraph move` command.

The FaunaDB key 'fn-cloud-xxx' has expired because the key was created with a 30-day TTL. The key is used by the 'payment-service' to access the database. Need to generate a new key and update the service secret.

Our SurrealDB instance is rejecting connections with 'There was an error with authentication: no users defined in namespace'. The root user was not created during initialization. Need to run `surreal sql` and create the root user manually.

The EdgeDB migration 'create_user_table' is failing with 'ConstraintViolationError: duplicate key value violates unique constraint'. The migration tries to insert a user that already exists. Need to handle conflicts with `ALREADY EXISTS` or truncate the table.

Our QuestDB instance is out of disk space. The database directory '/var/lib/questdb' is 100% full. The write-ahead log (WAL) is huge because the table structure changed. Need to truncate the WAL and archive unused partitions.

The InfluxDB IOx query for the 'weather' measurement is failing with 'Error: column temperature not found'. The column was renamed to 'temp_c' in a previous write. Need to update the query to use the new column name.

Our CrateDB cluster is reporting 'Unassigned shards' for 15 shards because the node that held them is gone. The nodes were replaced but the routing is stale. Need to run `ALTER CLUSTER REROUTE RETRY FAILED` to reassign shards.

The Elasticsearch ILM policy is not rolling over the 'metrics' index because the max size is 50GB but the index is stuck at 49GB with old data. The index is read-only and not accepting writes. Need to manually rollover and update the policy.

Our OpenSearch cluster has 3 nodes in 'yellow' status because the replica shards for index 'audit' cannot be allocated. The nodes have different versions. Need to upgrade all nodes to the same version and restart.

The Solr query for the 'products' core is extremely slow because the filter cache is disabled. The 'useFilterForSortedQuery' parameter is not set. Need to enable filter cache in solrconfig.xml and warm up the cache.

Our Meilisearch index is not updating in real time. The documentation says it should update within 1 second, but we see delays of 5 minutes. The `batch_size` might be too large. Need to reduce `batch_size` to 1000 and increase the number of workers.

The Typesense search for 'financial_reports' returns incorrect results because the 'num_typos' setting is too permissive. The search for 'transaction' matches 'transact' with 3 typos. Need to set `num_typos` to 1 for that collection.

Our Algolia index 'users' is not syncing with the database. The `auto-generate` schedule is set to 4 hours but we need real-time updates. Need to switch to a webhook-based trigger for immediate indexing.

The Elastic App Search engine is returning 429 'Too Many Requests' for our automated queries. The rate limit is 100 requests per minute but we send 150. Need to increase quota on the plan or implement request throttling.

Our Azure Cognitive Search indexer fails with 'DataSource access error: Connection refused' when trying to connect to the Cosmos DB. The private endpoint is not configured correctly. Need to add the search service to the Cosmos DB firewall.

The AWS OpenSearch Service domain is in 'Processing' state for 3 hours after a configuration change. The change to add more nodes is stuck. The cluster health is 'read_only'. Need to contact AWS support to force the update.

Our Splunk forwarder is dropping data because the indexer is not acknowledging. The forwarder logs show 'Connection to 10.0.1.20:9997 timed out'. The indexer might be overloaded. Need to add more indexers or increase timeout.

The Sumo Logic collector is not sending logs from the Kubernetes cluster. The collector pod is running but the 'sourceCategory' metadata is missing. Need to add the annotation `sumologic.com/sourceCategory` to the pod template.

Our LogDNA agent is failing to authenticate with 'Invalid ingestion key'. The key was rotated but the agent configuration was not updated. Need to replace the key in the agent DaemonSet environment variables.

The Papertrail log drain for the Heroku app is not delivering logs. The drain URL is 'https://logs.papertrailapp.com:12345' but the port is wrong. The correct port is 12346 for TLS. Need to update the drain URL.
Our Graylog server is out of disk space. The Elasticsearch data directory is 90GB and the disk is 100GB. The retention policy is set to 90 days. Need to reduce to 30 days or add more storage.

The Humio repository is not accepting new events because the ingest token expired. The token has a TTL of 30 days and was not renewed. Need to generate a new token and update the Fluent Bit configuration.

Our Loki ruler is not evaluating alerting rules. The ruler pod shows 'failed to sync rule groups: context deadline exceeded'. The query to the ingester is timing out. Need to increase the ruler's query timeout to 60 seconds.

The Grafana Mimir compactor is failing with 'no bucket configured for blocks storage'. The `-blocks-storage.s3.bucket-name` flag is missing. Need to add the environment variable Mimir uses to find the S3 bucket.

Our VictoriaMetrics cluster is showing high query latency because the cache for index data is cold. The 'vm_cache_requests_total' metric shows 90% misses. Need to increase cache memory and pre-warm the cache on startup.

The TimescaleDB continuous aggregate policy is not refreshing. The background worker 'refresh_continuous_aggregate' is disabled. Need to enable it with `ALTER SYSTEM SET timescaledb.enable_background_workers = on`.

Our Druid coordinator is not loading segments for the 'transactions' datasource. The metadata table 'druid_segments' shows segments with status 'LOADING' for days. Need to issue `LOAD` command manually and check deep storage connectivity.

The Materialize cluster is experiencing high memory usage (95%) because of a `SELECT * FROM large_table` query with no limit. The query is running in the background. Need to kill the query with `pg_terminate_backend` and add a LIMIT.

Our RisingWave streaming job is failing with 'Kafka error: Leader not available' for topic 'user_events'. The Kafka partition leader is down. Need to check Kafka broker health and reassign leadership.
The Debezium connector for PostgreSQL is failing with 'ERROR: replication slot 'debezium' does not exist'. The slot was dropped accidentally. Need to recreate the slot and restart the connector.

Our Argo Events sensor is not triggering the workflow. The event source 'webhook' is receiving events but the sensor log shows 'failed to resolve resource'. The trigger template has the wrong group/version. Need to fix the resource reference.

The Temporal workflow history is growing indefinitely because the retention period is set to 0. The default is 30 days but the config override sets it to 0. Need to set `history.defaultWorkflowRetentionPeriod` to 7 days.

Our Cadence worker is failing to replay workflow tasks. The error 'failed to deserialize: protobuf: field 'State' has unknown type' indicates a version mismatch. The workflow code changed while tasks were in flight. Need to increase `history.retentionPeriod` and use versioning.

The Netflix Conductor task queue is stuck because the task 'process_payment' has been in 'IN_PROGRESS' for 24 hours. The worker died without updating the status. Need to manually mark the task as 'FAILED' and requeue using the Conductor API.

Our Zeebe broker is reporting 'Partition leader not found' for partition 3. The leader election timed out because of a network partition. Need to restart the broker and trigger a new election using the `LeaderElection` API.

The Camunda process engine is logging 'Process definition with key 'loan_approval' not found'. The process was deleted from the repository but there are still running instances. Need to suspend the instances and archive the process definition.

Our Airflow task 'data_quality_check' is failing with 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pandas''. The Python environment on the worker does not have pandas installed. Need to add it to the requirements.txt and rebuild the Docker image.

The Prefect flow runs are stuck in 'Scheduled' state because the flow runner pod is pending. The Pod quota in the namespace 'prefect' is exceeded. Need to increase the quota or reduce the number of concurrent runs.

Our Dagster sensor is not polling the S3 bucket for new files. The sensor runs but the `context.has_new_partitions` always returns false. The partition mapping might be wrong. Need to check the `partition_mappings` definition.

The Kestra flow execution fails with 'JDBC driver not found' for the MySQL connection. The driver jar is missing in the `lib` directory. Need to download the MySQL connector jar and place it in the plugins folder.
Our Flyte task is failing with 'DataLoaderError: Failed to download from S3: AccessDenied'. The IAM role attached to the task does not have `s3:GetObject` permission. Need to update the role policy.

The Metaflow step 'train_model' is taking 8 hours to complete because the data is not batched. The dataset has 100 million rows and is loaded into memory at once. Need to use `batch_size` and generator to process in chunks.

Our Kubeflow pipeline step 'preprocess' is failing with 'Out of memory (OOM) killed' on the worker node. The pod memory limit is 8GB but the process needs 12GB. Need to increase the memory limit to 16GB or optimize the code.

The TFX pipeline component 'ExampleValidator' is stuck at 0% for 2 hours. The worker pod is pending because of insufficient GPU resources. The pipeline requests 1 GPU but only CPU nodes are available. Need to remove GPU request or add GPU nodes.

Our Kedro pipeline is failing with 'KeyError: 'transactions'' because the catalog.yml references a dataset that doesn't exist. The dataset name was changed to 'settlements' in the latest update. Need to update the catalog entry.

The Ploomber task 'clean_data' is not producing the expected output file. The task runs without error but the output path is empty. The function calling `to_parquet` might be saving to a wrong location. Need to add logging to debug.
Our DVC pipeline is showing 'DAG mismatch' because the dependencies have changed. The `dvc.lock` file is outdated. Need to run `dvc repro` to update the lock file and resolve the mismatch.

The Pachyderm pipeline 'risk_prediction' is stuck in 'running' state for 48 hours. The pipeline worker pod is crashing with 'ImagePullBackOff' because the Docker image tag is missing. Need to rebuild the image with a valid tag and update the pipeline spec.

Our Dagster asset 'daily_sales' is not materializing because the upstream asset 'raw_sales' has a runtime error. The error is 'DivisionByZero' in the transformation. Need to add a check for zero before division.

The Kedro-Viz server refuses to start because port 4141 is already used by another process. The previous visualization was not closed properly. Need to kill the process using the port or change the port in `kedro viz --port=4142`.

Our CI pipeline for the Android app keeps failing with 'Execution failed for task ':app:compileDebugJavaWithJavac'. The error says 'Unsupported class file major version 61' which means Java 17 is required but the runner uses Java 11. Can we update the runner's JDK to 17?

The iOS app build on Bitrise is failing with 'Code signing error: No signing certificate 'iOS Distribution' found'. The certificate expired yesterday. Need to generate a new distribution certificate and update the provisioning profile.

Our Flutter app cannot connect to the staging API on Android emulator. The error 'SocketException: Connection refused (OS Error: Connection refused, errno = 111)' occurs because localhost resolves to the emulator itself. Need to use 10.0.2.2 instead of localhost in the API base URL.
The React Native build for iOS fails with 'React/RCTBridgeModule.h' file not found. The react-native link step didn't complete. Need to run 'cd ios && pod install' to link the native dependencies.

Our Expo development build is crashing on launch with 'Unhandled JS Exception: TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'RNBootSplash.hide')'. The native module for splash screen is missing. Need to rebuild with 'expo run:android' to link the module.
The Ionic capacitor sync command failed with 'Error: Could not find plugin 'cordova-plugin-camera'. The plugin is not installed. Need to run 'npm install cordova-plugin-camera' and sync again.

Our Xamarin.Forms app is throwing 'System.Net.WebException: Error: SecureChannelFailure (The certificate chain was issued by an authority that is not trusted)'. The backend SSL certificate is self-signed. Need to add certificate validation callback for development only.

The Flutter widget test for the login screen is failing with 'Finder not found: find.byKey(Key('login_button'))'. The key was changed to 'sign_in_button' in the latest update. Need to update the test to use the new key.

Our Detox end-to-end test for the iOS app is timing out waiting for 'Welcome' screen to appear. The test is looking for text 'Welcome' but the actual screen shows 'Hello, John'. Need to update the test matcher.

The Appium test for Android keeps failing with 'Original error: Could not find aapt2 in PATH'. The Android SDK build-tools are missing. Need to install Android SDK build-tools version 34.0.0 on the test runner.

Our Firebase Test Lab device test is failing on API level 29 but works on 33. The issue is with permission handling for Android 10. Need to request `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` at runtime and handle scoped storage.
The HockeyApp crash report shows 'SIGSEGV' in the C++ layer for the iOS app. The crash occurs when deallocating a native object. Need to enable Address Sanitizer to track down the memory corruption.
Our Bugfender logs are missing console messages from the Flutter app. The logger was not initialized before the first prints. Need to call `Bugfender.init()` in the `main()` before any other code.

The Instabug SDK for iOS is not showing the screenshot option in the bug report. The feature is disabled in the configuration. Need to enable `IBGSurveys.enabled = true` and `IBGReplies.enabled = true`.
Our Embrace.io session replay is not capturing network requests. The `urlSession` delegate was not swizzled properly. Need to ensure the Embrace SDK is loaded before any `URLSession` is created.
The Intercom messenger for React Native is not loading user avatars. The user attribution is missing the `avatar_url` field. Need to update the `Intercom.updateUser` call with the complete user data.
Our Zendesk Chat SDK is not sending offline messages. The department ID is set incorrectly for offline forms. Need to change the department ID from '123' to '456' in the chat configuration.

The Freshchat widget on the mobile app is overlapping with the bottom navigation bar. The layout margins are not set. Need to add `android:layout_marginBottom` to the Freshchat view in the activity layout.

Our Swift UI preview is crashing with 'EXC_BAD_ACCESS' when rendering the `TransactionView`. The preview is trying to fetch data from a local database that doesn't exist in the preview context. Need to inject mock data for previews.

The Android Jetpack Compose recomposition is happening too often, causing frame drops. The `@Stable` annotation is missing on the data class `Transaction`. Need to add `@Stable` to reduce unnecessary recompositions.

Our Kotlin Multiplatform mobile (KMM) shared code is failing to compile on iOS with 'Unresolved reference: platform'. The `iosMain` source set is missing the `platform` dependency. Need to add `implementation(project.dependencies.platform('org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-serialization'))`.

The React Native Hermes engine is crashing with 'Fatal javascript error: invalid array buffer length' when processing a large JSON response. The response size is 50MB, which exceeds Hermes limits. Need to paginate the API response.

Our Maestro test for the Android app is failing because the `waitForElement` timeout is too short for slow CI devices. The element appears after 10 seconds but the timeout is 5 seconds. Need to increase timeout to 30 seconds.

The Calabash test step 'Then I see 'Payment Successful'' is failing because the text is split across multiple views. The text is 'Payment' and 'Successful' in separate `TextView`s. Need to use a regex matcher to find both.

Our EarlGrey test for iOS is failing with 'Error: No element found for matcher: grey_accessibilityID('submit_button')'. The accessibility ID was removed in the latest build. Need to add it back in the storyboard.

The Fastlane snapshot generation is failing because the simulator device 'iPhone 13' is not available. The CI machine has only iPhone 14 simulators. Need to change the device in the Snapfile to 'iPhone 14'.

Our R8 obfuscation rules for the Android app are causing `ClassNotFoundException` for the `TransactionCallback` class. The class is used in the manifest but obfuscated away. Need to add `-keep class com.fintech.TransactionCallback` to proguard-rules.pro.

The DexGuard encryption for the Android app is failing with 'Cannot find resource for bytes to encrypt'. The assets that need encryption are not specified. Need to add `-encryptassetfiles assets/secure/` to the configuration.

Our HockeyApp crash report for Windows Phone shows 'System.IO.IOException: The device is not ready' when accessing storage. The isolated storage was not initialized. Need to handle `IsolatedStorageException` and create the directory.
The Xamarin.Forms `Navigation.PushAsync` hangs on iOS 15. The issue is with modal presentation style. Need to set `ModalPresentationStyle = UIModalPresentationStyle.FullScreen` to fix.
Our Maui app cannot connect to the local API on Android 12+. The cleartext traffic is blocked by default. Need to add `android:usesCleartextTraffic='true'` in AndroidManifest.xml or use HTTPS.
The Uno Platform WebAssembly build is failing with 'Could not find 'emcc' compiler'. Emscripten is not installed on the build agent. Need to install emsdk and activate the latest version.

Our Avalonia UI app is rendering incorrectly on macOS because the scaling factor is wrong. The application is not DPI-aware. Need to add `<ApplicationHighDpiMode>Enabled</ApplicationHighDpiMode>` in the csproj.

The Qt Quick app is crashing with 'ASSERT: '!d->isRunning' in file qeventdispatcher_glib.cpp' on Ubuntu. The event loop is being re-entered. Need to avoid calling `QCoreApplication::processEvents()` recursively.

Our Electron app is consuming 2GB of memory because of a memory leak in the `BrowserWindow` objects. Windows are not being destroyed properly. Need to call `win.destroy()` and `win = null` in the 'closed' event.

The Tauri build is failing with 'error while loading shared libraries: libwebkit2gtk-4.0.so.37' on the CI runner. The webkit2gtk package is missing. Need to install `libwebkit2gtk-4.0-dev` in the CI base image.

Our RN app in production is showing a white screen on the first launch after updating. The JavaScript bundle is corrupted. The CodePush deployment might have failed. Need to rollback to the previous version via CodePush CLI.

The Expo OTA update is not being applied because the runtime version does not match. The app manifest has 'runtimeVersion: 1.0.0' but the update expects '1.0.1'. Need to increment the runtime version in app.json and rebuild the app.

Our Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) push notifications are not arriving on Xiaomi devices running MIUI. The app is in the background and the notifications are not showing because of MIUI's aggressive battery optimization. Need to add a user prompt to disable battery optimization.

The OneSignal SDK for iOS is not prompting for notification permissions on the first launch. The `requestAuthorization` method is not being called because the user previously denied. Need to detect the denial and show a custom prompt.

Our Pusher Beams push notifications are failing to send with error 'Invalid device token format' for iOS. The token is being truncated. Need to ensure we send the device token as a string without spaces or angle brackets.

The CleverTap SDK is sending duplicate events because the `init` is called multiple times. The SDK is initialized in both `Application.onCreate()` and the first `Activity.onCreate()`. Need to move initialization to only one place.
Our Braze in-app message is not showing because the user is not considered 'active'. The session is not started. Need to call `Braze.getInstance(context).openSession()` when the app opens.
The Leanplum deep link is not opening the correct screen. The URL scheme is handled in `MainActivity` but the path is not parsed. Need to extract the query parameter and navigate using a router.

Our Adjust SDK attribution data is missing for 20% of installs. The SDK is initialized after the user consents, but some events happen before. Need to delay event tracking until after consent is given.
The AppsFlyer onConversionDataSuccess callback is not firing for reinstall users. The conversion data is cached and not refreshed. Need to call `appsFlyer.getConversionData()` again after app update.
Our Branch.io deep links are not working on Windows 10 (UWP). The URI activation contract is not implemented. Need to override `OnActivated` in App.xaml.cs to handle `ProtocolActivatedEventArgs`.

The Firebase Dynamic Links are not opening the app when installed from the Play Store. The deferred deep linking is not working because the FID (Firebase Instance ID) is not ready immediately. Need to add a delay before requesting the link.

Our revenuecat SDK is reporting 'No active subscriptions' for a user who has an active Google Play subscription. The purchase token might not be synced. Need to call `Purchases.restoreTransactions()` to refresh the state.

The Adapty SDK is failing to validate receipts on iOS sandbox. The error `The receipt is not valid` occurs because the sandbox environment is not recognized. Need to set `Adapty.setEnvironment(.sandbox)` for debug builds.

Our Qonversion integration is not tracking trial conversions. The `Qonversion.checkTrialEligibility` returns false always because the product identifier is incorrect. Need to use the exact product ID from App Store Connect.

The Superwall paywall is not rendering on Android because the remote configuration failed to load. The network request to 'https://api.superwall.com' times out behind the corporate firewall. Need to whitelist the domain or use a proxy.

Our Mobile engagement survey using Qualtrics SDK is showing blank questions. The survey definition failed to load because the language tag is 'en-US' but the survey only has 'en'. Need to fall back to 'en' if the exact locale is not found.

The Delighted SDK for iOS is not sending feedback because the user email contains a '+' sign. The email is malformed when URL-encoded. Need to encode the email using `stringByAddingPercentEncodingWithAllowedCharacters` before sending.

The legacy ASP.NET WebForms app for internal reporting is throwing 'Validation of viewstate MAC failed' error after we moved it to a new server. The machine key is different. Need to set a fixed machine key in web.config to make viewstate consistent across restarts.

Our classic ASP pages are displaying '80004005' error when connecting to the Access database. The Jet OLEDB provider is not registered on the 64-bit server. Need to run IIS in 32-bit mode or migrate to a newer database.
The ColdFusion server is throwing 'Error resolving parameter' for the CFQUERY tag. The Oracle JDBC driver version is too old for the database. Need to upgrade ojdbc6.jar to ojdbc8.jar.

Our JSP application is failing with 'org.apache.jasper.JasperException: PWC6033: Error in Javac compilation for JSP'. The JSP uses Java 8 features but the server runs Java 7. Need to upgrade Tomcat to version 8 or later.

The Perl CGI script that processes ACH files is failing with 'Can't locate LWP/UserAgent.pm' on the new server. The Perl module 'libwww-perl' is missing. Need to install it via CPAN or system package manager.

Our Ruby on Rails asset pipeline is failing to compile with 'ExecJS::RuntimeUnavailable: Could not find a JavaScript runtime'. Node.js is not installed on the deployment server. Need to install Node.js or add 'therubyracer' gem.

The Sinatra app for the compliance dashboard is returning 500 errors because the 'sinatra/reloader' gem is missing in production. The Gemfile has 'group :development' around it. Need to move it to the default group or remove the reference.
Our Rack middleware for request logging is adding a 200ms overhead because it writes synchronously to a slow disk. Need to switch to async logging using a separate thread or a background job.

The Hanami API for the settlement service is not parsing JSON request bodies in production. The 'hanami-api' gem has a bug with rackup. Need to add an explicit 'use Rack::Handler::WEBrick' in the config.ru.

Our Grape API endpoint for /transactions is returning a 415 Unsupported Media Type for valid JSON requests. The 'format :json' declaration is missing in the Grape class. Need to add it at the top of the class.
The RSpec test suite is failing on CI because of a 'DatabaseCleaner::NoDatabaseError'. The test database is not configured. Need to set `DatabaseCleaner[:active_record].db = :test` in spec_helper.rb.

Our Capybara integration test is failing with 'Selenium::WebDriver::Error::WebDriverError: unable to connect to chromedriver 127.0.0.1:9515'. The Chrome browser version was updated but chromedriver is outdated. Need to update both.

The FactoryBot trait 'with_settlement' is creating duplicate records because the after(:create) callback is running twice. The trait is applied both in the factory and the test. Need to remove the duplicate.

Our Sidekiq workers are crashing with 'Redis::CannotConnectError: Error connecting to Redis on 127.0.0.1:6379 (Errno::ECONNREFUSED)'. Redis is not running on the staging server. Need to start Redis and ensure it persists across reboots.

The Delayed Job worker is not picking up jobs because the 'delayed_jobs' table has no index on 'run_at'. The worker scans the entire table every 10 seconds, causing high CPU. Need to add a composite index on (run_at, locked_at, failed_at).

Our Resque queue is filling up with failed jobs because the 'DYING' signal is not handled. The worker process dies but the job remains 'working'. Need to add a trap for TERM signal to requeue the job before exit.

The GoodJob scheduler for Rails is not retrying failed jobs. The 'retry_on' exception is set to StandardError but the failure is an ArgumentError. Need to specify the exact exception or use a broader catch-all.

Our Shoryuken worker for SQS is taking 5 seconds per message because of a network latency when calling an external API. The API call times out after 1 second but the default is 5 seconds. Need to reduce the timeout to 1 second and fail fast.

The ActiveMQ broker is rejecting messages with 'Exceeded maximum message size (10485760 bytes)'. The message payload is 15MB. Need to increase the `maxFrameSize` to 20MB in the ActiveMQ configuration.

Our IBM MQ queue manager is reporting 'AMQ4059: Security context error' for the channel 'FINANCE.CHANNEL'. The SSL/TLS certificate expired. Need to renew the certificate and update the key repository.

The ZeroMQ socket is dropping messages because the high-water mark (HWM) is too low. The send queue fills up quickly during peak load. Need to increase the HWM from 1000 to 100000 in the zmq_setsockopt call.

Our NATS JetStream consumer is stuck because the ack wait period is too short. The consumer takes 35 seconds to process but the ack wait is 30 seconds. The message is redelivered and processed again. Need to increase ack wait to 60 seconds.

The Pulsar function for data transformation is failing with 'java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Direct buffer memory'. The function processes large CSV files and uses direct memory for parsing. Need to increase the direct memory limit in the function config.

Our Mosquitto MQTT broker is not retaining messages as expected. The 'max_queued_messages' is set to 100, but many clients disconnect frequently. Need to increase to 10000 and enable persistent sessions.

The EMQX cluster is experiencing high latency for PUBLISH operations (p99 > 500ms). The load balancer distributes connections unevenly. Need to enable sticky sessions or use a consistent hashing algorithm.
Our VerneMQ plugin for authentication is failing with 'undef: certifi:cacerts/0' on Erlang 24. The `certifi` dependency is missing. Need to add it to the rebar.config and rebuild the plugin.

The Apache ActiveMQ Artemis journal is corrupted after a power outage. The server fails to start with 'ActiveMQArtemisJournalException: Failed to load journal'. Need to run the journal recovery tool or restore from backup.

Our Solace PubSub+ event broker is dropping messages when the queue depth exceeds 1 million. The `maxMsgSpoolUsage` is set to 1GB but the messages are large. Need to increase spool usage to 10GB and enable message compression.

The Google Pub/Sub push subscription is failing with 'DEADLINE_EXCEEDED' because our endpoint takes 15 seconds to process. The default deadline is 10 seconds. Need to configure the subscription with `ackDeadlineSeconds=30`.

Our AWS SNS topic filter policy is not matching JSON attributes with dot notation. The policy '{"event": ['payment.completed']}' doesn't match because the attribute is nested. Need to flatten the attributes or use the correct JSONPath syntax.

The Azure Service Bus 'MaxDeliveryCount' is set to 10 but messages are moved to DLQ after 3 failures because of session ID mismatches. The session ID is not set correctly. Need to ensure the same session ID is used across retries.

Our RabbitMQ shovel plugin is not copying messages from the source queue to the target. The shovel status shows 'running' but the queue depth is not decreasing. The AMQP URI might be incorrect. Need to check the shovel configuration and credentials.

The Kafka MirrorMaker 2.0 connector is failing with 'Worker client failed to connect: Connection refused'. The target cluster bootstrap server is unreachable. The network ACL might be blocking the port 9092. Need to verify the security group.

Our Debezium MySQL connector is not capturing changes from the `orders` table because the `sql_mode` includes `NO_BACKSLASH_ESCAPES`. The connector cannot parse the old schema. Need to change the sql_mode to a standard mode or update the connector configuration.

The Maxwell daemon is not writing to the Kafka topic because the producer batch size is too small. The error 'RecordTooLargeException' occurs for messages >1MB. Need to increase `max.request.size` to 5MB and `max.message.bytes` in Kafka.

Our Flink job reading from Kinesis is failing with 'KinesisConnectorException: Shard is not ready to be read'. The stream was created 5 minutes ago but the job starts immediately. Need to add a delay or retry logic for not-ready shards.

The Spark Structured Streaming query checkpoint is corrupt because of a schema change in the source data. The error `'cannot resolve 'amount' given input columns: [_corrupt_record]` appears. Need to delete the checkpoint directory and restart.

Our Samza job for real-time aggregation is restarting every hour because of a 'Container killed by YARN' event. The job uses too much memory (8GB) but the container limit is 6GB. Need to increase container memory or optimize the job.

The Heron topology is falling behind because the spout is reading from a Kafka topic with 100 partitions but the topology has only 10 executors. The parallelism is mismatched. Need to increase the spout parallelism to 100.

Our Pulsar IO connector for MongoDB sink is failing with 'WriteConcernException: No write concern mode named 'majority' found'. The MongoDB replica set is not configured for majority writes. Need to change the write concern to 'acknowledged' in the connector config.

The Hazelcast Jet pipeline is failing with 'Job is stuck in RUNNING state for 2 hours' because of a backpressure issue. The source is reading faster than the sink can write. Need to add a `throttle` step or increase the sink's parallelism.
Our Akka Streams graph is having a 'Fictitious Source' error when the stream is materialized. The source is not connected to a sink. Need to ensure all sources have a `to` or `toMat` method called.

The Apache Camel route for file transfer is failing with 'No such file or directory' when moving processed files. The source directory contains symlinks that point outside the allowed path. Need to resolve symlinks before moving or skip them.

Our Spring Cloud Stream binder for Kafka is not honoring the `autoCommitOffset` setting. The consumer commits offsets even when processing fails. The 'enable.auto.commit' should be false. Need to set `spring.cloud.stream.kafka.bindings.input.consumer.autoCommitOffset=false`.

The Mule application flow is throwing 'Expression Evaluator: [payload] returned null' for a variable that is set in a previous flow. The flow variable scope is not retained across subflows. Need to use session variables instead.

Our WSO2 ESB proxy service is returning ' javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamException: ParseError at [row,col]:[1,1]' for a JSON payload. The REST API expects JSON but the content-type is set to XML. Need to force content-type to application/json in the in-sequence.

The Talend job for ETL is failing with 'java.sql.SQLException: ORA-01000: maximum open cursors exceeded'. The job does not close ResultSet in a finally block. Need to refactor the tDBInput component to close connections properly.

Our Pentaho Kettle transformation is not writing to the output table because the 'Truncate table' step runs after the 'Insert / Update' step. The order of steps is wrong. Need to move the truncate step before the load step.

The Informatica PowerCenter workflow is failing with 'Session failed: Database driver error: ORA-01400: cannot insert NULL into ('ADMIN'.'STG_TRANSACTIONS'.'AMOUNT')'. The source data has a NULL in the amount field. Need to add a transformation to replace NULL with 0.

Our SSIS package for loading the data warehouse is failing at the 'Data Flow Task' because of a buffer memory error. The 'DefaultBufferMaxRows' is 10000 but the source has 10 million rows. Need to reduce to 1000 and increase 'DefaultBufferSize' to 20MB.

The DataStage job is aborting with 'Transformer stage: Table reference has no rows'. The lookup stage is joined but the master table is empty. Need to add a condition to skip the lookup if the master has no rows.

Our AWS Data Pipeline is stuck in 'PENDING' for 2 hours because of insufficient EC2 capacity. The instance type `m4.large` is not available in the `us-east-1c` zone. Need to change the availability zone or instance type.

The Google Cloud Composer DAG is failing with 'SQLAlchemy: DataError: (psycopg2.errors.NumericValueOutOfRange) integer out of range'. The Airflow variable is 2^31 but the variable table uses a 32-bit int. Need to change the column type to BIGINT.

Our Mage.ai pipeline block 'load_transactions' is hanging because the SQL query takes 20 minutes and the default timeout is 5 minutes. Need to increase the query timeout in the block's `execution_timeout` parameter.

The Perfect ETL job is failing with 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pyarrow'' when writing to Parquet. The Python environment is missing pyarrow. Need to add it to the requirements and rebuild the Docker image.

Our Domo dataflow is not updating because the dataset's last run status shows 'Failed - Connection timeout' for the MySQL source. The database firewall is blocking Domo's IP range. Need to whitelist the IPs listed in Domo's documentation.

The Tableau Prep flow is failing with 'Data extraction error: The field 'transaction_date' cannot be converted to Date'. The source CSV has dates in 'DD/MM/YYYY' format but Tableau expects 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Need to change the date format in the connection.

Our Alteryx workflow is running out of memory (error 'OutOfMemoryException') when joining two large tables (100GB each). The default join algorithm uses hash join in memory. Need to use a sort-merge join by adding a sort tool before the join.

The Looker PDT (Persistent Derived Table) is not building because of 'CREATE TABLE permission denied' for the scratch schema. The service account lacks `CREATE` on the `looker_scratch` database. Need to grant the permission.

Our Power BI dataset refresh is failing with 'AnalysisServices: The operation has been cancelled because the dataset exceeded the maximum allowed memory (10GB)'. The dataset has 11GB of data. Need to reduce the data model size or increase the capacity memory limit.

The Metabase dashboard is showing 'Connection refused' for the MongoDB database. The MongoDB URI changed after a security upgrade. Need to update the database connection details in the Metabase admin panel.
Our Redash query for 'Weekly Active Users' is timing out after 60 seconds. The query scans 200 million rows. Need to create a materialized view that refreshes daily and query that instead.

The Superset chart is not rendering because the underlying Druid query returns 'Out of memory' error. The query's `group by` has 1 million distinct dimensions. Need to add a `limit` clause or pre-aggregate the data.
Our Qlik Sense app load fails with 'Script error: Unexpected end of file' while loading the 'transactions.qvd' file. The QVD file is corrupted. Need to regenerate it from the source.

The MicroStrategy report 'Executive Dashboard' is returning 'No Data' for the 'Revenue' metric because the schema mapping changed. The fact table column was renamed from 'revenue_usd' to 'revenue_amount'. Need to update the logical table.

Our Sisense elasticube build is taking 8 hours because of a Cartesian join between two fact tables. The cube design has a many-to-many relationship without a bridge table. Need to redesign the schema with a third associative table.

The Wi-Fi in our engineering wing keeps dropping every 15 minutes. The connection stays but internet access dies. The network team says it's a known issue with the Meraki access points. Can we reboot the APs or update the firmware?
Our internal DNS server is not resolving 'kibana.internal.fintech.com' from the corporate network. The A record was deleted during a cleanup. Need to add it back with the correct IP (10.10.0.45).
The DHCP server is out of IP addresses in the 10.0.20.0/24 subnet. We added 50 new IoT devices for the office and now laptops can't get IPs. Need to expand the subnet to /22 or add a new scope.

Our corporate proxy is blocking access to 'https://pypi.org' and 'https://registry.npmjs.org' for the build agents. The error '407 Proxy Authentication Required' appears. The proxy credentials might have expired. Need to update them in the build environment variables.

The IPSec tunnel between our AWS VPC and the partner bank's data center is down. The logs show 'IKE_SA not found' after we renewed our certificate. Need to re-establish the tunnel with the new shared secret.

My laptop takes 10 minutes to boot up. It's stuck on 'Applying computer settings' for most of that time. The IT team pushed a new group policy that might be conflicting. Can you check the domain controller logs?

The RSA SecurID token for my VPN access is out of sync. The code on my hardware token doesn't match what the server expects. I tried syncing by entering two consecutive codes but it still fails. Need to resync or issue a new token.

Our Duo MFA prompt is not appearing when logging into the internal HR system. The browser console shows 'Failed to load Duo iframe: net::ERR_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT'. The Duo API endpoint is blocked. Need to whitelist 'api-xxxxxxxx.duosecurity.com'.
The YubiKey for my admin account stopped working. The SSH agent doesn't detect it anymore. I tried re-plugging and restarting the agent. The key might have been reset. Can you re-enroll my YubiKey?

Our Google Workspace SSO is failing with 'SAML response invalid signature' for the Okta integration. The certificate in Okta expired yesterday. Need to upload the new certificate from Google Workspace to Okta.

The external authentication provider (Auth0) is returning 'invalid_client' for our machine-to-machine token request. The client secret was rotated but the application still uses the old one. Need to update the secret in Vault and restart the service.

Our Git pre-commit hook runs `black` and `isort` but they conflict on line ordering. `isort` changes the order, then `black` changes it back. Need to configure `isort` to use the `black` profile (`--profile black`).

The `npm ci` command in CI fails with 'ECONNRESET' because the npm registry connection is reset by the corporate firewall. The firewall times out idle connections. Need to set `npm config set maxsockets 3` to reduce parallel connections.

The Cassandra table 'user_activity' has a tombstone problem causing read timeouts. The TTL is set to 7 days, but deletions are not compacted fast enough. Need to change `gc_grace_seconds` from 864000 to 86400 and run `nodetool compact`.

My laptop's fan is constantly loud when running `docker-compose up` because the 'elasticsearch' container uses 100% CPU. The container is doing a health check every second. Need to increase the `interval` in the health check to 30 seconds.

The `terraform` module 'vpc' fails with 'Error: Error creating VPC: VpcLimitExceeded: The maximum number of VPCs has been reached.' We have 5 VPCs and the limit is 5. Need to request a limit increase from AWS or delete unused VPCs.

The Apache Spark job for monthly aggregations fails with 'Task failed serialization: java.io.NotSerializableException: org.apache.log4j.Logger'. The `Logger` instance is not serializable because it's static. Need to use `@transient lazy val logger` in Scala.

I need to add a new column 'settled_at' to the `transactions` table. The migration should run during low traffic. Can you schedule it for Saturday 2 AM? The table has 500M rows, so it will take an hour.

The `kubectl logs -f` command for a pod stops streaming logs after 10 minutes because the API server has a timeout. The `--tail` flag is set to -1, but the connection drops. Need to use `--since=10m` and run in a loop or use a log aggregator.

The external payment integration (Stripe) is declining payments with 'card_declined: insufficient_funds' even when the customer has funds. The Stripe radar rule is blocking because the IP is from a high-risk country. Need to add the IP to the allowlist in Stripe Dashboard.

My local Elasticsearch index mapping is not being applied because the template name is incorrect. The Kibana dev tools show 'no such index template'. Need to check the template name matches what the application expects.

The `systemd` service for the 'risk-engine' fails to start with 'Failed to start risk-engine.service: Unit risk-engine.service not found'. The service file was placed in `/etc/systemd/system` but not enabled. Need to run `systemctl enable risk-engine`.

The `nginx` error log shows 'upstream timed out (110: Connection timed out) while reading response header from upstream' for the `/api/health` endpoint. The health check takes 5 seconds, but the proxy timeout is 1 second. Need to increase the timeout to 10s for the health path.

The `Redis` cluster is using 100% memory because of a key `session:*` that has no TTL. The session keys are never expired. Need to add `EXPIRE` when setting the key and also set `maxmemory-policy` to `allkeys-lru` as a fallback.

The main trading engine suddenly started showing incorrect order matching results this morning after the recent deployment. Several buy orders were matched at wrong prices and we have already received multiple complaints from traders. This issue is causing real financial impact and needs immediate attention from the platform team.

I am unable to connect to the company VPN from my home network since this morning. The connection keeps failing with timeout errors even though my internet connection is stable. I have tried restarting the laptop and reinstalling the VPN client but the problem continues.

The nightly backup job for our primary customer database failed completely last night. The error indicated insufficient space on the backup storage server. We need to either clean up old backups or expand the storage capacity before the next scheduled run.

Our mobile application is crashing for several users when they try to open the transaction history screen. It works fine on my test devices but customer reports indicate it happens mostly on older Android versions. The crash logs point to a memory issue.

The monitoring dashboard keeps sending false alerts about high CPU usage on multiple production servers. When I checked the actual servers manually the CPU usage was normal. The alert thresholds probably need to be adjusted to reduce noise.

I keep getting permission denied errors when trying to deploy a small configuration change to the staging environment. My account had proper access before but something seems to have changed in the RBAC policies recently.

Payment confirmation emails have not been sent to any customers since yesterday evening. The logs show that our email relay server is rejecting all connection attempts from the application servers. This is affecting customer trust.

My local development environment stopped working after the latest dependency updates. Docker containers keep restarting and I see database connection refused errors when trying to start the full stack locally.

Multiple team members have reported that the internal communication tool is extremely slow today. Messages take more than ten seconds to appear and sometimes fail to send completely. This is impacting our daily coordination.

The fraud detection system started blocking too many legitimate transactions today. Several important customers complained they could not complete normal payments. We need to review the current model rules and thresholds immediately.

I need urgent help accessing the production log files for the incident that happened last night. The usual log viewer tool is showing permission errors and I cannot locate the files through the standard interfaces.

The new feature we released yesterday is causing significantly higher battery drain on the mobile application. Users have started leaving negative reviews mentioning the issue. We should investigate the background processes.
Database queries for the main reporting dashboard are taking much longer than normal. A simple daily summary report that used to load in two seconds now takes more than thirty seconds to complete.

My code editor started showing strange syntax errors in files that were working perfectly fine yesterday. The auto complete and linting features have also stopped working properly after the latest update.

The automated test suite is failing consistently on the CI server even though all tests pass without issues when I run them on my local machine. The problem started after we updated one of the testing libraries.

Customers are reporting that they cannot log into the main web portal. The login page loads successfully but the authentication step fails with a generic error message. This is affecting many users right now.

The Kubernetes cluster stopped creating new pods automatically when traffic increases. The horizontal autoscaler seems stuck and we are experiencing performance degradation during peak business hours.
I accidentally deleted an important configuration file from our shared git repository. Is there any way to recover it from history or backups? The file contained critical environment settings.
The external fraud checking service is responding very slowly today. Our system is timing out while waiting for their responses which is causing delays in transaction processing for many customers.
All Grafana dashboards for system health are showing completely blank this morning. The panels display no data even though the backend servers are running and sending metrics normally.
My development laptop becomes extremely slow whenever I run more than three Docker containers at the same time. It used to handle this workload easily but now it freezes frequently.
The Jenkins build server has run out of disk space again during the nightly batch jobs. We had to manually delete old build artifacts to get the pipelines running again this morning.
Users in the compliance team are unable to export their reports because the export button remains disabled for their accounts. The functionality was working correctly for them last week.
The Redis cache cluster is showing dangerously high memory usage and has started evicting important keys. Some API responses are noticeably slower than normal because of cache misses.
I keep getting certificate errors when trying to access various internal tools from the office network. The recent security certificate rollout appears to be causing these problems.
The latest production deployment got stuck halfway through the process. Some users are seeing the new version while others continue to see the old version causing inconsistent behavior.
Our main data pipeline responsible for daily business summaries is taking much longer to complete than usual. It used to finish within forty minutes but now runs for over three hours.
The global search functionality on the admin panel returns no results even when I know the specific data records exist in the system. It was working correctly before the recent changes.
