G1GC is triggering frequent mixed pauses exceeding 800ms during end-of-day batch processing. JFR shows humongous allocations from large CSV parsing bypassing the young generation. We need to tune -XX:G1HeapRegionSize, enable -XX:+UseStringDeduplication, and refactor the parser to use buffered streaming instead of loading full files into memory.

Metaspace is growing linearly and hitting java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Metaspace after 14 days of uptime. Heap dumps reveal dynamic proxy generation from a third-party SDK that creates new classes per request. We need to implement a proxy cache, set -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize, and request a fix from the vendor to reuse generated classes.

Direct memory exhaustion is causing OutOfMemoryError: Direct buffer memory in the Netty-based gateway. The maxDirectMemory limit is set to default, but TLS offloading and gRPC streaming are consuming off-heap buffers faster than the cleaner thread can reclaim them. We need to increase -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize, enable -Dio.netty.maxDirectMemory, and audit buffer release calls in custom handlers.

Safepoint pauses are spiking to 2.5s during peak trading hours. VM operations logs show Cleanup and Deoptimize taking excessive time due to high thread count and aggressive JIT compilation. We need to reduce -XX:CompileThreshold, enable -XX:+UseCountedLoopSafepoints, and cap the compiler thread pool to minimize stop-the-world events.

ZGC is failing to keep up with allocation rate during market open, causing allocation stalls and latency spikes. The heap is sized at 16GB but promotion rate exceeds concurrent marking throughput. We need to increase heap to 24GB, tune -XX:ZAllocationSpikeTolerance, and profile allocation hotspots to reduce short-lived object churn.

ThreadLocal memory leak is causing gradual heap growth in the payment routing service. Context objects are not being removed in finally blocks after request completion, retaining references to large transaction payloads. We need to enforce ThreadLocal.remove() in filters, add a leak detection interceptor, and migrate to scoped request attributes where possible.

JIT deoptimization storms are occurring after deploying a new pricing algorithm. The C2 compiler repeatedly compiles and deoptimizes a hot loop due to unstable branch profiling, causing CPU thrashing. We need to stabilize the code path, add -XX:CompileCommand=exclude for the problematic method temporarily, and refactor conditional logic to be more predictable.

String deduplication is disabled by default in our JDK 17 build, causing duplicate JSON payloads to consume 30% of old gen. Enabling -XX:+UseStringDeduplication reduced heap usage by 18% in staging. We need to roll this flag to production, monitor G1GC remark pauses, and validate no regression in string-heavy workloads.

Finalizer queue is backing up because a legacy JDBC driver relies on Object.finalize() for connection cleanup. The finalizer thread is saturated, delaying garbage collection and causing OOM. We need to replace the driver with a modern version, explicitly close resources in try-with-resources, and disable finalization with -XX:-Finalize after migration.

Classloader leak is preventing hot reloads in the development environment. A static cache in a utility class holds references to dynamically loaded classes, causing PermGen/Metaspace exhaustion after 5 redeployments. We need to clear static caches on context shutdown, use weak references for class metadata, and add a classloader leak detector to the test suite.

G1GC concurrent marking is failing to complete before the heap fills, triggering full GC pauses of 12+ seconds. The initiating heap occupancy percent is too high for our allocation pattern. We need to lower -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent to 35, increase concurrent GC threads, and reduce large object allocation rate in the reporting service.

Native memory tracking shows 4GB unaccounted for in the Other category. Async-profiler indicates glibc malloc fragmentation from native libraries used by the PDF generation module. We need to switch to jemalloc via LD_PRELOAD, enable -XX:NativeMemoryTracking=detail, and audit native buffer allocations in the rendering pipeline.

JVM is failing to release memory back to the OS after traffic drops, causing container OOM kills despite low heap usage. G1GC doesn't uncommit memory aggressively enough. We need to enable -XX:+UseDynamicNumberOfGCThreads, set -XX:MinHeapFreeRatio, and configure container-aware JVM flags to respect cgroup limits.

Allocation profiling reveals 60% of young gen allocations come from java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter creating temporary objects per request. We need to cache formatters statically, switch to Instant where possible, and use ThreadLocal for non-thread-safe formatters to reduce GC pressure.

Shenandoah GC is causing application threads to stall during concurrent root scanning. The pause times are acceptable but throughput dropped by 25% due to read barriers. We need to evaluate if Shenandoah fits our latency profile, tune -XX:ShenandoahGCHeuristics, or revert to G1GC with optimized region sizing.

JVM crash logs show SIGSEGV in libjvm.so during JIT compilation of a recursive tree traversal method. The compiler stack overflows due to deep inlining. We need to add -XX:MaxInlineLevel=15, refactor the recursion to iteration, and exclude the method from aggressive compilation until patched.

Heap dump analysis shows ConcurrentHashMap nodes retaining 2GB of stale cache entries. The cache lacks eviction policy and TTL, causing unbounded growth. We need to switch to Caffeine with size-based eviction, implement background cleanup, and add cache metrics to the monitoring dashboard.

JFR event streaming is causing 8% CPU overhead in production due to high-frequency allocation profiling. We need to disable jdk.ObjectAllocationInNewTLAB in continuous profiling, reduce sampling rate, and switch to async-profiler for on-demand allocation analysis instead of always-on JFR.

G1GC is spending 40% of time in remark phase due to high reference processing overhead. Weak references from a third-party metrics library are delaying collection. We need to upgrade the library, tune -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent, and audit reference-heavy data structures.

JVM is failing to start in the CI environment with Could not reserve enough space for object heap. The runner cgroup memory limit is 2GB but JVM requests 3GB due to hardcoded -Xmx. We need to enable -XX:+UseContainerSupport, remove explicit heap flags, and let the JVM auto-size based on container limits.

Direct ByteBuffer allocation is failing under load because the cleaner thread is blocked on a slow filesystem sync. This causes OutOfMemoryError: Direct buffer memory despite available heap. We need to decouple buffer allocation from disk I/O, use pooled buffers, and increase cleaner thread priority.

JVM thread stack size is too small for deep recursive JSON parsing, causing StackOverflowError on complex payloads. Default -Xss1m is insufficient. We need to increase to -Xss2m, refactor the parser to use iterative approaches, and add payload depth validation at the gateway.

G1GC evacuation failures are occurring during traffic spikes, falling back to serial full GC. The heap is fragmented and survivor spaces are undersized. We need to increase -XX:G1ReservePercent, tune -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis, and reduce allocation burst rate in the event ingestion service.

JVM is leaking file descriptors because ZipFile instances from JAR scanning aren't closed during dynamic plugin loading. We hit Too many open files after 3 days. We need to wrap plugin loaders in try-with-resources, implement a plugin cache, and add FD usage alerts to the health endpoint.

JIT compiler is generating suboptimal code for a hot financial calculation due to monomorphic call site invalidation. Interface dispatch is preventing inlining. We need to seal the implementation hierarchy, use @ForceInline judiciously, and profile with JMH to validate throughput gains.

JVM is failing to honor -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75 in Kubernetes, allocating beyond container limits and getting OOMKilled. The base image uses an older JDK without cgroup v2 support. We need to upgrade to JDK 17.0.9+, verify UseContainerSupport is active, and test memory boundaries in staging.

G1GC mixed pauses are dominated by code cache flushing. The code cache is full, causing frequent sweeps that stall application threads. We need to increase -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize, enable -XX:+UseCodeCacheFlushing, and audit dynamic proxy generation that bloats the cache.

JVM is experiencing long GC pauses due to large ThreadLocal maps retaining request context across async boundaries. Virtual threads inherit these maps, causing memory retention. We need to clear context before async handoff, use ScopedValue where available, and audit thread pool configurations.

Heap utilization shows 90% old gen occupancy with low promotion rate, indicating memory leak in long-lived caches. MAT analysis points to SoftReference cache that never releases under memory pressure. We need to switch to weak references with explicit eviction, implement size bounds, and add cache health metrics.

JVM startup time exceeds 45 seconds due to extensive classpath scanning and annotation processing. We need to enable CDS (Class Data Sharing), switch to explicit component scanning packages, and precompute reflection metadata to meet the 15-second cold start SLA.

Concurrent modification exception is thrown in ArrayList during parallel stream processing because the collection isn't thread-safe. We need to switch to CopyOnWriteArrayList or collect to a concurrent structure, and add thread-safety linting to the CI pipeline.

Thread pool exhaustion in ForkJoinPool.commonPool() is causing async tasks to queue indefinitely. CPU-intensive tasks are blocking I/O-bound workloads. We need to create dedicated executors per workload type, configure queue bounds, and implement backpressure propagation.

Deadlock detected between ReentrantLock in the cache manager and synchronized block in the metrics collector. Thread dumps show circular wait during high contention. We need to enforce lock ordering, replace intrinsic locks with ReentrantLock with timeout, and add deadlock detection to the health check.

CompletableFuture chain is leaking threads because exceptions aren't handled with exceptionally(), causing worker threads to hang on uncaught errors. We need to add global exception handlers, implement timeout wrappers, and audit all async chains for proper error propagation.

Virtual threads are pinning to carrier threads during blocking JDBC calls, defeating the scalability benefits of Project Loom. We need to wrap blocking calls with Thread.startVirtualThread(), switch to async drivers where possible, and monitor pinned thread metrics via JFR.

Race condition in double-checked locking for lazy initialization is causing partially constructed objects to be published. The field lacks volatile modifier. We need to add volatile, switch to AtomicReference, or use initialization-on-demand holder pattern to guarantee safe publication.

ThreadLocal context is lost when tasks are submitted to ThreadPoolExecutor, causing MDC logging and security context to drop. We need to implement TaskDecorator to propagate context, wrap executors with context-aware delegates, and validate context continuity in integration tests.

CountDownLatch is causing thread starvation because a failed task never calls countDown(), blocking the main thread indefinitely. We need to wrap latch operations in try-finally, implement timeout-based await, and add circuit breakers for dependent task chains.

ConcurrentHashMap computeIfAbsent is causing thread contention and CPU spikes due to blocking lambda execution. The lambda performs remote calls, holding segment locks. We need to precompute values, use putIfAbsent with explicit locking, or switch to async cache loading with Caffeine.

ScheduledExecutorService is leaking threads because scheduled tasks throw unhandled exceptions, causing the executor to silently stop scheduling. We need to wrap runnables with exception catchers, implement a monitoring hook, and add alerting for executor health.

Thread pool queue is unbounded, causing OOM when downstream service degrades and tasks accumulate. We need to switch to ArrayBlockingQueue with capacity limits, implement caller-runs rejection policy, and add queue depth metrics to the dashboard.

StampedLock optimistic read is failing validation too frequently under write-heavy load, causing fallback to write lock and throughput collapse. We need to switch to ReadWriteLock, reduce write contention via partitioning, and validate lock strategy with JMH benchmarks.

Async context propagation is breaking across Kafka consumer threads because the tracing library doesn't instrument the poll loop. Spans are disconnected, breaking distributed traces. We need to enable Kafka client instrumentation, manually inject context in listeners, and validate trace continuity.

Thread interruption is ignored in a long-running CSV export loop, causing graceful shutdown to hang for 60 seconds. We need to check Thread.interrupted() in the loop, close resources on interrupt, and implement cooperative cancellation in batch processors.

Phaser is causing thread starvation because parties aren't deregistered after task completion, causing subsequent phases to wait indefinitely. We need to call arriveAndDeregister(), implement timeout-based phase advancement, and add phaser state monitoring.

Exchanger is blocking threads because paired tasks complete at different rates, causing one side to wait indefinitely. We need to switch to SynchronousQueue with timeout, implement buffer-based handoff, and validate producer-consumer balance.

Thread factory is creating non-daemon threads, preventing JVM shutdown when the main thread exits. We need to configure setDaemon(true), implement a shutdown hook to interrupt workers, and audit thread creation across the codebase.

Lock contention on AtomicLong sequence generator is causing CPU cache line bouncing under high concurrency. We need to switch to LongAdder, implement striped counters, or use database sequences for distributed ordering.

CompletableFuture.allOf() is masking individual task failures because exceptions aren't unwrapped, causing silent data corruption. We need to implement join() with exception handling, aggregate errors explicitly, and add failure reporting to the async pipeline.

Thread pool core size is too low for I/O-bound workload, causing unnecessary queuing and latency spikes. We need to size pools based on N_threads = N_cpu * U_cpu * (1 + W/C), implement dynamic sizing, and validate with load testing.

RecursiveTask in ForkJoinPool is causing stack overflow because the split threshold is too small, creating excessive subtasks. We need to increase threshold, switch to iterative decomposition, and monitor fork-join queue depth.

ThreadLocalRandom is being seeded incorrectly in a custom thread pool, causing predictable random values in security-sensitive token generation. We need to use SecureRandom for crypto, validate seeding strategy, and add entropy monitoring.

BlockingQueue poll() with timeout is causing busy-waiting because the timeout is set to 1ms, spinning the CPU. We need to increase timeout to 100ms, switch to take() with interrupt handling, and profile CPU usage in consumer loops.

Thread context classloader is mismatched in OSGi-like plugin environment, causing ClassNotFoundException during dynamic service loading. We need to set TCCL explicitly before reflection calls, implement a classloader hierarchy, and validate plugin isolation.

CyclicBarrier is causing deadlock because one thread throws an exception before reaching the barrier, leaving others waiting forever. We need to implement barrier timeout, handle BrokenBarrierException, and add fallback coordination logic.

Thread pool rejection handler is logging and dropping tasks, causing silent data loss during traffic spikes. We need to implement persistent queue fallback, add backpressure to upstream, and alert on rejection rate thresholds.

Virtual thread scheduler is starving platform threads because too many blocking calls pin carriers, degrading overall throughput. We need to audit blocking APIs, wrap them with runVirtualThread, and monitor carrier thread utilization via JFR.

Thread dump analysis shows 200 threads blocked on sun.misc.Unsafe.park() waiting for a single monitor held by a slow database call. We need to implement connection timeout, add circuit breaker, and reduce lock scope around I/O operations.

CompletableFuture.thenCombine() is executing on the wrong executor, causing thread pool cross-contamination and priority inversion. We need to explicitly pass executors to async stages, isolate critical path pools, and validate execution context in tests.

Thread starvation in Tomcat connector is causing 503 errors because keep-alive connections aren't timing out, holding threads idle. We need to reduce connectionTimeout, implement max keep-alive requests, and monitor thread pool utilization.

AtomicReference update loop is causing livelock under high contention because CAS failures retry immediately without backoff. We need to implement exponential backoff, switch to LongAdder for counters, or use striped locks.

Thread group is preventing garbage collection of terminated threads because references are retained in the group's internal array. We need to avoid custom thread groups, use executor services, and monitor thread lifecycle metrics.

Spring Bean creation is failing with BeanCurrentlyInCreationException due to circular dependency between PaymentService and AuditLogger. Constructor injection enforces strict ordering. We need to refactor to event-driven audit logging, use @Lazy on one dependency, or extract a shared interface.

Spring Boot auto-configuration is loading unwanted starters because spring.factories isn't filtered correctly, increasing startup time and memory footprint. We need to use @SpringBootApplication(exclude=...), implement conditional imports, and audit transitive starter dependencies.

Property binding is failing silently for nested configuration objects because fields lack setters or @ConstructorBinding. Default values are used instead of env vars. We need to enable spring.config.import, use records with constructor binding, and add configuration validation tests.

Spring AOP proxy is bypassing @Transactional because the method is called internally within the same class, avoiding the proxy. We need to refactor to separate beans, use AopContext.currentProxy(), or enable AspectJ compile-time weaving.

Actuator health endpoint is returning UP despite database connection pool exhaustion because the health indicator lacks connection validation. We need to implement custom HealthIndicator, add pool metrics to the response, and configure liveness/readiness probes correctly.

Spring Cloud Gateway is dropping requests under load because the Netty event loop threads are blocked by synchronous filter logic. We need to refactor filters to reactive chains, offload blocking calls to bounded elastic scheduler, and monitor event loop utilization.

@ConfigurationProperties isn't reloading when Config Server updates because @RefreshScope is missing on the bean. Services use stale configuration until restart. We need to add @RefreshScope, implement config change listeners, and validate refresh behavior in integration tests.

Spring Boot devtools is causing classloader leaks in containerized environments because restart triggers aren't disabled. We need to set spring.devtools.restart.enabled=false in Docker, exclude devtools from production builds, and audit profile-specific dependencies.

Feign client is failing with RetryableException because the error decoder doesn't distinguish between retryable and non-retryable HTTP status codes. We need to implement custom ErrorDecoder, configure retry policies per endpoint, and add circuit breaker integration.

Spring Security filter chain is executing twice because @EnableWebSecurity is declared in multiple configuration classes, causing duplicate authentication attempts. We need to consolidate security config, use SecurityFilterChain beans, and validate filter ordering.

@Async methods are running on the main thread because @EnableAsync is missing from the configuration class. Tasks execute synchronously, blocking request threads. We need to add the annotation, configure a dedicated executor, and add async execution validation tests.

Spring Boot fat JAR is failing to start because nested JARs contain conflicting META-INF/services files, breaking SPI loading. We need to use spring-boot-maven-plugin with proper transformers, implement service file merging, and validate classpath at build time.

RestTemplate is leaking connections because CloseableHttpClient isn't configured with connection eviction policy. We need to switch to WebClient, implement HttpClientConnectionManager with idle timeout, and add connection pool metrics.

Spring Data Redis is throwing SerializationException because the default JDK serializer is used instead of JSON. Cache entries are unreadable after service restart. We need to configure RedisTemplate with Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer, implement versioned payloads, and add serialization tests.

@Scheduled tasks are running concurrently because fixedDelay isn't waiting for previous execution to complete, causing duplicate processing. We need to add @EnableScheduling with single-thread executor, implement distributed locks, or switch to fixedRate with overlap prevention.

Spring Boot graceful shutdown is timing out because active requests aren't completing within the 30s window. We need to increase server.shutdown.grace-period, implement request draining, and add shutdown hooks to cancel long-running tasks.

Component scanning is picking up test classes in production because @SpringBootTest configuration leaks into main source set. We need to enforce package separation, exclude test packages from scanning, and validate classpath boundaries in CI.

Spring Cloud Stream binder is creating duplicate consumer groups because group property isn't set, causing message fan-out instead of competing consumers. We need to configure explicit consumer groups, validate partition assignment, and add consumer lag monitoring.

@Transactional propagation is causing unexpected rollbacks because nested transactions use REQUIRED instead of REQUIRES_NEW, rolling back independent operations. We need to adjust propagation levels, implement savepoints, and add transaction boundary tests.

Spring Boot Actuator metrics are missing because Micrometer registry isn't configured for Prometheus. The /actuator/prometheus endpoint returns 404. We need to add micrometer-registry-prometheus, enable the endpoint, and validate scrape configuration.

@Value annotation is failing to resolve placeholders because property sources are loaded in wrong order. Environment variables are overridden by application.yml. We need to adjust spring.config.import order, use @ConfigurationProperties instead, and add property resolution tests.

Spring WebFlux is blocking event loop because block() is called on Mono/Flux in reactive pipeline. This defeats non-blocking architecture and causes thread starvation. We need to refactor to fully reactive chains, use subscribeOn(boundedElastic()) for unavoidable blocking, and add BlockHound to CI.

@Cacheable isn't working because Spring Cache proxy isn't applied to public methods only, or cache manager isn't configured. We need to verify proxy mode, configure CacheManager bean, and add cache hit/miss metrics to validate behavior.

Spring Boot banner is slowing down startup in serverless environment because it reads classpath resources unnecessarily. We need to disable banner with spring.main.banner-mode=off, minimize startup logging, and optimize cold start path.

@RestControllerAdvice isn't catching exceptions from async controllers because DeferredResult or CompletableFuture exceptions bypass the advice. We need to implement AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler, wrap async returns, and add global async error handling.

Spring Data JPA repository is generating inefficient queries because method name parsing creates cartesian joins. We need to use @Query with explicit joins, enable SQL logging, and add query plan validation to the test suite.

@Profile annotation isn't filtering beans correctly because active profiles are set after context initialization. We need to set profiles via spring.profiles.active early, use @ConditionalOnProperty, and validate profile activation in startup logs.

Spring Cloud Config client is failing to decrypt properties because JCE unlimited strength policy isn't installed in the base image. We need to upgrade to JDK with built-in unlimited crypto, configure decryption keys properly, and add crypto validation tests.

@EventListener is processing events synchronously, blocking the publisher thread and causing latency spikes. We need to add @Async to listeners, implement event bus with dedicated executor, and validate async event processing.

Spring Boot admin client is failing to register because management port differs from application port and firewall blocks it. We need to align ports, configure management.server.port, and validate network accessibility in deployment pipeline.

@Validated isn't triggering constraint validation because method-level validation isn't enabled. We need to add MethodValidationPostProcessor, use @Valid on parameters, and add validation integration tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway route predicates are matching incorrectly because path patterns overlap and order isn't specified. Requests route to wrong microservices. We need to set explicit route order, use specific predicates, and add route validation tests.

@Import is loading configuration classes multiple times because of transitive imports, causing bean definition overrides. We need to consolidate imports, use @ConditionalOnMissingBean, and enable spring.main.allow-bean-definition-overriding=false to catch conflicts.

Spring Boot startup is failing with PortAlreadyInUseException because previous instance didn't shut down cleanly in Kubernetes. We need to implement preStop hook, add port conflict detection, and configure liveness probe to kill stuck pods.

@TransactionalEventListener isn't firing because the transaction commits before the event is published, or phase is misconfigured. We need to set phase=AFTER_COMMIT, validate transaction boundaries, and add event delivery tests.

Spring Data MongoDB is throwing MappingException because entity classes lack no-arg constructor or use final fields. We need to add protected constructors, remove final modifiers, or switch to Kotlin data classes with plugin support.

@Configuration class is being proxied with CGLIB but contains final methods, causing IllegalArgumentException. We need to remove final modifiers, switch to interface-based proxies, or use @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false).

Spring Cloud Sleuth is adding excessive overhead because trace sampling rate is 100% in production. We need to reduce to 10%, implement adaptive sampling, and validate tracing performance impact under load.

@DependsOn isn't guaranteeing initialization order because bean lifecycle is complex and circular references exist. We need to refactor to explicit initialization, use SmartLifecycle, and add startup sequence validation.

Spring Boot is failing to parse YAML because of tab characters or invalid indentation. The parser throws ScannerException. We need to enforce spaces-only YAML, add linting to CI, and validate configuration files before deployment.

@Retryable isn't working because Spring AOP proxy isn't applied or retry interceptor isn't configured. We need to add @EnableRetry, configure retry policies, and add retry metrics to monitor effectiveness.

Spring Data Elasticsearch is failing because client version mismatches cluster version, causing protocol incompatibility. We need to align versions, use REST client instead of transport, and add compatibility validation to CI.

@Primary annotation is causing unexpected bean injection because multiple candidates exist and priority isn't clear. We need to use @Qualifier, refactor to explicit wiring, and add dependency injection validation tests.

Spring Boot is loading logback.xml from wrong location because classpath ordering changed after dependency update. Logging configuration is ignored. We need to specify logging.config explicitly, validate config loading, and add logging integration tests.

@Scheduled cron expression is invalid because of timezone mismatch or syntax error, causing tasks to never execute. We need to validate cron syntax, set explicit timezone, and add scheduler health monitoring.

Spring Cloud Kubernetes isn't detecting config map changes because RBAC permissions are missing for watch operations. We need to grant watch permission, enable spring.cloud.kubernetes.reload.enabled, and validate config sync.

@Bean method is returning null because factory logic fails silently, causing NullPointerException on injection. We need to add null checks, throw explicit exceptions on failure, and add bean creation validation tests.

Spring Boot is failing to start because spring.factories contains invalid class references after shading. We need to configure maven-shade-plugin transformers properly, validate service files, and add classpath integrity checks.

@Async executor isn't configured, causing tasks to run on SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor which creates new thread per task, leading to thread exhaustion. We need to define ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean, configure bounds, and monitor thread creation rate.

Spring Data JPA is fetching lazy collections outside transaction, causing LazyInitializationException. We need to use JOIN FETCH, enable OpenEntityManagerInView (with caution), or implement DTO projections to avoid lazy loading.

@ConditionalOnProperty isn't evaluating correctly because property name uses camelCase instead of kebab-case. Spring Boot normalizes properties differently. We need to use kebab-case in conditions, validate property binding, and add conditional bean tests.

Spring Boot is exposing sensitive actuator endpoints because security isn't configured for management port. We need to secure actuator with Spring Security, restrict access via network policies, and audit endpoint exposure.

@CacheEvict isn't removing entries because key expression doesn't match cache put key. Cache becomes stale. We need to align key expressions, use allEntries=true where appropriate, and add cache consistency tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway is failing TLS handshake because client certificate isn't trusted by the gateway's truststore. We need to import CA cert, configure ssl.trust-store, and validate mTLS chain in staging.

@Transactional timeout isn't enforced because database driver doesn't support query timeout or transaction manager isn't configured. We need to set defaultTimeout, configure driver timeout, and add transaction duration monitoring.

Spring Boot is failing to bind List<String> from environment variables because syntax isn't comma-separated or indexed. We need to use SPRING_LIST_0=value format, validate binding, and add configuration parsing tests.

@EnableScheduling is creating multiple scheduler instances because configuration is imported multiple times. Tasks run duplicated. We need to consolidate scheduling config, use @ConditionalOnMissingBean, and validate scheduler singleton.

Spring Data Redis pipeline is failing because connection isn't returned to pool after execution, causing exhaustion. We need to use RedisCallback with proper resource management, implement try-with-resources, and monitor connection lifecycle.

@RestController is returning XML instead of JSON because Jackson isn't on classpath or content negotiation prefers XML. We need to add jackson-databind, configure HttpMessageConverters, and validate content type in tests.

Spring Cloud Config is failing to decrypt because cipher algorithm mismatch between client and server. We need to align encrypt.key configuration, validate crypto provider, and add decryption integration tests.

@Valid isn't cascading validation to nested objects because @Valid is missing on nested field. Invalid data persists. We need to add @Valid annotations, enable recursive validation, and add nested validation tests.

Spring Boot is failing to start because server.port is overridden by random port in tests, causing port conflicts in CI. We need to isolate test ports, use @DynamicPort, and validate port allocation strategy.

@EventListener is receiving duplicate events because multiple application contexts are publishing to same bus. We need to isolate event buses per context, use application-specific event types, and validate event routing.

Spring Data JPA batch inserts are falling back to single inserts because rewriteBatchedStatements isn't enabled in JDBC URL. Performance degrades 10x. We need to add JDBC parameter, validate batch execution, and monitor insert throughput.

@ConfigurationProperties validation isn't failing on invalid values because @Validated is missing on the class. Invalid config loads silently. We need to add annotation, implement constraint validators, and add config validation tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway is dropping WebSocket connections because upgrade headers aren't forwarded correctly. We need to configure WebSocketRoutingFilter, validate header propagation, and add WebSocket integration tests.
@Transactional is causing connection leak because exception is caught and swallowed, preventing rollback. We need to rethrow exceptions, configure rollback rules, and add transaction monitoring.

Spring Boot is failing to resolve @Value from Kubernetes secrets because property source isn't mounted correctly. We need to configure volume mounts, validate secret injection, and add secret resolution tests.
@Cacheable is caching null values because unless=''#result == null' isn't specified, causing cache pollution. We need to add condition, implement null object pattern, and validate cache content.
Spring Data MongoDB aggregation pipeline is failing because $lookup stage exceeds memory limit. We need to add allowDiskUse=true, optimize pipeline stages, and monitor aggregation memory usage.

@Async methods aren't propagating security context because SecurityContextHolder strategy is MODE_THREADLOCAL. We need to switch to MODE_INHERITABLETHREADLOCAL or use DelegatingSecurityContextAsyncTaskExecutor.

Spring Boot is failing to start because spring.main.web-application-type is misconfigured, causing servlet context initialization failure. We need to set correct type, validate auto-configuration, and add startup validation tests.
@Scheduled tasks are overlapping because execution time exceeds interval, causing concurrent runs. We need to implement @SchedulerLock, switch to fixedDelay, and add execution duration monitoring.

Spring Cloud Stream is failing to deserialize messages because content-type header is missing or mismatched. We need to configure spring.cloud.stream.bindings.*.content-type, validate message headers, and add deserialization tests.

@Transactional propagation NESTED isn't supported by JPA transaction manager, causing TransactionException. We need to switch to REQUIRES_NEW, use JDBC transaction manager, or implement savepoints manually.

Spring Boot is failing to load application.yml because file encoding isn't UTF-8, causing parser errors. We need to enforce UTF-8 encoding, add file validation to CI, and document configuration standards.

@CachePut is executing even when method throws exception because condition isn't checking result status. We need to add condition=''#result != null', implement error-aware caching, and validate cache behavior on failure.

Spring Data Elasticsearch is failing because index mapping isn't created automatically and @Document annotations are ignored. We need to enable createIndex=true, validate mapping sync, and add index initialization tests.

@EnableWebMvc is disabling Spring Boot auto-configuration, causing missing message converters and static resource handling. We need to remove annotation, use WebMvcConfigurer instead, and validate MVC configuration.
Spring Cloud Config is failing to refresh because /actuator/refresh isn't exposed or secured. We need to enable endpoint, configure security, and validate refresh workflow in CI/CD.

@Transactional is causing deadlock because multiple transactions acquire locks in different order. We need to enforce consistent lock ordering, reduce transaction scope, and add deadlock detection monitoring.

Spring Boot is failing to start because logback-spring.xml references undefined property, causing initialization failure. We need to define properties, add fallback configuration, and validate logging setup.

@Async executor is rejecting tasks because queue is full and rejection policy isn't configured, causing RejectedExecutionException. We need to increase queue capacity, implement caller-runs policy, and add rejection metrics.

Spring Data JPA is generating SELECT N+1 queries because @OneToMany isn't configured with FetchType.LAZY or entity graphs aren't used. We need to optimize fetch strategy, enable SQL logging, and add query count assertions in tests.

@Configuration class is being instantiated multiple times because it's not marked as @Configuration or proxying is disabled. Bean definitions are duplicated. We need to add annotation, enable proxy bean methods, and validate singleton scope.
Spring Cloud Gateway is failing to route because URI scheme isn't lb:// for load-balanced services. We need to configure service discovery, validate URI format, and add route resolution tests.

@Validated group validation isn't working because groups aren't specified in @Validated annotation. Constraints are ignored. We need to specify groups, implement group sequences, and add group validation tests.

Spring Boot is failing to bind Map<String, Object> from YAML because nested structure isn't compatible with target type. We need to use @ConfigurationProperties with proper generics, validate binding, and add map parsing tests.
@EventListener is blocking publisher thread because listener executes long-running I/O synchronously. We need to add @Async, implement event queue, and validate async listener execution.

Spring Data Redis is failing because serializer isn't configured for key type, causing ClassCastException. We need to configure RedisSerializer<String> for keys, validate serialization, and add type safety tests.

@Transactional is causing performance degradation because transaction spans entire method including external API calls. We need to reduce transaction scope, move I/O outside transaction, and add transaction duration monitoring.

Spring Cloud Kubernetes is failing to discover services because namespace isn't configured correctly. We need to set spring.cloud.kubernetes.discovery.namespaces, validate RBAC, and add service discovery tests.
@Cacheable is causing memory leak because cache isn't bounded and entries never expire. We need to configure Caffeine with max size and TTL, implement eviction policy, and add cache size monitoring.

Spring Boot is failing to start because spring.factories contains duplicate entries after merging dependencies. We need to deduplicate service files, configure build plugin transformers, and validate classpath integrity.

@Scheduled isn't respecting timezone because zone attribute isn't set, causing tasks to run at wrong time in different regions. We need to specify timezone, validate cron execution, and add scheduler timezone tests.
Spring Data JPA is failing to persist entity because @GeneratedValue strategy mismatches database dialect. We need to align strategy with DB, validate ID generation, and add persistence tests.

@Async isn't working because proxy target class isn't enabled and interface isn't used. Methods execute synchronously. We need to enable proxyTargetClass=true, use interfaces, and validate async execution.

Spring Cloud Config is failing to load profile-specific files because naming convention isn't followed. We need to use application-{profile}.yml, validate file structure, and add config loading tests.
@Transactional is causing connection pool exhaustion because long-running transactions hold connections idle. We need to split transactions, implement timeout, and monitor connection hold time.

@CacheEvict isn't working because key expression uses wrong parameter name. Cache entries persist. We need to fix SpEL expression, validate eviction, and add cache consistency tests.
Spring Data MongoDB is failing because @Id field type mismatches database type, causing conversion errors. We need to align types, configure converters, and add ID mapping tests.
@EnableAspectJAutoProxy isn't detecting aspects because package scanning doesn't include aspect classes. We need to adjust component scan, validate aspect registration, and add AOP integration tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway is failing to forward headers because StripPrefix filter removes required path segments. We need to adjust filter order, validate header propagation, and add gateway routing tests.
@Transactional is causing OptimisticLockingFailureException because version field isn't incremented correctly. We need to add @Version, validate concurrency control, and add optimistic lock tests.

@Async methods are losing MDC context because thread local isn't propagated. We need to implement TaskDecorator, configure MDC propagation, and validate logging context in async flows.
Spring Data JPA is failing to delete entity because of foreign key constraint violation. We need to configure cascade delete, handle constraints explicitly, and add deletion tests.
@ConfigurationProperties isn't binding because prefix doesn't match property names. We need to align prefix, validate binding, and add property mapping tests.

Spring Cloud Stream is failing to acknowledge messages because listener container isn't configured for manual ack. We need to set ack-mode=MANUAL, implement ack logic, and validate message processing.

@Transactional is causing TransientDataAccessResourceException because connection is closed prematurely. We need to extend transaction scope, validate connection lifecycle, and add transaction boundary tests.

@EnableScheduling isn't working because @Scheduled methods are in non-Spring managed classes. We need to register beans, validate component scanning, and add scheduler registration tests.

@Transactional is causing CannotCreateTransactionException because datasource isn't configured correctly. We need to validate datasource properties, test connection, and add startup health checks.

@Async executor is creating too many threads because corePoolSize and maxPoolSize are misconfigured. We need to tune pool settings, implement queue bounds, and monitor thread creation.

Spring Data JPA is failing to delete because @OneToMany cascade isn't configured, leaving orphan records. We need to add orphanRemoval=true, validate cascade, and add deletion tests.
@ConfigurationProperties is binding sensitive data to logs because toString() isn't overridden. We need to exclude sensitive fields, implement secure toString, and add logging validation.
Spring Cloud Stream is failing to produce because serializer isn't configured for key type. We need to configure key serializer, validate types, and add producer tests.
@Transactional is causing ConcurrencyFailureException because database deadlock detection triggers rollback. We need to optimize lock ordering, reduce transaction scope, and add deadlock monitoring.

G1GC remark phase is exceeding 600ms during peak order processing due to high reference processing overhead from a third-party metrics SDK. We need to upgrade the SDK, tune -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent, and audit weak reference usage in telemetry collectors.

Angular change detection is running 40+ times per second on the dashboard because OnPush isn't applied to leaf components and async pipes are missing. CPU usage spikes to 85% on mid-tier laptops. We need to enforce ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, replace manual subscriptions with async pipes, and add CD cycle profiling to the performance suite.

Spring Boot @Transactional is causing connection pool exhaustion because external HTTP calls are made inside transaction boundaries, holding connections for 8+ seconds. We need to extract I/O outside transactions, implement circuit breakers, and add transaction duration monitoring.

Angular router is triggering full page reloads instead of client-side navigation because href is used instead of routerLink in dynamically rendered menu items. This breaks SPA state and increases server load. We need to audit template bindings, enforce routerLink via template linting, and add navigation integration tests.

Java ConcurrentHashMap.computeIfAbsent() is causing thread contention and CPU spikes because the mapping function performs blocking database calls while holding segment locks. We need to switch to explicit putIfAbsent with external locking, precompute values, or migrate to Caffeine's async loading cache.

Angular HTTP interceptor is duplicating auth tokens on retry because the error handler clones the request without clearing the existing Authorization header. This causes 401 loops and account lockouts. We need to strip headers before cloning, implement idempotent retry logic, and add interceptor unit tests.

JVM Metaspace is growing linearly and hitting OOM after 10 days due to dynamic proxy generation in a legacy SOAP client that creates new classes per endpoint call. We need to cache proxy instances, set -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=512m, and migrate to a modern REST client with static stubs.

Angular NgRx store is emitting stale state because selectors aren't memoized correctly and createSelector is called inline in components. This causes unnecessary re-renders and memory leaks. We need to extract selectors to standalone files, enforce memoization patterns, and add selector performance tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway is dropping WebSocket connections because the StripPrefix filter removes required path segments before the upgrade handshake. Traders lose real-time quote streams. We need to adjust filter ordering, exclude WebSocket routes from prefix stripping, and add upgrade validation tests.

Angular form validation is failing silently because Validators.required is applied to a disabled control, which Angular excludes from validation checks by default. Users submit incomplete KYC data. We need to switch to AbstractControl status checks, enforce validation on disabled fields, and add form submission tests.

Java ThreadLocal context is lost when tasks are submitted to ThreadPoolExecutor, causing MDC logging and security principal to drop in async audit trails. We need to implement a TaskDecorator that propagates context, wrap executors with context-aware delegates, and validate context continuity in integration tests.

Angular build is failing with NG8001: 'app-chart' is not a known element after upgrading to standalone components because the module imports weren't migrated to component imports arrays. We need to audit component dependencies, update standalone metadata, and add build validation to CI.

JVM direct memory is exhausting during TLS handshake bursts because Netty's PooledByteBufAllocator isn't releasing buffers after failed connections. We see OutOfMemoryError: Direct buffer memory. We need to enable -Dio.netty.leakDetection.level=PARANOID in staging, audit buffer release calls, and configure allocator bounds.

Angular *ngFor is causing DOM thrashing because trackBy isn't implemented and the list reference changes on every API poll. The browser hangs during market open. We need to add trackBy functions, switch to signals for immutable updates, and add render performance benchmarks.

Spring Data JPA is generating N+1 queries because @OneToMany associations default to EAGER fetch in legacy entities. Response times exceed 5s for portfolio endpoints. We need to switch to LAZY fetching, implement @EntityGraph for critical paths, and add query count assertions to the test suite.

Angular SSR hydration is failing with NG0500: Mismatched node IDs because the server renders dynamic dates without timezone normalization, causing client-side DOM mismatch. We need to use UTC timestamps for SSR, implement provideClientHydration() with suppress warnings, and add hydration parity tests.

Java CompletableFuture.allOf() is masking individual task failures because exceptions aren't unwrapped, causing silent data corruption in batch settlement. We need to implement join() with explicit exception aggregation, add failure reporting to the async pipeline, and validate error propagation.

Angular route guards are executing twice because CanActivate is applied at both parent and child routes without runGuardsAndResolvers: 'pathParamsChange'. This doubles auth API calls and increases latency. We need to consolidate guard logic, configure resolver execution strategy, and add guard profiling.

JVM safepoint pauses are spiking to 3s during end-of-day reconciliation due to aggressive JIT inlining of a recursive pricing algorithm. We need to add -XX:MaxInlineLevel=12, refactor recursion to iteration, and exclude the method from C2 compilation until stabilized.

Angular HttpClient is leaking subscriptions because components call .subscribe() without takeUntilDestroyed or async pipe, causing memory growth and duplicate API calls. We need to enforce reactive patterns, add RxJS lint rules to CI, and audit component lifecycles.

Spring Boot Actuator health endpoint returns UP despite Redis cluster partition because the health indicator only pings a single node. Cache failures go undetected. We need to implement cluster-aware health checks, validate quorum status, and add dependency failure simulation tests.

Angular material table is rendering blank rows because MatTableDataSource isn't updated immutably and change detection misses the reference change. We need to reassign dataSource.data = [...newData], switch to signal-based data binding, and add table render tests.

Java StampedLock optimistic reads are failing validation too frequently under write-heavy audit logging, causing fallback to exclusive locks and throughput collapse. We need to switch to ReadWriteLock, partition the audit writer, and validate lock strategy with JMH benchmarks.

Angular lazy-loaded modules are failing to load in production because chunk hashes mismatch after CDN cache invalidation, causing ChunkLoadError. Users see broken navigation. We need to implement retry logic in ErrorHandler, configure CDN cache-busting headers, and add chunk integrity validation.

Spring Cloud Stream consumer is processing duplicate messages because ack-mode is set to AUTO but the listener throws transient exceptions after partial processing. We need to switch to MANUAL ack, implement idempotent handlers with deduplication keys, and add message replay tests.

Angular ngModel two-way binding is causing expression changed after checked errors because the bound property is mutated in ngAfterViewInit. We need to defer updates to setTimeout or switch to reactive forms, enforce unidirectional data flow, and add CD error detection to CI.

Java ForkJoinPool.commonPool() is saturated by CPU-intensive risk calculations, blocking I/O-bound notification tasks. We need to create dedicated executors per workload type, configure queue bounds, and implement backpressure propagation to upstream services.

Angular i18n extraction is failing because custom pipes aren't marked with @Pipe({pure: true}), causing the compiler to skip translation markers. We need to audit pipe purity, run ng extract-i18n with strict mode, and add localization coverage tests.

JVM heap dump shows 4GB retained by SoftReference cache that never releases under memory pressure, causing frequent full GCs. We need to switch to Caffeine with size-based eviction, implement background cleanup, and add cache health metrics to Grafana.

Angular RouterLinkActive is incorrectly highlighting parent routes because routerLinkActiveOptions: {exact: true} isn't set. Users navigate to wrong dashboard tabs. We need to apply exact matching, audit route hierarchy, and add navigation state tests.

Spring Security filter chain is executing twice because @EnableWebSecurity is declared in multiple configuration classes, causing duplicate authentication attempts and session fixation warnings. We need to consolidate security config, use SecurityFilterChain beans, and validate filter ordering.

Angular ViewChild queries are returning undefined in unit tests because detectChanges() isn't called after component creation. We need to trigger CD in test setup, use fakeAsync with tick(), and add query validation to the test harness.

Java AtomicLong sequence generator is causing CPU cache line bouncing under high concurrency due to false sharing. We need to switch to LongAdder, implement striped counters, or use database sequences for distributed ordering.

Angular NgZone.runOutsideAngular() is misused for high-frequency canvas rendering, but event listeners still trigger CD because they aren't detached properly. We need to unbind listeners manually, use Renderer2 for DOM events, and add zone leak detection.

Spring Boot fat JAR fails to start because nested JARs contain conflicting META-INF/services files, breaking SPI loading for the PDF renderer. We need to configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with ServicesResourceTransformer, validate classpath at build time, and add startup integration tests.

Angular FormControl valueChanges is emitting duplicate events because updateOn: 'blur' isn't configured and input events fire on every keystroke. This overloads the validation API. We need to set update triggers, debounce with rxjs, and add form performance tests.

JVM thread stack size is too small for deep recursive JSON parsing, causing StackOverflowError on complex compliance payloads. Default -Xss1m is insufficient. We need to increase to -Xss2m, refactor parser to iterative approach, and add payload depth validation at the gateway.

Angular HttpClient retry logic is causing thundering herd because all failed requests retry simultaneously without jitter. We need to implement exponential backoff with randomization, cap max retries, and add retry storm simulation tests.

Spring Data Redis is throwing SerializationException because default JDK serializer is used instead of JSON, making cache entries unreadable after service restart. We need to configure Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer, implement versioned payloads, and add serialization compatibility tests.

Angular *ngIf is causing layout shift because placeholder containers aren't reserving space, triggering CLS penalties on Lighthouse. We need to add skeleton loaders, use CSS contain: layout, and implement visual stability tests.

Java ScheduledExecutorService is leaking threads because scheduled tasks throw unhandled exceptions, causing the executor to silently stop scheduling. We need to wrap runnables with exception catchers, implement monitoring hooks, and add executor health alerts.

Angular provideRouter() is missing withInMemoryScrolling() configuration, causing page position to reset on back navigation. Users lose form context. We need to enable scroll restoration, validate navigation behavior, and add UX regression tests.

JVM G1GC evacuation failures are occurring during traffic spikes, falling back to serial full GC with 15s pauses. We need to increase -XX:G1ReservePercent, tune -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis, and reduce allocation burst rate in the event ingestion service.

Angular signal() updates are batching incorrectly because effect() is triggered synchronously during template rendering, causing ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError. We need to defer effects to microtask queue, audit signal dependencies, and add CD boundary tests.

Spring Cloud Config client is failing to decrypt properties because JCE unlimited strength policy isn't installed in the base image. We need to upgrade to JDK with built-in unlimited crypto, configure decryption keys properly, and add crypto validation tests.

Angular HttpClient interceptors are executing in wrong order because provideHttpClient() doesn't respect declaration sequence, causing auth tokens to be stripped before logging. We need to explicitly order interceptors, validate pipeline execution, and add interceptor chain tests.

Java Phaser is causing thread starvation because parties aren't deregistered after task completion, causing subsequent phases to wait indefinitely. We need to call arriveAndDeregister(), implement timeout-based phase advancement, and add phaser state monitoring.

Angular @HostListener('window:resize') is triggering excessive change detection because it runs inside NgZone. We need to run it outside zone, debounce with rxjs, and add resize handler performance tests.

Spring Boot graceful shutdown is timing out because active requests aren't completing within the 30s window. We need to increase server.shutdown.grace-period, implement request draining, and add shutdown hooks to cancel long-running tasks.

Angular NgOptimizedImage is failing to load because provideImgixLoader() isn't configured with the correct CDN base path. Images return 404. We need to fix loader configuration, validate image URLs, and add asset loading tests.

Java Exchanger is blocking threads because paired tasks complete at different rates, causing one side to wait indefinitely. We need to switch to SynchronousQueue with timeout, implement buffer-based handoff, and validate producer-consumer balance.

Angular ControlValueAccessor isn't propagating onTouched callbacks, causing form validation to miss blur events. We need to implement registerOnTouched, trigger it on host blur, and add custom control validation tests.

JVM is failing to honor -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75 in Kubernetes, allocating beyond container limits and getting OOMKilled. The base image uses an older JDK without cgroup v2 support. We need to upgrade to JDK 17.0.9+, verify UseContainerSupport is active, and test memory boundaries.

Angular router.navigate() is failing silently because relative path resolution uses wrong relativeTo snapshot. Users get stuck on error pages. We need to inject ActivatedRoute, validate navigation context, and add routing error handling.

Spring Data JPA batch inserts are falling back to single inserts because rewriteBatchedStatements=true isn't enabled in JDBC URL. Performance degrades 10x during month-end processing. We need to add JDBC parameter, validate batch execution, and monitor insert throughput.

Angular @defer blocks are triggering hydration mismatches because deferred content depends on client-only APIs like localStorage. We need to guard browser APIs with isPlatformBrowser(), add fallback content, and validate SSR/CSR parity.

Java ThreadFactory is creating non-daemon threads, preventing JVM shutdown when the main thread exits. We need to configure setDaemon(true), implement shutdown hooks to interrupt workers, and audit thread creation across the codebase.

Angular NgClass is causing style recalculation bottlenecks because object reference changes on every CD cycle. We need to memoize class objects, switch to signal-based bindings, and add style computation profiling.

Spring Cloud Gateway is failing TLS handshake because client certificate isn't trusted by the gateway's truststore. We need to import CA cert, configure ssl.trust-store, and validate mTLS chain in staging.

Angular inject() is failing in utility functions because it's called outside injection context. We need to pass Injector explicitly, use runInInjectionContext(), and add DI context validation to linting rules.

Java CompletableFuture.thenCombine() is executing on the wrong executor, causing thread pool cross-contamination and priority inversion. We need to explicitly pass executors to async stages, isolate critical path pools, and validate execution context in tests.

Angular HttpClient is sending OPTIONS preflight on every request because withCredentials: true is set without proper CORS headers on the backend. We need to align CORS configuration, cache preflight responses, and add network optimization tests.

JVM code cache is full, causing frequent sweeps that stall application threads during peak trading. We need to increase -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize=512m, enable -XX:+UseCodeCacheFlushing, and audit dynamic proxy generation that bloats the cache.

Angular @Input() setters are triggering expensive recalculations on every parent CD cycle because reference equality isn't checked. We need to implement OnChanges, add shallow comparison, and memoize derived state.

Spring Boot @Async methods are running on SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor which creates a new thread per task, leading to thread exhaustion under load. We need to define ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean, configure bounds, and monitor thread creation rate.

Angular TransferState isn't serializing custom objects correctly, causing hydration to drop complex payload types. We need to implement makeStateKey() with JSON serialization, validate state transfer, and add SSR state parity tests.

Java CountDownLatch is causing thread starvation because a failed task never calls countDown(), blocking the main thread indefinitely. We need to wrap latch operations in try-finally, implement timeout-based await, and add circuit breakers for dependent task chains.

Angular @angular/localize is failing at runtime because $localize isn't loaded in the polyfills bundle after CLI upgrade. We need to import @angular/localize/init, validate i18n bootstrap, and add localization smoke tests.

JVM native memory tracking shows 3GB unaccounted for in Other category. Async-profiler indicates glibc malloc fragmentation from native PDF rendering library. We need to switch to jemalloc via LD_PRELOAD, enable -XX:NativeMemoryTracking=detail, and audit native buffer allocations.

Angular router-outlet is destroying components on navigation because RouteReuseStrategy isn't implemented, causing expensive re-initialization. We need to cache component handles, validate reuse logic, and add navigation performance tests.

Spring Data MongoDB is throwing MappingException because entity classes lack no-arg constructor or use final fields. We need to add protected constructors, remove final modifiers, or switch to Kotlin data classes with plugin support.
Angular @HostBinding('class') is overriding template classes because host bindings merge incorrectly. We need to use ngClass in template, avoid host class conflicts, and add style isolation tests.

Java StampedLock write lock is causing thread starvation because readers continuously acquire optimistic locks, preventing writers from progressing. We need to switch to ReentrantReadWriteLock with fairness, implement writer priority, and validate throughput under contention.

Angular FormArray push operations are triggering full form validation because updateValueAndValidity() bubbles up synchronously. We need to pass {emitEvent: false}, batch updates, and add form performance benchmarks.

Spring Cloud Kubernetes isn't detecting config map changes because RBAC permissions are missing for watch operations. We need to grant watch permission, enable spring.cloud.kubernetes.reload.enabled, and validate config sync.

Angular @ViewChild({static: false}) is undefined in ngOnInit because query resolves after first CD. We need to move logic to ngAfterViewInit, use static: true where appropriate, and add lifecycle validation tests.

Java DirectByteBuffer allocation is failing under load because cleaner thread is blocked on slow filesystem sync. We need to decouple buffer allocation from disk I/O, use pooled buffers, and increase cleaner thread priority.

Angular HttpClient progress events are firing too frequently, causing UI jank during large file uploads. We need to throttle progress emissions with throttleTime(200), optimize progress rendering, and add upload UX tests.

Spring Boot @ConfigurationProperties isn't reloading when Config Server updates because @RefreshScope is missing on the bean. Services use stale configuration until restart. We need to add @RefreshScope, implement config change listeners, and validate refresh behavior.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop is causing memory leaks because drag references aren't destroyed when components are removed dynamically. We need to call DragDropRef.dispose(), audit dynamic list cleanup, and add memory profiling tests.

Java ConcurrentLinkedQueue is causing high CPU usage because polling threads spin-wait when queue is empty. We need to switch to LinkedBlockingQueue with take(), implement backoff strategy, and monitor thread states.

Angular @angular/pwa service worker is caching API responses incorrectly because dataGroups strategy is set to performance instead of freshness. Users see stale balances. We need to switch strategy, validate cache rules, and add SW update tests.

JVM startup time exceeds 45 seconds due to extensive classpath scanning and annotation processing. We need to enable CDS, switch to explicit component scanning packages, and precompute reflection metadata to meet cold start SLA.

Angular @angular/animations are causing layout thrashing because transform isn't used and top/left properties trigger reflow. We need to refactor to GPU-accelerated properties, disable animations in reduced-motion mode, and add animation performance tests.

Spring Data Elasticsearch is failing because client version mismatches cluster version, causing protocol incompatibility. We need to align versions, use REST client instead of transport, and add compatibility validation to CI.

Angular @angular/core signal computed() is recalculating unnecessarily because dependencies include non-signal values that change reference. We need to wrap dependencies in signals, stabilize references, and add computation tracing.

Java ThreadPoolExecutor queue is unbounded, causing OOM when downstream service degrades and tasks accumulate. We need to switch to ArrayBlockingQueue with capacity limits, implement caller-runs rejection policy, and add queue depth metrics.

Angular @angular/router preloading strategy is downloading all lazy chunks on slow networks, causing data cap exhaustion. We need to implement QuicklinkStrategy, respect saveData navigator flag, and add network-aware preloading tests.
JVM G1GC mixed pauses are dominated by code cache flushing. We need to increase -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize, enable -XX:+UseCodeCacheFlushing, and audit dynamic proxy generation that bloats the cache.

Angular @angular/forms async validators are triggering on every keystroke because updateOn isn't set to blur. This overloads the validation API. We need to configure update triggers, debounce requests, and add form validation tests.

Spring Boot @RestControllerAdvice isn't catching exceptions from async controllers because DeferredResult exceptions bypass the advice. We need to implement AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler, wrap async returns, and add global async error handling.

Angular @angular/cdk/table is rendering duplicate rows because trackBy returns non-unique IDs after data refresh. We need to generate stable identifiers, validate tracking function, and add table render integrity tests.

Java VirtualThread scheduler is starving platform threads because too many blocking JDBC calls pin carriers, degrading overall throughput. We need to audit blocking APIs, wrap them with runVirtualThread, and monitor carrier thread utilization via JFR.

Angular @angular/common DatePipe is using local timezone instead of UTC, causing timestamp mismatches in audit logs. We need to enforce UTC formatting, configure default timezone, and add date serialization tests.

Spring Cloud Stream binder is creating duplicate consumer groups because group property isn't set, causing message fan-out instead of competing consumers. We need to configure explicit consumer groups, validate partition assignment, and add consumer lag monitoring.

Angular @angular/platform-browser Title service isn't updating on route change because TitleStrategy isn't implemented. We need to provide custom strategy, sync titles with route data, and add metadata tests.

Java AtomicReference update loop is causing livelock under high contention because CAS failures retry immediately without backoff. We need to implement exponential backoff, switch to LongAdder for counters, or use striped locks.

Angular @angular/core ngOnDestroy isn't called for dynamically created components because ComponentRef.destroy() isn't invoked. We need to track dynamic references, implement cleanup hooks, and add lifecycle validation tests.

JVM is leaking file descriptors because ZipFile instances from JAR scanning aren't closed during dynamic plugin loading. We hit Too many open files after 3 days. We need to wrap plugin loaders in try-with-resources, implement plugin cache, and add FD usage alerts.

Angular @angular/router CanDeactivate guard is blocking navigation when form is pristine because dirty check logic is inverted. Users can't exit views. We need to fix condition, validate guard behavior, and add navigation flow tests.

Spring Boot @Value annotation is failing to resolve placeholders because property sources are loaded in wrong order. Environment variables are overridden by application.yml. We need to adjust spring.config.import order, use @ConfigurationProperties, and add property resolution tests.

Angular @angular/animations query() selector is failing because DOM elements are removed before animation completes. We need to use animateChild(), defer removal with done callback, and add animation lifecycle tests.

Java CompletableFuture chain is leaking threads because exceptions aren't handled with exceptionally(), causing worker threads to hang on uncaught errors. We need to add global exception handlers, implement timeout wrappers, and audit all async chains.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay is positioning dropdowns incorrectly inside scrollable containers because positionStrategy isn't connected to scrollable ancestor. We need to configure withScrollableParents(), validate positioning, and add overlay integration tests.

JVM thread dump shows 200 threads blocked on sun.misc.Unsafe.park() waiting for single monitor held by slow database call. We need to implement connection timeout, add circuit breaker, and reduce lock scope around I/O operations.

Angular @angular/forms FormGroup.reset() is clearing async validation state, causing stale errors to persist. We need to re-trigger validation after reset, implement state sync, and add form reset tests.

Spring Data JPA repository is generating inefficient queries because method name parsing creates cartesian joins. We need to use @Query with explicit joins, enable SQL logging, and add query plan validation to the test suite.

Angular @angular/core effect() is running during server-side rendering, causing localStorage access errors. We need to guard with isPlatformBrowser(), defer to afterNextRender(), and add SSR safety tests.

Java ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor is silently dropping tasks when queue is full because default rejection policy is AbortPolicy without logging. We need to implement custom RejectedExecutionHandler, add metrics, and alert on rejection rate.

Angular @angular/router scrollPositionRestoration isn't working because viewportScroller isn't configured with correct offset for fixed headers. We need to set setOffset(), validate scroll behavior, and add navigation UX tests.

JVM G1GC is spending 40% of time in remark phase due to high reference processing overhead. Weak references from third-party metrics library are delaying collection. We need to upgrade library, tune -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent, and audit reference-heavy structures.

Angular @angular/common NgPlural is rendering fallback case for all values because ICU message format isn't parsed correctly. We need to enable $localize ICU support, validate plural rules, and add i18n rendering tests.

Spring Boot @EnableScheduling is creating multiple scheduler instances because configuration is imported multiple times. Tasks run duplicated. We need to consolidate scheduling config, use @ConditionalOnMissingBean, and validate scheduler singleton.

Angular @angular/cdk/a11y FocusTrap is breaking keyboard navigation because it doesn't account for dynamically added modal content. We need to refresh focus trap after DOM updates, validate tab order, and add accessibility tests.

Java ThreadLocalRandom is being seeded incorrectly in custom thread pool, causing predictable random values in security-sensitive token generation. We need to use SecureRandom for crypto, validate seeding strategy, and add entropy monitoring.

Angular @angular/platform-server is failing to render because window is accessed in constructor instead of ngOnInit. We need to defer browser API calls, use isPlatformBrowser(), and add SSR compatibility linting.

JVM allocation profiling reveals 60% of young gen allocations come from java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter creating temporary objects per request. We need to cache formatters statically, switch to Instant where possible, and use ThreadLocal for non-thread-safe formatters.

Angular @angular/router data observable is emitting stale values because route reuse strategy caches component but doesn't refresh data resolver. We need to implement shouldReuseRoute logic, trigger data refresh, and add route data tests.
Spring Cloud Gateway is failing to route because URI scheme isn't lb:// for load-balanced services. We need to configure service discovery, validate URI format, and add route resolution tests.

Angular @angular/core @Input() transform function is throwing because null values aren't handled before coercion. We need to add null guards, use booleanAttribute/numberAttribute safely, and add input validation tests.

Java BlockingQueue.poll() with timeout is causing busy-waiting because timeout is set to 1ms, spinning the CPU. We need to increase timeout to 100ms, switch to take() with interrupt handling, and profile CPU usage in consumer loops.

Angular @angular/cdk/clipboard is failing in cross-origin iframes because browser blocks clipboard API without user gesture. We need to fallback to document.execCommand, add permission checks, and implement graceful degradation.

JVM Shenandoah GC is causing application threads to stall during concurrent root scanning. Pause times are acceptable but throughput dropped by 25% due to read barriers. We need to evaluate if Shenandoah fits our latency profile, tune heuristics, or revert to G1GC.

Angular @angular/forms Validators.pattern is failing because regex isn't anchored, allowing partial matches. Invalid data passes validation. We need to add ^ and $ anchors, validate regex behavior, and add pattern tests.

Spring Boot @Configuration class is being proxied with CGLIB but contains final methods, causing IllegalArgumentException. We need to remove final modifiers, switch to interface-based proxies, or use @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false).

Angular @angular/common CurrencyPipe is rounding incorrectly for JPY because default digits isn't overridden. We need to set digitsInfo: '1.0-0', validate currency formatting, and add localization tests.

Java CyclicBarrier is causing deadlock because one thread throws exception before reaching barrier, leaving others waiting forever. We need to implement barrier timeout, handle BrokenBarrierException, and add fallback coordination logic.

Angular @angular/router resolve is blocking navigation because resolver returns promise that never resolves on API timeout. We need to add timeout operator, implement fallback data, and add resolver error handling.

JVM is failing to release memory back to OS after traffic drops, causing container OOM kills despite low heap usage. G1GC doesn't uncommit memory aggressively enough. We need to enable -XX:+UseDynamicNumberOfGCThreads, set -XX:MinHeapFreeRatio, and configure container-aware flags.

Angular @angular/core @Output() is emitting during change detection, causing ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError. We need to defer emission to Promise.resolve().then(), validate event timing, and add CD boundary tests.

Spring Data Redis pipeline is failing because connection isn't returned to pool after execution, causing exhaustion. We need to use RedisCallback with proper resource management, implement try-with-resources, and monitor connection lifecycle.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop dropped event fires twice because event propagation isn't stopped and parent container also listens. We need to call event.stopPropagation(), validate event flow, and add drag-drop integration tests.

Java Thread interruption is ignored in long-running CSV export loop, causing graceful shutdown to hang for 60 seconds. We need to check Thread.interrupted() in loop, close resources on interrupt, and implement cooperative cancellation.

Angular @angular/platform-browser DomSanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml() is misused, exposing XSS vector because user input isn't stripped first. We need to sanitize with DOMPurify, remove bypass calls, and add security audit tests.

JVM JFR event streaming is causing 8% CPU overhead in production due to high-frequency allocation profiling. We need to disable jdk.ObjectAllocationInNewTLAB in continuous profiling, reduce sampling rate, and switch to async-profiler for on-demand analysis.

Angular @angular/router canMatch guard is preventing lazy module load because it returns false for valid segments. We need to fix segment matching logic, validate guard conditions, and add route matching tests.

Spring Boot @RestController is returning XML instead of JSON because Jackson isn't on classpath or content negotiation prefers XML. We need to add jackson-databind, configure HttpMessageConverters, and validate content type in tests.

Angular @angular/core inject() throws when called in class field initializer because injection context isn't available yet. We need to move to constructor or use Injector explicitly, validate DI timing, and add context linting.

Java ConcurrentModificationException is thrown in ArrayList during parallel stream processing because collection isn't thread-safe. We need to switch to CopyOnWriteArrayList or collect to concurrent structure, and add thread-safety linting to CI.

Angular @angular/cdk/table sticky headers are misaligned because position: sticky isn't supported in parent overflow container. We need to restructure DOM, use CSS grid fallback, and add layout compatibility tests.

JVM finalizer queue is backing up because legacy JDBC driver relies on Object.finalize() for connection cleanup. Finalizer thread is saturated, delaying GC. We need to replace driver, explicitly close resources, and disable finalization with -XX:-Finalize.

Angular @angular/forms AbstractControl.statusChanges isn't emitting when async validator completes because control is disabled. We need to enable control during validation, listen to valueChanges instead, and add status sync tests.
Spring Cloud Config is failing to refresh because /actuator/refresh isn't exposed or secured. We need to enable endpoint, configure security, and validate refresh workflow in CI/CD.

Angular @angular/core ng-template outlet context is losing type safety because $implicit isn't typed. We need to define context interface, use ngTemplateOutletContext with generics, and add template type checking.
