Java Lock contention on cache manager is causing CPU spikes because ReentrantLock isn't configured with fairness and threads starve. We need to enable fairness, implement read-write lock, and add contention monitoring.

Angular @angular/router NavigationEnd event fires before lazy module is fully initialized, causing analytics to track incomplete page views. We need to listen to ActivationEnd, defer tracking, and add navigation lifecycle tests.

JVM heap utilization shows 90% old gen occupancy with low promotion rate, indicating memory leak in long-lived caches. MAT analysis points to SoftReference cache that never releases. We need to switch to weak references with explicit eviction, implement size bounds, and add cache health metrics.
Angular @angular/cdk/overlay backdrop isn't blocking scroll because cdk-overlay-backdrop lacks position: fixed. We need to fix CSS, validate overlay behavior, and add modal interaction tests.

Spring Boot @Async executor isn't configured, causing tasks to run on SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor which creates new thread per task. We need to define ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean, configure bounds, and monitor thread creation rate.

Angular @angular/core @Directive host listeners are firing multiple times because directive is applied to element with structural directive that recreates DOM. We need to isolate host bindings, validate directive lifecycle, and add host event tests.

Java Phaser bulk registration is causing overflow because register() is called without matching arriveAndDeregister(). We need to audit registration lifecycle, implement bounds checking, and add phaser state validation.

Angular @angular/common AsyncPipe is unsubscribing prematurely because component is destroyed before observable emits, causing missing data on re-init. We need to use takeUntilDestroyed, validate subscription lifecycle, and add async rendering tests.

JVM string deduplication is disabled by default in JDK 17 build, causing duplicate JSON payloads to consume 30% of old gen. Enabling -XX:+UseStringDeduplication reduced heap by 18%. We need to roll flag to production, monitor G1GC remark pauses, and validate no regression.

Angular @angular/router params observable emits string arrays for single-value params because paramsInheritanceStrategy isn't configured. We need to parse params explicitly, validate type coercion, and add route param tests.
Spring Data JPA is failing to persist entity because @GeneratedValue strategy mismatches database dialect. We need to align strategy with DB, validate ID generation, and add persistence tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/a11y LiveAnnouncer is queuing announcements too fast, causing screen readers to skip critical alerts. We need to debounce announcements, prioritize messages, and add a11y announcement tests.

Java Exchanger timeout isn't configured, causing threads to block indefinitely when partner task fails. We need to use exchange(V, timeout, unit), implement fallback logic, and add timeout monitoring.

Angular @angular/core @Input() alias is conflicting with component property name, causing binding to fail silently. We need to rename alias, validate template bindings, and add input resolution tests.

JVM classloader leak is preventing hot reloads in dev environment. Static cache in utility class holds references to dynamically loaded classes, causing Metaspace exhaustion. We need to clear static caches on shutdown, use weak references, and add leak detector.

Angular @angular/forms FormBuilder.group() is creating controls with wrong initial state because disabled key is passed as value instead of config object. We need to use {value: '', disabled: true}, validate form init, and add form builder tests.

Spring Boot @EnableWebMvc is disabling auto-configuration, causing missing message converters and static resource handling. We need to remove annotation, use WebMvcConfigurer instead, and validate MVC configuration.
Angular @angular/cdk/table pagination is resetting to page 0 on data refresh because pageIndex isn't preserved. We need to sync paginator state, validate page retention, and add pagination UX tests.

Java ThreadGroup is preventing garbage collection of terminated threads because references are retained in internal array. We need to avoid custom thread groups, use executor services, and monitor thread lifecycle metrics.

Angular @angular/router canActivateChild isn't triggered when navigating between sibling routes because router reuses parent component. We need to implement canMatch, validate guard execution, and add child navigation tests.

JVM JIT deoptimization storms are occurring after deploying new pricing algorithm. C2 compiler repeatedly compiles and deoptimizes hot loop due to unstable branch profiling. We need to stabilize code path, add compile exclusion temporarily, and refactor conditional logic.

Angular @angular/core @ViewChild query list changes aren't detected because QueryList.changes isn't subscribed in ngAfterViewInit. We need to setup subscription, handle dynamic children, and add query list tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway is failing to forward headers because StripPrefix filter removes required path segments. We need to adjust filter order, validate header propagation, and add gateway routing tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay panel detaches on scroll because scrollStrategy is set to close() instead of reposition(). We need to switch strategy, validate overlay behavior, and add scroll interaction tests.

Java AtomicBoolean compareAndSet is failing because visibility isn't guaranteed across threads without volatile semantics in custom wrapper. We need to use AtomicBoolean directly, validate memory barriers, and add concurrency tests.

Angular @angular/common NgSwitch is rendering multiple cases because expression evaluates to truthy non-matching values. We need to use strict equality, validate switch logic, and add template rendering tests.

JVM G1GC concurrent marking is failing to complete before heap fills, triggering full GC pauses of 12+ seconds. We need to lower -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent to 35, increase concurrent GC threads, and reduce large object allocation rate.

Angular @angular/router urlTree serialization is dropping matrix parameters because createUrlTree isn't configured with queryParamsHandling. We need to preserve params, validate URL generation, and add routing serialization tests.

Spring Boot @ConfigurationProperties validation isn't failing on invalid values because @Validated is missing on the class. Invalid config loads silently. We need to add annotation, implement constraint validators, and add config validation tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop preview element is clipped because cdkDragPreview is rendered inside overflow:hidden container. We need to attach preview to body, validate preview positioning, and add drag preview tests.

Java CompletableFuture.supplyAsync() is using common pool for blocking I/O, causing thread starvation. We need to pass dedicated executor, isolate blocking workloads, and add async execution validation.

Angular @angular/core @HostListener with event.preventDefault() isn't working because handler returns false instead of calling preventDefault. We need to fix event handling, validate DOM behavior, and add interaction tests.

JVM native memory tracking shows thread stack allocation consuming 2GB because -Xss is set too high for thousands of virtual threads. We need to reduce -Xss to 256k, validate stack usage, and monitor native memory breakdown.

Angular @angular/forms Validators.email is rejecting valid addresses because regex doesn't support new TLDs. We need to implement custom validator, align with HTML5 spec, and add email validation tests.
Spring Data MongoDB aggregation pipeline is failing because $lookup stage exceeds memory limit. We need to add allowDiskUse=true, optimize pipeline stages, and monitor aggregation memory usage.
Angular @angular/cdk/table column resize is breaking layout because table-layout: fixed isn't applied. We need to enforce fixed layout, validate resize behavior, and add table layout tests.

Java Semaphore permits are leaking because release() is called without matching acquire() in error paths. We need to wrap in try-finally, implement permit monitoring, and add concurrency validation tests.
Angular @angular/router navigationId is incrementing on failed navigations, causing history state mismatch. We need to handle navigation errors, validate state sync, and add history management tests.

JVM code cache fragmentation is causing compilation failures because non-method data occupies contiguous blocks. We need to enable -XX:+SegmentedCodeCache, monitor cache usage, and add compilation health checks.

Angular @angular/core @Input() setter is triggering infinite loop because it updates bound property that triggers parent CD. We need to break cycle with OnPush, validate data flow, and add binding loop detection.

Spring Boot @Scheduled tasks are overlapping because execution time exceeds interval, causing concurrent runs. We need to implement @SchedulerLock, switch to fixedDelay, and add execution duration monitoring.

Angular @angular/cdk/a11y FocusMonitor is leaking listeners because stopMonitoring() isn't called on destroy. We need to cleanup in ngOnDestroy, validate listener lifecycle, and add a11y memory tests.

Java ThreadLocal initial value is shared across threads because mutable object is returned instead of new instance. We need to return fresh object in initialValue(), validate isolation, and add thread safety tests.

Angular @angular/common NgStyle is applying styles asynchronously because bound object is updated outside NgZone. We need to run updates in zone, validate style application, and add rendering sync tests.

JVM G1GC humongous allocations are fragmenting heap because large byte arrays exceed region size. We need to increase -XX:G1HeapRegionSize, refactor to chunked buffers, and monitor humongous allocation rate.

Angular @angular/router canActivate guard is blocking navigation because it returns UrlTree that redirects to same route, causing infinite loop. We need to detect cycles, implement safe redirect, and add guard loop tests.

Spring Cloud Stream is failing to deserialize messages because content-type header is missing or mismatched. We need to configure spring.cloud.stream.bindings.*.content-type, validate message headers, and add deserialization tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay panel is rendering behind modal because z-index stack isn't configured correctly. We need to adjust cdk-overlay-container z-index, validate layering, and add overlay stacking tests.
Java CountDownLatch await is blocking indefinitely because latch count is initialized higher than actual tasks. We need to validate count calculation, implement timeout, and add coordination tests.

Angular @angular/core @Output() emitter is disposed before async operation completes, causing ObjectUnsubscribedError. We need to defer completion, validate emitter lifecycle, and add event emission tests.

JVM safepoint bias is causing long pauses because biased locking is enabled but contention is high. We need to disable with -XX:-UseBiasedLocking, monitor lock inflation, and add concurrency profiling.

Java G1GC is triggering frequent full GC pauses because -XX:G1HeapWastePercent is set too low, causing premature mixed collections that can't reclaim enough memory. We need to increase to 10%, monitor evacuation failure rates, and validate heap sizing against allocation profiles.

Angular signal() updates inside effect() are causing infinite loops because the effect writes to a signal it implicitly reads. We need to break the dependency cycle, use untracked() for writes, and add signal dependency linting to CI.

Spring Boot @Transactional rollback isn't triggered for checked exceptions because default rollback rules only apply to RuntimeException. Financial compensations are skipped. We need to configure rollbackFor=Exception.class, audit transaction boundaries, and add rollback verification tests.

Angular HttpClient interceptor is stripping X-Request-ID on retry because the cloned request doesn't preserve custom headers. Distributed traces break across retries. We need to explicitly copy headers in clone(), validate trace continuity, and add interceptor unit tests.

Java VirtualThread pinning is occurring during synchronized blocks in a legacy XML parser, defeating scalability gains. We need to replace synchronized with ReentrantLock, enable JFR virtual thread pinning events, and monitor carrier thread utilization.

Angular NgRx selector is recomputing on every action dispatch because createSelector isn't memoizing primitive returns correctly. Dashboard FPS drops to 12. We need to wrap primitives in objects, implement props memoization, and add selector performance benchmarks.

JVM Metaspace OOM occurs after 7 days because CGLIB proxies aren't cached and generate new classes per request. We need to enable -XX:+CMSClassUnloadingEnabled (if applicable), implement proxy caching, and migrate to ByteBuddy with class reuse.

Angular *ngFor trackBy function returns mutable object references, causing DOM recreation on every poll. Browser main thread blocks during market data updates. We need to return stable primitive IDs, enforce immutability, and add render cycle profiling.

Spring Cloud Gateway WebSocket routes are dropping connections because NettyRoutingFilter timeout is set to 30s, but trading streams stay open indefinitely. We need to disable timeout for WS routes, configure idle ping/pong, and add connection lifecycle monitoring.

Angular reactive form valueChanges emits stale values because patchValue() is called with {emitEvent: false} but async validators still trigger. We need to sync validation state, debounce validator calls, and add form state consistency tests.

Java ThreadLocal memory leak retains 2GB of request payloads because remove() isn't called in async callback chains. We need to wrap callbacks with context cleanup, implement a ThreadLocal leak detector, and migrate to ScopedValue where possible.

Angular SSR hydration fails with NG0500 because Date.now() is called during server render, causing client mismatch. We need to inject PLATFORM_ID, guard time-sensitive logic, and add hydration parity tests to the CI pipeline.

JVM direct memory exhaustion occurs because Netty's UnpooledByteBufAllocator is used instead of pooled variant, causing frequent native allocations. We need to switch to PooledByteBufAllocator.DEFAULT, enable leak detection, and cap direct memory via -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize.

Angular RouterLinkActive highlights wrong nav items because child routes inherit parent active state without exact: true. Users navigate to incorrect modules. We need to apply exact matching, audit route hierarchy, and add navigation state tests.

Spring Data JPA @EntityGraph is ignored because repository method uses custom @Query with JPQL joins. N+1 queries return. We need to align fetch strategy with query structure, enable SQL logging, and add query plan assertions to integration tests.

Angular @defer block triggers hydration mismatch because deferred component accesses window.innerWidth during init. We need to defer browser API calls to afterNextRender(), provide fallback dimensions, and validate SSR/CSR parity.

Java CompletableFuture chain deadlocks because join() is called inside a task submitted to the same bounded executor. We need to break the dependency chain, use separate executors for nested async calls, and add deadlock detection to thread dumps.

Angular MatTableDataSource filtering breaks because filter predicate compares stringified objects instead of primitive fields. Search returns zero results. We need to implement custom filter logic, normalize data shapes, and add table search tests.

JVM safepoint pauses exceed 2s because Deoptimize operations stall during high JIT compilation volume. We need to cap compiler threads with -XX:CICompilerCount, reduce inline budget, and monitor compilation queue depth via JFR.

Angular HttpClient retry logic causes thundering herd because all failed requests retry simultaneously without jitter. Backend gets hammered. We need to implement exponential backoff with randomization, cap max retries, and add retry storm simulation tests.

Spring Boot Actuator /health returns UP despite Kafka broker partition because health indicator only checks metadata connection. Message production fails silently. We need to implement producer-aware health checks, validate cluster quorum, and add dependency failure tests.

Angular NgZone.runOutsideAngular() is misused for high-frequency scroll events, but Renderer2 listeners still trigger CD. We need to detach listeners properly, use passive event flags, and add zone leak detection to performance suite.

Java ForkJoinPool.commonPool() is saturated by CPU-intensive risk calculations, blocking I/O-bound notification tasks. We need to create dedicated executors per workload type, configure queue bounds, and implement backpressure propagation.

Angular ControlValueAccessor isn't propagating onTouched callbacks, causing form validation to miss blur events. We need to implement registerOnTouched, trigger it on host blur, and add custom control validation tests.

JVM heap dump shows 3GB retained by SoftReference cache that never releases under memory pressure. We need to switch to Caffeine with size-based eviction, implement background cleanup, and add cache health metrics to Grafana.

Angular provideRouter() is missing withInMemoryScrolling() configuration, causing page position to reset on back navigation. Users lose form context. We need to enable scroll restoration, validate navigation behavior, and add UX regression tests.

Spring Security filter chain executes twice because @EnableWebSecurity is declared in multiple configuration classes. Duplicate auth attempts cause session fixation warnings. We need to consolidate config, use SecurityFilterChain beans, and validate filter ordering.

Angular ViewChild queries return undefined in unit tests because detectChanges() isn't called after component creation. We need to trigger CD in test setup, use fakeAsync with tick(), and add query validation to the test harness.

Java AtomicLong sequence generator causes CPU cache line bouncing under high concurrency due to false sharing. We need to switch to LongAdder, implement striped counters, or use database sequences for distributed ordering.
Angular @HostListener('window:resize') triggers excessive change detection because it runs inside NgZone. We need to run it outside zone, debounce with rxjs, and add resize handler performance tests.

Spring Boot fat JAR fails to start because nested JARs contain conflicting META-INF/services files, breaking SPI loading. We need to configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with ServicesResourceTransformer, validate classpath, and add startup tests.

Angular FormControl valueChanges emits duplicate events because updateOn: 'blur' isn't configured and input events fire on every keystroke. We need to set update triggers, debounce with rxjs, and add form performance tests.

JVM thread stack size is too small for deep recursive JSON parsing, causing StackOverflowError. Default -Xss1m is insufficient. We need to increase to -Xss2m, refactor parser to iterative approach, and add payload depth validation.

Angular lazy-loaded modules fail to load in production because chunk hashes mismatch after CDN cache invalidation. We need to implement retry logic in ErrorHandler, configure CDN cache-busting, and add chunk integrity validation.

Spring Cloud Stream consumer processes duplicates because ack-mode is AUTO but listener throws transient exceptions after partial processing. We need to switch to MANUAL ack, implement idempotent handlers, and add message replay tests.

Angular ngModel two-way binding causes ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError because bound property is mutated in ngAfterViewInit. We need to defer updates to microtask queue, enforce unidirectional flow, and add CD error detection.

Java ScheduledExecutorService leaks threads because scheduled tasks throw unhandled exceptions, causing executor to silently stop. We need to wrap runnables with exception catchers, implement monitoring hooks, and add executor health alerts.

Angular router.navigate() fails silently because relative path resolution uses wrong relativeTo snapshot. Users get stuck on error pages. We need to inject ActivatedRoute, validate navigation context, and add routing error handling.

JVM G1GC evacuation failures occur during traffic spikes, falling back to serial full GC with 15s pauses. We need to increase -XX:G1ReservePercent, tune -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis, and reduce allocation burst rate in ingestion service.

Angular signal() updates batch incorrectly because effect() triggers synchronously during template rendering. We need to defer effects to microtask queue, audit signal dependencies, and add CD boundary tests.

Spring Cloud Config client fails to decrypt properties because JCE unlimited strength policy isn't installed in base image. We need to upgrade to JDK with built-in unlimited crypto, configure decryption keys, and add crypto validation tests.

Angular HttpClient interceptors execute in wrong order because provideHttpClient() doesn't respect declaration sequence. Auth tokens stripped before logging. We need to explicitly order interceptors, validate pipeline, and add chain tests.

Java Phaser causes thread starvation because parties aren't deregistered after task completion. We need to call arriveAndDeregister(), implement timeout-based advancement, and add phaser state monitoring.

Angular @angular/localize fails at runtime because $localize isn't loaded in polyfills bundle after CLI upgrade. We need to import @angular/localize/init, validate i18n bootstrap, and add localization smoke tests.

JVM native memory tracking shows 3GB unaccounted in Other category. Async-profiler indicates glibc malloc fragmentation from native PDF library. We need to switch to jemalloc via LD_PRELOAD, enable NMT detail, and audit native buffers.

Angular router-outlet destroys components on navigation because RouteReuseStrategy isn't implemented, causing expensive re-init. We need to cache component handles, validate reuse logic, and add navigation performance tests.

Spring Data MongoDB throws MappingException because entity classes lack no-arg constructor or use final fields. We need to add protected constructors, remove final modifiers, or switch to Kotlin data classes with plugin support.
Angular @HostBinding('class') overrides template classes because host bindings merge incorrectly. We need to use ngClass in template, avoid host class conflicts, and add style isolation tests.

Java StampedLock write lock causes thread starvation because readers continuously acquire optimistic locks. We need to switch to ReentrantReadWriteLock with fairness, implement writer priority, and validate throughput under contention.

Angular FormArray push operations trigger full form validation because updateValueAndValidity() bubbles synchronously. We need to pass {emitEvent: false}, batch updates, and add form performance benchmarks.
Spring Cloud Kubernetes isn't detecting config map changes because RBAC permissions are missing for watch operations. We need to grant watch permission, enable reload, and validate config sync.

Angular @ViewChild({static: false}) is undefined in ngOnInit because query resolves after first CD. We need to move logic to ngAfterViewInit, use static: true where appropriate, and add lifecycle validation tests.

Java DirectByteBuffer allocation fails under load because cleaner thread is blocked on slow filesystem sync. We need to decouple buffer allocation from disk I/O, use pooled buffers, and increase cleaner thread priority.

Angular HttpClient progress events fire too frequently, causing UI jank during large file uploads. We need to throttle progress emissions with throttleTime(200), optimize progress rendering, and add upload UX tests.

Spring Boot @ConfigurationProperties isn't reloading when Config Server updates because @RefreshScope is missing. Services use stale config. We need to add @RefreshScope, implement config change listeners, and validate refresh behavior.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop causes memory leaks because drag references aren't destroyed when components are removed dynamically. We need to call DragDropRef.dispose(), audit dynamic list cleanup, and add memory profiling tests.

Java ConcurrentLinkedQueue causes high CPU usage because polling threads spin-wait when queue is empty. We need to switch to LinkedBlockingQueue with take(), implement backoff strategy, and monitor thread states.

Angular @angular/pwa service worker caches API responses incorrectly because dataGroups strategy is set to performance instead of freshness. Users see stale balances. We need to switch strategy, validate cache rules, and add SW update tests.

JVM startup time exceeds 45s due to extensive classpath scanning and annotation processing. We need to enable CDS, switch to explicit component scanning packages, and precompute reflection metadata to meet cold start SLA.

Angular @angular/animations cause layout thrashing because transform isn't used and top/left properties trigger reflow. We need to refactor to GPU-accelerated properties, disable animations in reduced-motion mode, and add perf tests.

Spring Data Elasticsearch fails because client version mismatches cluster version, causing protocol incompatibility. We need to align versions, use REST client instead of transport, and add compatibility validation to CI.

Angular @angular/core signal computed() recalculates unnecessarily because dependencies include non-signal values that change reference. We need to wrap dependencies in signals, stabilize references, and add computation tracing.

Java ThreadPoolExecutor queue is unbounded, causing OOM when downstream service degrades. We need to switch to ArrayBlockingQueue with capacity limits, implement caller-runs rejection policy, and add queue depth metrics.

Angular @angular/router preloading strategy downloads all lazy chunks on slow networks, causing data cap exhaustion. We need to implement QuicklinkStrategy, respect saveData flag, and add network-aware preloading tests.
JVM G1GC mixed pauses are dominated by code cache flushing. We need to increase -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize, enable -XX:+UseCodeCacheFlushing, and audit dynamic proxy generation that bloats the cache.

Angular @angular/forms async validators trigger on every keystroke because updateOn isn't set to blur. This overloads validation API. We need to configure update triggers, debounce requests, and add form validation tests.

Spring Boot @RestControllerAdvice isn't catching exceptions from async controllers because DeferredResult exceptions bypass advice. We need to implement AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler, wrap async returns, and add global async error handling.

Angular @angular/cdk/table renders duplicate rows because trackBy returns non-unique IDs after data refresh. We need to generate stable identifiers, validate tracking function, and add table render integrity tests.

Java VirtualThread scheduler starves platform threads because too many blocking JDBC calls pin carriers. We need to audit blocking APIs, wrap them with runVirtualThread, and monitor carrier thread utilization via JFR.

Angular @angular/common DatePipe uses local timezone instead of UTC, causing timestamp mismatches in audit logs. We need to enforce UTC formatting, configure default timezone, and add date serialization tests.

Spring Cloud Stream binder creates duplicate consumer groups because group property isn't set, causing message fan-out. We need to configure explicit consumer groups, validate partition assignment, and add consumer lag monitoring.

Angular @angular/platform-browser Title service isn't updating on route change because TitleStrategy isn't implemented. We need to provide custom strategy, sync titles with route data, and add metadata tests.

Java AtomicReference update loop causes livelock under high contention because CAS failures retry immediately without backoff. We need to implement exponential backoff, switch to LongAdder, or use striped locks.

Angular @angular/core ngOnDestroy isn't called for dynamically created components because ComponentRef.destroy() isn't invoked. We need to track dynamic references, implement cleanup hooks, and add lifecycle validation tests.

JVM leaks file descriptors because ZipFile instances from JAR scanning aren't closed during dynamic plugin loading. We hit Too many open files. We need to wrap plugin loaders in try-with-resources, implement plugin cache, and add FD alerts.

Angular @angular/router CanDeactivate guard blocks navigation when form is pristine because dirty check logic is inverted. Users can't exit views. We need to fix condition, validate guard behavior, and add navigation flow tests.

Spring Boot @Value annotation fails to resolve placeholders because property sources are loaded in wrong order. Env vars overridden by application.yml. We need to adjust spring.config.import order, use @ConfigurationProperties, and add resolution tests.

Angular @angular/animations query() selector fails because DOM elements are removed before animation completes. We need to use animateChild(), defer removal with done callback, and add animation lifecycle tests.

Java CompletableFuture chain leaks threads because exceptions aren't handled with exceptionally(), causing worker threads to hang. We need to add global exception handlers, implement timeout wrappers, and audit all async chains.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay positions dropdowns incorrectly inside scrollable containers because positionStrategy isn't connected to scrollable ancestor. We need to configure withScrollableParents(), validate positioning, and add overlay tests.

JVM thread dump shows 200 threads blocked on sun.misc.Unsafe.park() waiting for single monitor held by slow DB call. We need to implement connection timeout, add circuit breaker, and reduce lock scope around I/O.
Angular @angular/forms FormGroup.reset() clears async validation state, causing stale errors to persist. We need to re-trigger validation after reset, implement state sync, and add form reset tests.

Spring Data JPA repository generates inefficient queries because method name parsing creates cartesian joins. We need to use @Query with explicit joins, enable SQL logging, and add query plan validation to test suite.
Angular @angular/core effect() runs during server-side rendering, causing localStorage access errors. We need to guard with isPlatformBrowser(), defer to afterNextRender(), and add SSR safety tests.

Java ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor silently drops tasks when queue is full because default rejection policy is AbortPolicy without logging. We need to implement custom RejectedExecutionHandler, add metrics, and alert on rejection rate.

Angular @angular/router scrollPositionRestoration isn't working because viewportScroller isn't configured with correct offset for fixed headers. We need to set setOffset(), validate scroll behavior, and add navigation UX tests.

JVM G1GC spends 40% time in remark phase due to high reference processing overhead. Weak references from metrics library delay collection. We need to upgrade library, tune -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent, and audit reference structures.

Angular @angular/common NgPlural renders fallback case for all values because ICU message format isn't parsed correctly. We need to enable $localize ICU support, validate plural rules, and add i18n rendering tests.

Spring Boot @EnableScheduling creates multiple scheduler instances because configuration is imported multiple times. Tasks run duplicated. We need to consolidate config, use @ConditionalOnMissingBean, and validate scheduler singleton.

Angular @angular/cdk/a11y FocusTrap breaks keyboard navigation because it doesn't account for dynamically added modal content. We need to refresh focus trap after DOM updates, validate tab order, and add accessibility tests.

Java ThreadLocalRandom is seeded incorrectly in custom thread pool, causing predictable random values in token generation. We need to use SecureRandom for crypto, validate seeding strategy, and add entropy monitoring.

Angular @angular/platform-server fails to render because window is accessed in constructor instead of ngOnInit. We need to defer browser API calls, use isPlatformBrowser(), and add SSR compatibility linting.

JVM allocation profiling reveals 60% young gen allocations from DateTimeFormatter creating temporaries per request. We need to cache formatters statically, switch to Instant, and use ThreadLocal for non-thread-safe formatters.

Angular @angular/router data observable emits stale values because route reuse strategy caches component but doesn't refresh data resolver. We need to implement shouldReuseRoute logic, trigger data refresh, and add route data tests.
Spring Cloud Gateway fails to route because URI scheme isn't lb:// for load-balanced services. We need to configure service discovery, validate URI format, and add route resolution tests.

Angular @angular/core @Input() transform function throws because null values aren't handled before coercion. We need to add null guards, use booleanAttribute/numberAttribute safely, and add input validation tests.

Java BlockingQueue.poll() with timeout causes busy-waiting because timeout is 1ms, spinning CPU. We need to increase timeout to 100ms, switch to take() with interrupt handling, and profile CPU usage in consumer loops.

Angular @angular/cdk/clipboard fails in cross-origin iframes because browser blocks clipboard API without user gesture. We need to fallback to document.execCommand, add permission checks, and implement graceful degradation.

JVM Shenandoah GC causes application threads to stall during concurrent root scanning. Throughput dropped 25% due to read barriers. We need to evaluate if Shenandoah fits latency profile, tune heuristics, or revert to G1GC.

Angular @angular/forms Validators.pattern fails because regex isn't anchored, allowing partial matches. Invalid data passes validation. We need to add ^ and $ anchors, validate regex behavior, and add pattern tests.

Spring Boot @Configuration class is proxied with CGLIB but contains final methods, causing IllegalArgumentException. We need to remove final modifiers, switch to interface-based proxies, or use proxyBeanMethods=false.
Angular @angular/common CurrencyPipe rounds incorrectly for JPY because default digits isn't overridden. We need to set digitsInfo: '1.0-0', validate currency formatting, and add localization tests.

Java CyclicBarrier causes deadlock because one thread throws exception before reaching barrier, leaving others waiting. We need to implement barrier timeout, handle BrokenBarrierException, and add fallback coordination logic.

Angular @angular/router resolve blocks navigation because resolver returns promise that never resolves on API timeout. We need to add timeout operator, implement fallback data, and add resolver error handling.

JVM fails to release memory back to OS after traffic drops, causing container OOM kills despite low heap. G1GC doesn't uncommit aggressively. We need to enable -XX:+UseDynamicNumberOfGCThreads, set -XX:MinHeapFreeRatio, and configure container flags.

Angular @angular/core @Output() emits during change detection, causing ExpressionChangedAfterItHasBeenCheckedError. We need to defer emission to Promise.resolve().then(), validate event timing, and add CD boundary tests.

Spring Data Redis pipeline fails because connection isn't returned to pool after execution, causing exhaustion. We need to use RedisCallback with proper resource management, implement try-with-resources, and monitor connection lifecycle.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop dropped event fires twice because event propagation isn't stopped and parent container also listens. We need to call event.stopPropagation(), validate event flow, and add drag-drop integration tests.

Java Thread interruption is ignored in long-running CSV export loop, causing graceful shutdown to hang. We need to check Thread.interrupted() in loop, close resources on interrupt, and implement cooperative cancellation.

Angular @angular/platform-browser DomSanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml() is misused, exposing XSS vector because user input isn't stripped. We need to sanitize with DOMPurify, remove bypass calls, and add security audit tests.

JVM JFR event streaming causes 8% CPU overhead due to high-frequency allocation profiling. We need to disable jdk.ObjectAllocationInNewTLAB in continuous profiling, reduce sampling rate, and switch to async-profiler for on-demand analysis.

Angular @angular/router canMatch guard prevents lazy module load because it returns false for valid segments. We need to fix segment matching logic, validate guard conditions, and add route matching tests.

Spring Boot @RestController returns XML instead of JSON because Jackson isn't on classpath or content negotiation prefers XML. We need to add jackson-databind, configure HttpMessageConverters, and validate content type in tests.

Angular @angular/core inject() throws when called in class field initializer because injection context isn't available yet. We need to move to constructor or use Injector explicitly, validate DI timing, and add context linting.

Java ConcurrentModificationException thrown in ArrayList during parallel stream processing because collection isn't thread-safe. We need to switch to CopyOnWriteArrayList or collect to concurrent structure, and add thread-safety linting.

Angular @angular/cdk/table sticky headers misaligned because position: sticky isn't supported in parent overflow container. We need to restructure DOM, use CSS grid fallback, and add layout compatibility tests.

JVM finalizer queue backs up because legacy JDBC driver relies on Object.finalize() for connection cleanup. Finalizer thread saturated. We need to replace driver, explicitly close resources, and disable finalization with -XX:-Finalize.

Angular @angular/forms AbstractControl.statusChanges isn't emitting when async validator completes because control is disabled. We need to enable control during validation, listen to valueChanges, and add status sync tests.
Spring Cloud Config fails to refresh because /actuator/refresh isn't exposed or secured. We need to enable endpoint, configure security, and validate refresh workflow in CI/CD.

Angular @angular/core ng-template outlet context loses type safety because $implicit isn't typed. We need to define context interface, use ngTemplateOutletContext with generics, and add template type checking.

Java Lock contention on cache manager causes CPU spikes because ReentrantLock isn't configured with fairness and threads starve. We need to enable fairness, implement read-write lock, and add contention monitoring.

Angular @angular/router NavigationEnd fires before lazy module is fully initialized, causing analytics to track incomplete page views. We need to listen to ActivationEnd, defer tracking, and add navigation lifecycle tests.

JVM heap utilization shows 90% old gen occupancy with low promotion rate, indicating memory leak. MAT points to SoftReference cache. We need to switch to weak references with explicit eviction, implement size bounds, and add cache metrics.
Angular @angular/cdk/overlay backdrop isn't blocking scroll because cdk-overlay-backdrop lacks position: fixed. We need to fix CSS, validate overlay behavior, and add modal interaction tests.

Spring Boot @Async executor isn't configured, causing tasks to run on SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor which creates new thread per task. We need to define ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean, configure bounds, and monitor thread creation rate.

Angular @angular/core @Directive host listeners fire multiple times because directive is applied to element with structural directive that recreates DOM. We need to isolate host bindings, validate directive lifecycle, and add host event tests.

Java Phaser bulk registration causes overflow because register() is called without matching arriveAndDeregister(). We need to audit registration lifecycle, implement bounds checking, and add phaser state validation.

Angular @angular/common AsyncPipe unsubscribes prematurely because component is destroyed before observable emits. We need to use takeUntilDestroyed, validate subscription lifecycle, and add async rendering tests.

JVM string deduplication disabled by default in JDK 17, causing duplicate JSON payloads to consume 30% old gen. Enabling -XX:+UseStringDeduplication reduced heap 18%. We need to roll flag to prod, monitor G1GC remark, and validate no regression.

Angular @angular/router params observable emits string arrays for single-value params because paramsInheritanceStrategy isn't configured. We need to parse params explicitly, validate type coercion, and add route param tests.
Spring Data JPA fails to persist entity because @GeneratedValue strategy mismatches database dialect. We need to align strategy with DB, validate ID generation, and add persistence tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/a11y LiveAnnouncer queues announcements too fast, causing screen readers to skip critical alerts. We need to debounce announcements, prioritize messages, and add a11y announcement tests.

Java Exchanger timeout isn't configured, causing threads to block indefinitely when partner task fails. We need to use exchange(V, timeout, unit), implement fallback logic, and add timeout monitoring.
Angular @angular/core @Input() alias conflicts with component property name, causing binding to fail silently. We need to rename alias, validate template bindings, and add input resolution tests.

JVM classloader leak prevents hot reloads in dev. Static cache holds references to dynamically loaded classes, causing Metaspace exhaustion. We need to clear static caches on shutdown, use weak references, and add leak detector.

Angular @angular/forms FormBuilder.group() creates controls with wrong initial state because disabled key passed as value instead of config. We need to use {value: '', disabled: true}, validate form init, and add builder tests.

Spring Boot @EnableWebMvc disables auto-configuration, causing missing message converters and static resource handling. We need to remove annotation, use WebMvcConfigurer, and validate MVC configuration.
Angular @angular/cdk/table pagination resets to page 0 on data refresh because pageIndex isn't preserved. We need to sync paginator state, validate page retention, and add pagination UX tests.
Java ThreadGroup prevents GC of terminated threads because references retained in internal array. We need to avoid custom thread groups, use executor services, and monitor thread lifecycle metrics.

Angular @angular/router canActivateChild isn't triggered when navigating between sibling routes because router reuses parent component. We need to implement canMatch, validate guard execution, and add child navigation tests.

JVM JIT deoptimization storms occur after deploying new pricing algorithm. C2 repeatedly compiles/deoptimizes hot loop due to unstable branch profiling. We need to stabilize code path, add compile exclusion temporarily, refactor logic.

Angular @angular/core @ViewChild query list changes aren't detected because QueryList.changes isn't subscribed in ngAfterViewInit. We need to setup subscription, handle dynamic children, and add query list tests.
Spring Cloud Gateway fails to forward headers because StripPrefix filter removes required path segments. We need to adjust filter order, validate header propagation, and add gateway routing tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay panel detaches on scroll because scrollStrategy is close() instead of reposition(). We need to switch strategy, validate overlay behavior, and add scroll interaction tests.

Java AtomicBoolean compareAndSet fails because visibility isn't guaranteed across threads without volatile semantics in custom wrapper. We need to use AtomicBoolean directly, validate memory barriers, and add concurrency tests.

Angular @angular/common NgSwitch renders multiple cases because expression evaluates to truthy non-matching values. We need to use strict equality, validate switch logic, and add template rendering tests.

JVM G1GC concurrent marking fails to complete before heap fills, triggering 12s full GC pauses. We need to lower -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent to 35, increase concurrent GC threads, and reduce large object allocation rate.

Angular @angular/router urlTree serialization drops matrix parameters because createUrlTree isn't configured with queryParamsHandling. We need to preserve params, validate URL generation, and add routing serialization tests.

Spring Boot @ConfigurationProperties validation isn't failing on invalid values because @Validated is missing. Invalid config loads silently. We need to add annotation, implement constraint validators, and add config validation tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/drag-drop preview element clipped because cdkDragPreview rendered inside overflow:hidden container. We need to attach preview to body, validate preview positioning, and add drag preview tests.
Java CompletableFuture.supplyAsync() uses common pool for blocking I/O, causing thread starvation. We need to pass dedicated executor, isolate blocking workloads, and add async execution validation.

Angular @angular/core @HostListener with event.preventDefault() isn't working because handler returns false instead of calling preventDefault. We need to fix event handling, validate DOM behavior, and add interaction tests.

JVM native memory tracking shows thread stack allocation consuming 2GB because -Xss set too high for thousands of virtual threads. We need to reduce -Xss to 256k, validate stack usage, and monitor native memory breakdown.
Angular @angular/forms Validators.email rejects valid addresses because regex doesn't support new TLDs. We need to implement custom validator, align with HTML5 spec, and add email validation tests.
Spring Data MongoDB aggregation pipeline fails because $lookup stage exceeds memory limit. We need to add allowDiskUse=true, optimize pipeline stages, and monitor aggregation memory usage.
Angular @angular/cdk/table column resize breaks layout because table-layout: fixed isn't applied. We need to enforce fixed layout, validate resize behavior, and add table layout tests.
Java Semaphore permits leak because release() called without matching acquire() in error paths. We need to wrap in try-finally, implement permit monitoring, and add concurrency validation tests.
Angular @angular/router navigationId increments on failed navigations, causing history state mismatch. We need to handle navigation errors, validate state sync, and add history management tests.

JVM code cache fragmentation causes compilation failures because non-method data occupies contiguous blocks. We need to enable -XX:+SegmentedCodeCache, monitor cache usage, and add compilation health checks.

Angular @angular/core @Input() setter triggers infinite loop because it updates bound property that triggers parent CD. We need to break cycle with OnPush, validate data flow, and add binding loop detection.

Spring Boot @Scheduled tasks overlap because execution time exceeds interval, causing concurrent runs. We need to implement @SchedulerLock, switch to fixedDelay, and add execution duration monitoring.
Angular @angular/cdk/a11y FocusMonitor leaks listeners because stopMonitoring() isn't called on destroy. We need to cleanup in ngOnDestroy, validate listener lifecycle, and add a11y memory tests.

Java ThreadLocal initial value shared across threads because mutable object returned instead of new instance. We need to return fresh object in initialValue(), validate isolation, and add thread safety tests.
Angular @angular/common NgStyle applies styles asynchronously because bound object updated outside NgZone. We need to run updates in zone, validate style application, and add rendering sync tests.

JVM G1GC humongous allocations fragment heap because large byte arrays exceed region size. We need to increase -XX:G1HeapRegionSize, refactor to chunked buffers, and monitor humongous allocation rate.

Angular @angular/router canActivate guard blocks navigation because it returns UrlTree that redirects to same route, causing infinite loop. We need to detect cycles, implement safe redirect, and add guard loop tests.

Spring Cloud Stream fails to deserialize messages because content-type header missing or mismatched. We need to configure spring.cloud.stream.bindings.*.content-type, validate message headers, and add deserialization tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/overlay panel renders behind modal because z-index stack isn't configured correctly. We need to adjust cdk-overlay-container z-index, validate layering, and add overlay stacking tests.
Java CountDownLatch await blocks indefinitely because latch count initialized higher than actual tasks. We need to validate count calculation, implement timeout, and add coordination tests.

Angular @angular/core @Output() emitter disposed before async operation completes, causing ObjectUnsubscribedError. We need to defer completion, validate emitter lifecycle, and add event emission tests.
JVM safepoint bias causes long pauses because biased locking enabled but contention high. We need to disable with -XX:-UseBiasedLocking, monitor lock inflation, and add concurrency profiling.

Angular @angular/common KeyValuePipe sorts objects unpredictably because default comparator uses key stringification. We need to provide custom compareFn, validate sort order, and add pipe unit tests.

Spring Boot @Cacheable caches null returns because unless=''#result == null' missing, polluting cache with empty states. We need to add condition, implement null object pattern, and validate cache content.

Angular @angular/cdk/virtual-scroll renders blank viewport because itemSize doesn't match actual DOM height. We need to measure dynamic heights, implement autosize strategy, and add scroll render tests.
Java WeakHashMap causes NPE because keys are garbage collected while iteration is in progress. We need to snapshot keys before iteration, validate GC behavior, and add concurrent access tests.

Angular @angular/router canLoad guard deprecated but still used, causing lazy module to load twice in new router version. We need to migrate to canMatch, validate guard execution, and add module loading tests.

JVM TLS handshake latency spikes because session resumption isn't enabled and full RSA exchange occurs per connection. We need to enable TLS tickets, configure session cache, and measure handshake overhead.

Angular @angular/forms FormControl disabled state isn't reflected in DOM because ng-disabled isn't bound correctly. We need to use [disabled] binding or reactive form API, validate state sync, and add form UI tests.

Spring Data JPA @Modifying query fails because clearAutomatically=true isn't set, leaving stale entities in persistence context. We need to enable auto-clear, validate context sync, and add update query tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/dialog closes unexpectedly because click event bubbles from inner button to backdrop. We need to stop propagation, configure closeOnBackdropClick=false, and add dialog interaction tests.

Java Executors.newFixedThreadPool() uses unbounded LinkedBlockingQueue, causing OOM under sustained load. We need to switch to ThreadPoolExecutor with bounded queue, implement rejection policy, and add queue metrics.
Angular @angular/core ng-container with *ngIf causes layout shift because placeholder isn't reserving space. We need to add CSS containment, implement skeleton loaders, and add CLS regression tests.
JVM G1GC remark phase delayed by JNI critical sections holding GC locks. We need to audit native calls, reduce JNI scope, and monitor safepoint sync times via JFR.

Angular @angular/common DecimalPipe rounds half-up inconsistently across browsers due to JS floating point quirks. We need to implement custom rounding with Math.round(x + Number.EPSILON), validate precision, and add numeric tests.

Spring Cloud Gateway rate limiter returns 429 prematurely because Redis token bucket isn't synced across gateway instances. We need to implement distributed rate limiting, validate bucket sync, and add limit accuracy tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/tree flattens nested data incorrectly because treeControl isn't configured with correct getChildren function. We need to fix data transformer, validate tree structure, and add tree render tests.

Java ObjectOutputStream causes memory leak because serialization handles aren't cleared, retaining references to large object graphs. We need to call reset() periodically, validate handle lifecycle, and add serialization memory tests.
Angular @angular/router queryParamsHandling='merge' drops parameters when navigating to same route. We need to manually merge params, validate URL state, and add query param retention tests.

JVM ZGC allocation stalls occur because heap is undersized for promotion rate during market open. We need to increase heap, tune -XX:ZAllocationSpikeTolerance, and profile allocation hotspots to reduce churn.

Angular @angular/core @ContentChild query undefined because projected content hasn't initialized when accessed in ngOnInit. We need to move logic to ngAfterContentInit, validate lifecycle timing, and add content projection tests.

Spring Boot @EventListener processes events synchronously, blocking publisher thread and causing latency spikes. We need to add @Async to listeners, implement event bus with dedicated executor, and validate async processing.

Angular @angular/cdk/stepper loses form state when moving between steps because editable=false destroys step content. We need to enable preserveContent, validate form retention, and add stepper UX tests.
Java Pattern.compile() called per request causes CPU overhead because regex isn't cached statically. We need to compile patterns once, store in static final, and add regex performance benchmarks.

Angular @angular/common NgClass object reference changes on every CD cycle, causing style recalculation bottlenecks. We need to memoize class objects, switch to signal-based bindings, and add style computation profiling.

JVM thread dump shows BLOCKED threads waiting for ReentrantLock held by thread performing synchronous HTTP call. We need to wrap I/O in separate executor, add connection timeout, and reduce lock scope.

Angular @angular/forms async validator triggers multiple API calls because valueChanges isn't debounced. We need to add debounceTime(300), implement distinctUntilChanged(), and add validator network tests.

Spring Data Redis @Cacheable fails because key serializer uses JDK default, causing ClassCastException after service restart. We need to configure StringRedisSerializer for keys, validate serialization, and add cache compatibility tests.

Angular @angular/cdk/portal throws NullInjectorError because PortalModule isn't imported in standalone component. We need to add module to imports array, validate DI setup, and add portal rendering tests.

Java Files.walk() causes FileSystemException: Too many open files because stream isn't closed in try-with-resources. We need to wrap in try-with-resources, validate stream lifecycle, and add file IO tests.

Angular @angular/router canActivate guard returns Observable that never completes, blocking navigation indefinitely. We need to add take(1) or timeout(), validate observable lifecycle, and add guard completion tests.
JVM G1GC old gen fragmentation causes allocation failures despite available memory. We need to enable -XX:+G1CompactOnFullGC, tune mixed GC thresholds, and monitor fragmentation metrics via JFR.

Angular @angular/core effect() runs too frequently because it reads multiple signals that update in same microtask. We need to batch signal updates, use untracked() for non-reactive reads, and add effect execution tests.

Spring Boot @Transactional propagation NESTED isn't supported by JPA transaction manager, causing TransactionException. We need to switch to REQUIRES_NEW, use JDBC transaction manager, or implement savepoints manually.
Angular @angular/cdk/table header row misaligns with data rows because cdk-table wrapper has padding. We need to remove wrapper padding, use CSS grid alignment, and add table layout parity tests.

Java CompletableFuture.thenApply() executes on calling thread instead of async pool because previous stage completed synchronously. We need to use thenApplyAsync(), validate executor routing, and add async chain tests.

Angular @angular/common DatePipe throws InvalidPipeArgument because input is string instead of Date object. We need to parse strings before piping, validate input types, and add date formatting tests.

JVM Metaspace OOM occurs because reflection metadata isn't cached and generates new proxy classes per invocation. We need to enable reflection caching, limit dynamic proxy generation, and monitor Metaspace growth rate.

Angular @angular/router preload strategy downloads chunks for routes user never visits, wasting bandwidth. We need to implement custom preloader based on user role, validate chunk loading, and add network usage tests.

Django ORM N+1 query detected in nested DRF serializer for portfolio endpoints. prefetch_related is missing for transactions and holdings, causing 140+ queries per request. Response times exceed 6s during market open. We need to add optimized prefetch paths, implement Prefetch() objects for filtered relations, and add query count assertions to API tests.

Celery beat is scheduling duplicate end-of-day reconciliation tasks because the scheduler lock isn't atomic across multiple worker pods. Two instances run simultaneously, causing duplicate ledger entries. We need to implement Redis-based distributed locking for beat, enable --scheduler django_celery_beat.schedulers:DatabaseScheduler, and add task idempotency checks.

Django migration 0047_add_audit_indexes is timing out after 300s on production Postgres because it attempts to create indexes on a 200M row table without CONCURRENTLY. This blocks the deployment pipeline and holds an AccessExclusiveLock. We need to rewrite the migration to use RunSQL with CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY, split into separate operations, and run during maintenance window.

DRF throttle scope user_burst is being bypassed because the client rotates IPv6 addresses within the same /64 subnet. Our get_ident() method only hashes the full IP, not the subnet. We need to implement subnet-aware throttling, add rate limiting at the WAF layer, and enforce API key quotas for high-volume clients.

Django database connection pool is exhausting during peak traffic because CONN_MAX_AGE is set to 0, forcing new connections per request. Postgres max_connections hits 150, causing OperationalError. We need to set CONN_MAX_AGE=60, implement PgBouncer in transaction mode, and add connection pool metrics to Grafana.

Celery worker memory grows linearly until OOMKilled because task results aren't acknowledged and accumulate in the result backend. task_ignore_result=True isn't set for fire-and-forget tasks. We need to disable result storage for async notifications, configure result_expires=3600, and monitor worker RSS memory.

Django template fragment caching is serving stale KYC status because the cache key doesn't include the user's verification state version. Users see outdated compliance banners. We need to add user.verification_version to the cache key, implement cache invalidation on status change, and add template cache parity tests.

DRF pagination count query is taking 8s on the transaction history endpoint because COUNT(*) runs on an unindexed filtered queryset. We need to switch to cursor pagination, remove total count from response, and add a materialized view for aggregated counts.

Django signals post_save on Transaction model are executing synchronously and calling external fraud API, blocking the request thread for 3s. We need to offload signal handlers to Celery tasks, implement async signal dispatch, and add timeout guards to external calls.

Gunicorn workers are timing out with WORKER TIMEOUT after 30s because a synchronous PDF generation task blocks the worker thread. We need to move PDF generation to Celery, increase timeout temporarily, and switch to Uvicorn workers for async-compatible endpoints.

Django select_for_update() is causing deadlocks because multiple services acquire row locks in different order during settlement. We need to enforce consistent lock ordering by primary key, reduce transaction scope, and add deadlock retry logic with exponential backoff.

Celery task routing is misconfigured, causing high-priority fraud scoring tasks to queue behind low-priority email digests. We need to define explicit queues in task_routes, configure dedicated workers for critical paths, and add queue depth alerting.

Django REST Framework serializer is silently dropping validation errors for nested writable fields because raise_exception=True isn't propagated. Invalid data persists to database. We need to override is_valid() to enforce strict validation, add field-level error aggregation, and implement serializer unit tests.

Redis cache stampede occurs when popular market data keys expire simultaneously, causing 500+ concurrent DB queries. We need to implement probabilistic early expiration, add request coalescing middleware, and configure Redis lazy expiration.

Django admin panel is vulnerable to brute force because django-axes isn't configured and login attempts aren't rate-limited. We need to install and configure axes, enforce MFA for staff accounts, and add login failure alerting.

Celery chord callback is failing because one subtask raises an unhandled exception, causing the entire group result to be lost. We need to implement error-tolerant chords, add on_error handlers, and store partial results in a dedicated tracking model.

Django timezone.now() returns naive datetimes in background tasks because USE_TZ=True isn't respected when Celery deserializes task args. This causes scheduling drift. We need to enforce timezone-aware serialization, add celery.enable_utc=True, and validate datetime parity across workers.

DRF authentication backend order is incorrect, causing JWT validation to run after session auth, which triggers unnecessary DB lookups. We need to reorder DEFAULT_AUTHENTICATION_CLASSES, prioritize token auth for API routes, and add auth benchmark tests.

Django database router is sending read queries to primary instead of replica because allow_read() returns None for unregistered apps. Read scaling is ineffective. We need to explicitly route all read operations, add replica health checks, and validate routing in integration tests.

Celery worker is silently dropping tasks because task_acks_late=True is set but the worker crashes before acknowledgment. Tasks are lost during deployments. We need to switch to early acks for idempotent tasks, implement graceful shutdown hooks, and add task delivery guarantees.

Django file upload handler is vulnerable to path traversal because os.path.join() isn't sanitized before saving to media storage. We need to use django.core.files.storage.FileSystemStorage.get_valid_name(), enforce allowlisted extensions, and add security regression tests.

DRF schema generation is missing requestBody definitions for POST endpoints because @extend_schema decorators aren't applied to custom actions. API documentation is incomplete for partners. We need to annotate all viewset actions, run schema validation in CI, and publish versioned OpenAPI specs.

Django bulk_create() is bypassing post_save signals, causing audit logs to miss batch imports. We need to implement manual signal dispatch after bulk operations, switch to bulk_create_with_history, and add audit coverage tests.

Celery beat timezone mismatch causes scheduled tasks to run 5 hours early because CELERY_TIMEZONE isn't aligned with Django TIME_ZONE. We need to unify timezone configuration, enable CELERY_ENABLE_UTC=True, and add schedule validation tests.

Django middleware execution order is incorrect, causing CORS headers to be stripped before reaching the response phase. Preflight requests fail. We need to move CorsMiddleware to the top of MIDDLEWARE, validate header propagation, and add CORS integration tests.

DRF permission classes are evaluated in wrong order, allowing unauthenticated users to hit expensive query logic before IsAuthenticated rejects them. We need to reorder permissions, implement early-exit guards, and add permission benchmark tests.

Django django.db.connections isn't closing stale connections in long-running management commands, causing InterfaceError: connection already closed. We need to call connection.close_if_unusable_or_obsolete() in loops, implement connection pooling, and add DB lifecycle monitoring.

Celery task serialization fails with EncodeError because a custom model instance is passed as an argument instead of its primary key. We need to enforce primitive task arguments, implement __reduce__ for complex objects, and add task signature validation.

Django template autoescape is disabled in a legacy reporting view, exposing XSS vector when rendering user-generated notes. We need to re-enable autoescape, sanitize input with bleach, and add template security linting to CI.

DRF APIView exception handler is swallowing IntegrityError and returning generic 500 instead of 409 Conflict. Clients can't handle duplicate submissions gracefully. We need to override handle_exception(), map DB errors to HTTP status codes, and add error response tests.

Django settings.SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in repository instead of loaded from environment variables. This violates security compliance and risks session hijacking. We need to migrate to django-environ, rotate the key immediately, and add secret scanning to pre-commit hooks.

Celery worker concurrency is set too high (-c 32) for CPU-bound risk calculations, causing context switching overhead and GIL contention. We need to reduce concurrency to match CPU cores, switch to prefork for CPU tasks, and monitor worker throughput.

Django QuerySet.iterator() is loading entire result set into memory because chunk_size isn't specified, causing OOM during data exports. We need to set chunk_size=2000, implement streaming CSV response, and add memory profiling to export jobs.

DRF ModelViewSet is exposing sensitive fields like internal_notes because fields = '__all__' is used in serializer. We need to explicitly whitelist fields, implement role-based field filtering, and add serializer security audits.

Django django.contrib.sessions is using database backend with high write volume, causing table bloat and slow cleanup. We need to switch to Redis session backend, configure session expiry, and add session storage metrics.

Celery task retry logic is causing infinite loops because max_retries=None is set and the failure condition is permanent. We need to cap retries, implement dead letter routing, and add retry exhaustion alerting.

Django django-debug-toolbar is enabled in production due to misconfigured INTERNAL_IPS, exposing query plans and settings. We need to disable toolbar outside development, enforce environment-based toggles, and add security configuration checks.

DRF pagination page_size_query_param allows clients to request 10000 items, causing memory exhaustion and slow queries. We need to enforce max_page_size=100, validate query parameters, and add pagination limit tests.

Django post_migrate signal is failing because it references a model that hasn't been created yet in the migration order. We need to defer signal execution, use apps.get_model(), and add migration dependency validation.

Celery result backend Redis is filling up because task results aren't expiring. result_expires isn't configured. We need to set TTL to 24h, implement result cleanup cron, and monitor Redis memory usage.

Django F() expression is causing race condition in balance updates because multiple requests read stale values before commit. We need to wrap updates in transaction.atomic(), use select_for_update(), and add concurrency tests.

DRF FileUploadParser is rejecting valid multipart requests because Content-Type header includes charset parameter. We need to implement tolerant content-type checking, update parser configuration, and add upload compatibility tests.

Django django.core.cache is using LocMemCache in production, causing cache inconsistency across multiple Gunicorn workers. We need to switch to Redis backend, validate cache sharing, and add cache parity tests.

Celery worker is failing to connect to broker because RabbitMQ virtual host permissions were reset during maintenance. Tasks queue indefinitely. We need to restore vhost permissions, implement broker health checks, and add connection retry logic.

Django manage.py collectstatic is failing because S3 bucket policy denies PutObject for the IAM role used by CI. Static assets aren't deployed. We need to update bucket policy, validate IAM permissions, and add static deployment smoke tests.

DRF TokenAuthentication is vulnerable to replay attacks because tokens never expire and aren't rotated. We need to implement token expiry, add refresh mechanism, and enforce token rotation on password change.

Django django.contrib.auth password reset is sending tokens with weak entropy because SECRET_KEY was recently rotated and old tokens are still valid. We need to invalidate existing tokens, enforce token versioning, and add reset security tests.

Celery task priority is ignored because RabbitMQ queue isn't configured with x-max-priority. Critical fraud tasks wait behind digests. We need to enable priority queues, redeclare bindings, and validate priority routing.

Django django.db.models.Q objects are combined incorrectly in dynamic filters, causing cartesian joins and slow queries. We need to refactor filter builder, use reduce(operator.and_, ...), and add query plan validation.

DRF HyperlinkedModelSerializer is generating incorrect URLs because request context isn't passed to serializer in background tasks. Links break in email notifications. We need to mock request context, use absolute URI builders, and add link generation tests.

Django django.middleware.security.SecurityMiddleware isn't enforcing SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS, leaving site vulnerable to protocol downgrade attacks. We need to configure HSTS headers, enable preload, and add security header validation.

Celery worker is leaking database connections because tasks don't close connections on exception. Pool exhausts after 2 hours. We need to wrap tasks in django.db.close_old_connections(), implement connection lifecycle hooks, and add leak detection.

Django django.contrib.admin list view is timing out because list_filter triggers full table scans on unindexed foreign keys. We need to add database indexes, disable expensive filters, and implement async admin views.

DRF ValidationError messages are exposing internal field names and model structure to clients. We need to override error messages, implement user-friendly validation responses, and add error sanitization tests.

Django django.core.mail is blocking request thread because SMTP backend is synchronous and mail server responds slowly. We need to switch to async email backend, offload to Celery, and add email delivery monitoring.

Celery beat is creating zombie processes because child tasks aren't reaped after worker restart. We need to enable worker_max_tasks_per_child, implement process supervision, and monitor worker PID tree.

Django django.db.transaction.atomic() is nested incorrectly, causing savepoint rollback to abort outer transaction. We need to flatten transaction boundaries, use savepoint=False where appropriate, and add transaction flow tests.

DRF APIView is missing throttle_classes for public endpoints, allowing scrapers to exhaust rate limits. We need to apply anonymous throttling, implement CAPTCHA for abuse, and add throttle coverage tests.

Django django.contrib.sites framework is returning wrong domain because SITE_ID isn't configured per environment. Email links point to staging. We need to environment-configure sites, validate domain resolution, and add multi-site tests.

Celery task is failing with DecodeError because broker message compression is enabled but worker lacks brotli dependency. We need to align compression libraries, disable compression temporarily, and add dependency parity checks.

Django django.forms.ModelForm is saving incomplete data because clean() method doesn't call super().clean(). Validation is bypassed. We need to enforce super calls, add form validation linting, and implement form test coverage.
DRF Router is generating conflicting URL patterns because custom viewset actions use same suffix. We need to rename actions, use url_path explicitly, and add URL resolution tests.

Django django.contrib.contenttypes generic foreign key is causing slow queries because reverse lookups can't use indexes. We need to replace with explicit foreign keys, add polymorphic models, and validate query performance.

Celery worker is consuming 100% CPU on idle because worker_pool is set to eventlet but tasks use blocking stdlib. We need to switch to prefork, patch stdlib with eventlet.monkey_patch(), and monitor CPU utilization.

Django django.middleware.csrf.CsrfViewMiddleware is rejecting valid POST requests because CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE=True but site is accessed over HTTP in internal network. We need to configure CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS, enable secure cookies only in prod, and add CSRF environment tests.

DRF SerializerMethodField is executing N+1 queries because it accesses related objects without prefetch. We need to move logic to annotated querysets, implement Prefetch, and add serializer performance tests.

Django django.contrib.auth.models.User username field is case-sensitive, causing duplicate accounts with different casing. We need to enforce case-insensitive lookup, add unique citext index, and migrate existing duplicates.
Celery task is retrying on KeyboardInterrupt, causing graceful shutdown to hang. We need to exclude system exceptions from retry, implement signal handlers, and add shutdown validation tests.

Django django.core.files.storage default storage is writing to container ephemeral disk instead of S3. Uploaded documents are lost on pod restart. We need to configure DEFAULT_FILE_STORAGE, validate storage backend, and add persistence tests.

DRF pagination.PageNumberPagination is returning inconsistent results because queryset isn't ordered deterministically. We need to add ordering=['-created_at', 'id'], validate pagination stability, and add order enforcement tests.

Django django.db.models.signals.pre_delete is cascading deletes incorrectly, removing audit records that should be preserved. We need to override on_delete=PROTECT, implement soft deletes, and add cascade validation tests.

Celery worker is failing to serialize Decimal objects because JSON encoder isn't configured. Tasks crash on financial payloads. We need to implement custom JSON encoder, switch to pickle for internal tasks, and add serialization tests.

Django django.contrib.messages framework is losing messages across redirects because session backend is misconfigured. Users don't see success notifications. We need to validate session storage, enable cookie fallback, and add message flow tests.

DRF permissions.DjangoModelPermissions is denying access because user lacks view permission, which isn't created by default. We need to enable django.contrib.auth view permissions, assign groups, and add permission matrix tests.

Django django.db.backends.postgresql is logging slow queries but LOGGING config isn't routing them to dedicated file. Debugging is difficult. We need to configure database logger, set threshold to 500ms, and add log rotation.
Celery beat is scheduling tasks in past because system clock drifted and NTP isn't synchronized. We need to enable NTP, configure CELERY_BEAT_SCHEDULER tolerance, and add clock skew monitoring.

Django django.template.loaders.app_directories.Loader is failing to find templates after app restructuring. We need to update DIRS configuration, validate template paths, and add template discovery tests.
DRF exceptions.APIException default status code is 500, masking client errors. We need to subclass with appropriate 4xx codes, implement error mapping, and add exception hierarchy tests.

Django django.contrib.auth.password_validation isn't enforcing complexity rules because validators aren't listed in AUTH_PASSWORD_VALIDATORS. Weak passwords are accepted. We need to configure validators, enforce rotation, and add password policy tests.
Celery worker is blocking on requests.get() without timeout, causing thread starvation. We need to set timeout=5, implement circuit breaker, and add network call guards.

Django django.db.models.Manager custom method is returning unevaluated QuerySet, causing template rendering to hit DB. We need to evaluate explicitly, add caching, and validate query execution points.

DRF viewsets.GenericViewSet is missing queryset attribute, causing AssertionError on initialization. We need to define queryset or override get_queryset(), add viewset validation, and implement startup checks.
Django django.contrib.staticfiles is serving debug assets in production because DEBUG=True leaked to env. We need to enforce DEBUG=False, validate settings loading, and add environment parity checks.
Celery task is modifying shared mutable default argument, causing state bleed across invocations. We need to use None defaults, instantiate inside function, and add task isolation tests.

Django django.core.cache.backends.redis.RedisCache is failing because Redis URL lacks password authentication. Connection refused. We need to configure credentials, validate connection string, and add cache health checks.
DRF serializers.ListSerializer is validating items sequentially, causing timeout on bulk uploads. We need to implement parallel validation, batch database writes, and add bulk performance tests.
Django django.contrib.admin autocomplete fields are slow because search queries lack trigram indexes. We need to add pg_trgm indexes, limit search fields, and optimize admin queries.
Celery worker is failing to import task module because circular import occurs at module level. We need to defer imports, restructure dependencies, and add import validation tests.

Django django.db.models.DateTimeField auto_now_add is updating on bulk updates, breaking audit trails. We need to disable auto_now for bulk ops, implement manual timestamps, and add temporal integrity tests.
DRF authentication.SessionAuthentication is enforcing CSRF on API calls, breaking mobile clients. We need to switch to token auth for API, exempt mobile user agents, and add auth routing tests.
Django django.contrib.humanize template filters are causing localization errors because USE_L10N is disabled. We need to enable localization, validate format files, and add i18n template tests.
Celery task is logging sensitive PII because task_repr includes full arguments. We need to implement repr sanitization, exclude sensitive fields, and add log privacy checks.

Django django.db.models.signals.m2m_changed is firing multiple times during form save, causing duplicate webhook calls. We need to debounce signals, use transaction.on_commit(), and add signal deduplication tests.
DRF parsers.JSONParser is rejecting requests with charset=utf-8 in Content-Type. We need to update parser media type regex, implement tolerant parsing, and add content-type compatibility tests.
