Django django.contrib.sessions.middleware.SessionMiddleware is creating new session on every request because cookie isn't persisting. We need to validate SESSION_COOKIE_DOMAIN, check secure flags, and add session persistence tests.
Celery worker is failing to acknowledge tasks because broker connection drops during long-running jobs. We need to enable heartbeats, implement connection retry, and add broker stability monitoring.
Django django.core.management.call_command() is running synchronously in request cycle, blocking for 10s. We need to offload to async task, implement command queue, and add management command guards.
DRF filters.SearchFilter is causing slow queries because it uses icontains on multiple unindexed fields. We need to implement full-text search, add database indexes, and optimize search logic.

Django django.contrib.auth.backends.ModelBackend is case-sensitive for email login, causing authentication failures. We need to implement case-insensitive backend, normalize emails, and add auth parity tests.

Celery task is raising SoftTimeLimitExceeded but cleanup code isn't executing, leaving resources locked. We need to catch soft limit exception, implement finally blocks, and add timeout recovery tests.

Django django.db.models.expressions.RawSQL is vulnerable to injection because parameters aren't passed separately. We need to use parameterized queries, validate raw SQL usage, and add security linting.
DRF renderers.BrowsableAPIRenderer is enabled in production, exposing interactive API console. We need to disable renderer outside dev, restrict by IP, and add renderer configuration checks.

Django django.contrib.contenttypes.models.ContentType cache is stale after migration, causing generic relation errors. We need to clear contenttype cache, implement post-migration hooks, and add CT validation tests.
Celery worker is spawning too many child processes because worker_max_tasks_per_child isn't set, causing memory bloat. We need to cap task count, enable process recycling, and monitor worker memory.
Django django.template.context_processors.request isn't included, causing template URL generation to fail. We need to add context processor, validate template rendering, and add context parity tests.

DRF versioning.NamespaceVersioning is failing because URL namespaces aren't configured correctly. API version resolution breaks. We need to align namespaces, validate version routing, and add versioning tests.
Django django.contrib.postgres.fields.JSONField is querying slowly because GIN index isn't created. We need to add GinIndex, optimize containment queries, and validate index usage.
Celery task is failing because Django app registry isn't ready when worker imports modules. We need to defer model imports, use apps.get_model(), and add worker startup validation.

Django django.middleware.common.CommonMiddleware is appending slash incorrectly, causing POST data loss on redirect. We need to disable APPEND_SLASH for API routes, validate redirect behavior, and add middleware tests.
DRF serializers.ImageField is accepting SVG files, exposing XSS vector. We need to restrict allowed extensions, validate file headers, and add upload security tests.

Django django.contrib.auth.views.PasswordResetView is leaking existence of emails through timing differences. We need to implement constant-time response, add rate limiting, and enumerate security tests.

Celery worker is failing to route tasks because task_default_queue is misconfigured. Tasks go to celery queue instead of dedicated. We need to fix routing config, validate queue assignment, and add routing tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet exists() is called before iteration, causing double query. We need to remove redundant checks, optimize query patterns, and add query count linting.
DRF permissions.AllowAny is applied to sensitive endpoint by mistake. We need to audit permission classes, enforce default deny, and add permission coverage tests.

Django django.contrib.sitemaps is generating URLs with wrong protocol because request.is_secure() returns false behind proxy. We need to configure SECURE_PROXY_SSL_HEADER, validate URL generation, and add sitemap tests.
Celery task is blocking event loop because it uses synchronous urllib inside async context. We need to switch to aiohttp, run in executor, and add async compatibility tests.
Django django.core.validators.EmailValidator is rejecting valid internationalized emails. We need to upgrade to email-validator library, implement IDN support, and add email validation tests.
DRF pagination.CursorPagination is failing because queryset lacks unique ordering field. We need to add deterministic ordering, validate cursor stability, and add pagination edge case tests.
Django django.contrib.admin inlines are causing N+1 queries because related objects aren't prefetched. We need to override get_queryset(), add prefetch_related, and optimize admin views.
Celery worker is failing to decode task because producer uses pickle but worker only accepts JSON. We need to align accept_content, enforce JSON serialization, and add content-type validation.

Django django.db.models.signals.post_save is triggering recursive saves because signal handler calls instance.save(). We need to use update_fields, disable signals temporarily, and add recursion guards.
DRF serializers.ModelSerializer is exposing reverse relations that trigger expensive queries. We need to remove implicit relations, implement explicit fields, and add serializer audit.
Django django.contrib.messages.storage.fallback.FallbackStorage is exceeding cookie size limit, dropping messages. We need to switch to session storage, validate message size, and add storage tests.
Celery task is retrying on DatabaseError caused by schema migration, causing infinite loop. We need to exclude migration errors, implement circuit breaker, and add retry condition validation.
Django django.template.loader.render_to_string is failing because template context lacks request object. We need to pass RequestContext, validate context processors, and add template rendering tests.
DRF viewsets.ModelViewSet destroy action is hard deleting records instead of soft delete. We need to override perform_destroy(), implement is_active flag, and add deletion policy tests.

Django django.contrib.auth.hashers.PBKDF2PasswordHasher iterations are too low for current security standards. We need to increase iterations, implement hasher upgrade path, and add password security audit.
Celery worker is failing to connect to Redis broker because TLS certificate verification fails. We need to configure broker_use_ssl, update CA bundle, and add TLS connectivity tests.

Django django.db.models.functions.Trunc is causing timezone conversion errors because database timezone differs from Django. We need to align TIME_ZONE settings, use aware datetimes, and add temporal function tests.
DRF authentication.BasicAuthentication is enabled in production, sending credentials in base64. We need to disable basic auth, enforce token/JWT, and add authentication security audit.

Django django.contrib.staticfiles.storage.ManifestStaticFilesStorage is failing because post-process step encounters missing files. We need to clean static directory, validate asset references, and add build parity tests.
Celery task is leaking file descriptors because temporary files aren't closed in exception paths. We need to use context managers, implement cleanup hooks, and add FD monitoring.
Django django.core.mail.backends.smtp.EmailBackend is failing because mail server requires STARTTLS but EMAIL_USE_TLS=False. We need to enable TLS, validate SMTP config, and add email delivery tests.
DRF serializers.DictField is accepting arbitrarily nested data, causing DoS via deep recursion. We need to limit depth, implement size validation, and add payload security tests.
Django django.contrib.admin date hierarchy navigation is slow because it queries distinct dates without index. We need to add date indexes, limit hierarchy depth, and optimize admin filters.
Celery worker is failing to execute task because Django settings module isn't specified in worker command. We need to set DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE, validate environment, and add worker startup checks.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet update() is bypassing model validation and signals. We need to implement bulk update with validation, use bulk_update(), and add data integrity tests.
DRF parsers.MultiPartParser is failing on large uploads because DATA_UPLOAD_MAX_MEMORY_SIZE is too low. We need to increase limit, implement streaming upload, and add upload capacity tests.

Django django.contrib.sessions.backends.cache is losing sessions because Redis eviction policy is set to allkeys-lru. We need to switch to volatile-lru, reserve memory for sessions, and add session persistence tests.
Celery task is failing because it imports Django models at module level, causing AppRegistryNotReady. We need to defer imports, use lazy loading, and add import order validation.

Django django.middleware.clickjacking.XFrameOptionsMiddleware is set to DENY, breaking legitimate iframe embedding for partners. We need to configure SAMEORIGIN, implement allowlist, and add frame policy tests.
DRF serializers.ListField child validation is running sequentially, causing timeout on large arrays. We need to implement parallel validation, batch processing, and add list performance tests.
Django django.contrib.auth.views.LoginView is redirecting to unsafe next parameter, enabling open redirect. We need to validate redirect URL, implement allowlist, and add security regression tests.
Celery worker is consuming messages but not processing because task name doesn't match registered name. We need to align task decorators, validate registry, and add task discovery tests.

Django django.db.models.fields.files.FileField is storing absolute paths instead of relative, breaking media serving after migration. We need to normalize paths, update storage backend, and add file path tests.
DRF viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet is exposing write endpoints because router configuration is incorrect. We need to verify router registration, restrict HTTP methods, and add endpoint audit.

Django django.contrib.contenttypes generic relations are causing slow admin changelist because reverse lookups can't be optimized. We need to denormalize critical fields, add caching, and optimize admin queries.
Celery task is failing with WorkerLostError because OOM killer terminates worker during large data processing. We need to implement chunking, increase memory limits, and add memory profiling.
Django django.template.defaultfilters.truncatewords is breaking HTML tags, causing malformed rendering. We need to use truncatechars_html, implement safe truncation, and add template filter tests.
DRF authentication.TokenAuthentication isn't checking token expiry, allowing revoked tokens to work. We need to implement expiry validation, add token rotation, and enforce session invalidation.

Django django.contrib.sites current site lookup is hitting database on every request because cache isn't enabled. We need to enable site caching, validate cache keys, and add site lookup optimization.
Celery worker is failing to send task results because result backend URL is misconfigured. We need to validate backend settings, test connectivity, and add result delivery monitoring.
Django django.db.models.signals.pre_save is modifying instance fields, causing infinite save loop when combined with auto_now. We need to use update_fields, separate logic, and add signal flow tests.
DRF serializers.HiddenField is exposing default value in schema documentation. We need to exclude from schema, implement write_only=True, and add schema security audit.
Django django.contrib.admin raw_id_fields is slow because related model has millions of records. We need to implement autocomplete fields, add search indexes, and optimize admin UX.
Celery task is retrying on validation error, which will never succeed. We need to exclude client errors from retry, implement error classification, and add retry policy validation.

Django django.core.cache key generation is colliding because prefix isn't environment-specific. Staging cache overwrites production. We need to add env prefix, validate key namespace, and add cache isolation tests.

DRF viewsets.ModelViewSet list endpoint is returning unfiltered queryset, exposing cross-tenant data. We need to implement get_queryset() tenant filtering, add data isolation tests, and audit multi-tenancy.
Django django.contrib.auth user creation is failing because custom user model lacks USERNAME_FIELD. We need to configure field, validate model requirements, and add user model tests.
Celery worker is failing to heartbeat because network latency exceeds broker timeout. We need to increase heartbeat interval, implement connection pooling, and add network stability monitoring.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet count() is slow on complex filtered querysets. We need to implement approximate counts, add materialized views, and optimize count queries.
DRF serializers.Serializer is missing create() method, causing AssertionError on POST. We need to implement create/update, validate serializer completeness, and add write operation tests.
Django django.contrib.messages is using cookie storage with large payloads, exceeding 4KB limit. We need to switch to session storage, validate message size, and add storage fallback tests.
Celery task is blocking because it waits for synchronous HTTP response without timeout. We need to implement async calls, add circuit breaker, and enforce timeout policies.

Django django.template.context_processors.media isn't configured, causing MEDIA_URL to be undefined in templates. We need to add context processor, validate media rendering, and add template context tests.
DRF permissions.IsAdminUser is denying access because is_staff flag isn't set for support team. We need to implement custom permission class, align roles, and add access control tests.
Django django.contrib.postgres.search.SearchVector is slow because tsvector column isn't indexed. We need to add GIN index, implement search vector field, and optimize full-text search.

Celery worker is failing to deserialize task because producer uses different serializer version. We need to pin serializer versions, implement backward compatibility, and add serialization parity tests.

Django django.db.models.signals.post_delete is failing because it references deleted instance foreign key. We need to cache related data before delete, implement safe signal handlers, and add deletion tests.

DRF renderers.JSONRenderer is serializing Decimals as strings, breaking client parsers. We need to configure COERCE_DECIMAL_TO_STRING=False, validate numeric serialization, and add format parity tests.

Django django.contrib.sessions is creating excessive database rows because session cleanup cron isn't running. We need to enable clearsessions command, automate cleanup, and monitor session table size.

Celery task is failing because it accesses request object, which isn't available in worker context. We need to pass required data explicitly, remove request dependency, and add task context validation.
Django django.core.validators.URLValidator is rejecting valid internal URLs because scheme isn't http/https. We need to extend validator, allow custom schemes, and add URL validation tests.
DRF filters.OrderingFilter allows ordering by sensitive fields like password_hash. We need to restrict ordering_fields, implement allowlist, and add ordering security tests.
Django django.contrib.admin list_editable is causing race conditions when multiple admins edit same page. We need to implement optimistic locking, add version field, and validate concurrent edits.
Celery worker is failing to connect to database because connection string lacks SSL mode. We need to configure sslmode=require, update credentials, and add DB connectivity tests.

Django django.db.models.functions.Cast is failing because target type isn't supported by database backend. We need to use database-specific expressions, validate cast compatibility, and add cross-db tests.
DRF authentication.SessionAuthentication is creating sessions for API clients, bloating session table. We need to disable session auth for API, enforce token auth, and add auth routing tests.
Django django.contrib.staticfiles finders are scanning unnecessary directories, slowing startup. We need to configure STATICFILES_DIRS, exclude node_modules, and optimize static discovery.
Celery task is retrying on IntegrityError, causing duplicate key violations on each retry. We need to catch constraint errors, implement idempotency, and add retry condition validation.
Django django.template.loader.get_template is failing because template name contains directory traversal characters. We need to sanitize input, enforce allowlist, and add template security tests.
DRF serializers.FileField is storing files in wrong directory because upload_to callable returns absolute path. We need to return relative path, validate storage behavior, and add upload path tests.

Django django.contrib.auth.password_validation.MinimumLengthValidator isn't enforced because it's commented out in settings. Weak passwords accepted. We need to enable validators, audit config, and add password policy tests.
Celery worker is failing to acknowledge task because broker queue is full and flow control is enabled. We need to increase queue limits, implement backpressure, and add broker capacity monitoring.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet first() is returning arbitrary record because queryset isn't ordered. We need to add explicit ordering, validate deterministic results, and add query stability tests.
DRF viewsets.ViewSet custom action is missing detail parameter, causing URL resolution error. We need to specify detail=True/False, validate router config, and add action routing tests.
Django django.contrib.contenttypes is creating duplicate ContentType entries after database restore. We need to run update_contenttypes, validate CT integrity, and add post-restore hooks.
Celery task is failing because it uses global mutable state, causing cross-request data bleed. We need to eliminate globals, use task-local storage, and add isolation tests.

Django django.middleware.locale.LocaleMiddleware is setting wrong language because accept-language parsing is incorrect. We need to configure LANGUAGES, validate locale resolution, and add i18n tests.

DRF serializers.PrimaryKeyRelatedField is validating against wrong queryset, allowing cross-tenant references. We need to override get_queryset(), enforce tenant scoping, and add relation security tests.
Django django.contrib.admin search is slow because it uses icontains on multiple text fields without indexes. We need to implement full-text search, add trigram indexes, and optimize admin search.
Celery worker is failing to start because celery_app isn't autodiscovering tasks. We need to configure include, validate task registry, and add discovery tests.
Django django.db.models.fields.DecimalField is losing precision because database column scale is insufficient. We need to increase decimal_places, run migration, and add precision validation tests.
DRF parsers.JSONParser is failing on large payloads because DATA_UPLOAD_MAX_NUMBER_FIELDS is exceeded. We need to increase limit, implement streaming parser, and add payload capacity tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions cookie is accessible via JavaScript because SESSION_COOKIE_HTTPONLY=False. We need to enable httponly, validate cookie flags, and add session security audit.
Celery task is failing because it imports settings directly instead of using django.conf.settings. We need to refactor imports, validate configuration access, and add settings usage linting.
Django django.template.defaulttags.url is failing because URL name doesn't exist after refactor. We need to update template references, validate URL routing, and add template link tests.

DRF permissions.DjangoObjectPermissions is denying access because backend doesn't support row-level permissions. We need to implement custom permission backend, add object-level checks, and validate access control.
Django django.contrib.postgres.fields.ArrayField is querying slowly because containment operator isn't indexed. We need to add GIN index, optimize array queries, and validate index usage.
Celery worker is failing to route task because exchange type is misconfigured. We need to align exchange declarations, validate routing keys, and add broker topology tests.
Django django.db.models.signals.m2m_changed is firing with empty pk_set when clearing relations, causing errors. We need to handle clear action, validate signal payload, and add m2m signal tests.
DRF serializers.ModelSerializer is creating nested objects instead of linking existing ones. We need to implement custom create(), handle nested writes, and add relation write tests.
Django django.contrib.messages is failing because middleware isn't installed. We need to add MessageMiddleware, validate order, and add message framework tests.
Celery task is retrying on TimeoutError but retry delay is too short, causing rapid fire. We need to implement exponential backoff, configure jitter, and add retry timing tests.
Django django.core.mail is failing because email backend isn't configured for environment. We need to set EMAIL_BACKEND, validate SMTP/console routing, and add email config tests.
DRF viewsets.ModelViewSet is allowing PATCH on read-only fields. We need to set read_only=True, validate field permissions, and add write protection tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is exposing sensitive model fields in list display. We need to audit list_display, remove sensitive columns, and add admin security review.
Celery worker is failing because task module has syntax error, preventing worker startup. We need to fix syntax, add pre-import validation, and implement worker health checks.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet aggregate() is returning None when queryset is empty, causing TypeError. We need to handle None case, use Coalesce, and add aggregation edge case tests.
DRF authentication is failing because token prefix isn't stripped correctly. We need to implement robust header parsing, validate token format, and add auth header tests.
Django django.contrib.staticfiles is serving wrong file because multiple apps have same static path. We need to namespace static directories, validate asset resolution, and add static conflict tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses time.sleep() instead of async delay, blocking worker. We need to remove blocking calls, implement ETA scheduling, and add worker concurrency tests.
Django django.template.context_processors.debug is enabled in production, exposing stack traces. We need to disable debug context, validate settings, and add security configuration checks.

DRF serializers.ListSerializer is failing because child serializer raises validation error, aborting entire batch. We need to implement partial batch validation, collect errors, and add bulk error handling tests.
Django django.contrib.auth login is failing because session engine is misconfigured. We need to validate SESSION_ENGINE, test session creation, and add auth flow tests.
Celery worker is failing to connect because broker URL uses wrong protocol. We need to align protocol (amqp/redis), validate connection string, and add broker connectivity tests.
Django django.db.models.fields.DateField is accepting invalid dates because database constraint isn't enforced. We need to add CheckConstraint, validate date ranges, and add temporal integrity tests.
DRF parsers.FormParser is failing because request body is JSON but content-type is form-urlencoded. We need to validate content-type, implement parser fallback, and add request format tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is vulnerable to fixation because session ID isn't rotated on login. We need to call cycle_key(), implement rotation, and add session security tests.
Celery task is failing because it accesses database before transaction commits, reading stale data. We need to use transaction.on_commit(), defer task dispatch, and add transaction timing tests.
Django django.template.defaultfilters.safe is misused, rendering untrusted HTML. We need to remove safe filter, implement sanitization, and add template security audit.
DRF viewsets.GenericViewSet is missing serializer_class, causing AttributeError on request. We need to define serializer, validate viewset config, and add startup checks.

Django django.contrib.postgres.operations.CreateExtension is failing because database user lacks superuser privileges. We need to grant extension creation rights, validate permissions, and add migration privilege tests.
Celery worker is failing because task signature doesn't match calling arguments. We need to align task parameters, validate signatures, and add task call tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet distinct() is failing on MySQL because it doesn't support distinct on fields. We need to refactor query, use subqueries, and add cross-db compatibility tests.
DRF serializers.SerializerMethodField is returning None because method name doesn't match get_<field_name>. We need to align naming, validate method resolution, and add serializer method tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is slow because list_select_related isn't configured for foreign keys. We need to add select_related, optimize admin queries, and validate admin performance.
Celery worker is failing because broker heartbeat timeout is too aggressive for slow network. We need to increase heartbeat, configure tolerance, and add network latency monitoring.

Django django.core.cache is failing because cache backend version mismatch causes deserialization errors. We need to align cache library versions, implement versioned keys, and add cache compatibility tests.
DRF permissions.IsAuthenticatedOrReadOnly is allowing unauthenticated POST because method check is incorrect. We need to fix permission logic, validate HTTP method routing, and add permission tests.

Django django.contrib.contenttypes generic foreign key is causing integrity errors because referenced object is deleted. We need to implement cascade protection, add validation, and test generic relation integrity.
Celery task is failing because it uses print() instead of logger, losing output in production. We need to replace with logging, configure log handlers, and add logging standards enforcement.
Django django.db.models.signals.post_save is sending webhook synchronously, blocking request. We need to offload to Celery, implement async dispatch, and add signal performance tests.
DRF renderers.BrowsableAPIRenderer is loading slowly because it renders large dataset in HTML. We need to limit browsable data, disable in prod, and add renderer performance tests.
Django django.contrib.auth password reset token is valid for too long (default 3 days). We need to reduce PASSWORD_RESET_TIMEOUT, implement shorter expiry, and add token security tests.
Celery worker is failing because task queue is declared as durable but broker doesn't support it. We need to align queue declarations, validate broker capabilities, and add queue config tests.
Django django.template.loader is failing because template directory permissions are incorrect. We need to fix permissions, validate access, and add template loading tests.
DRF serializers.ImageField is failing because Pillow isn't installed. We need to add dependency, validate image processing, and add image upload tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is storing sensitive data in session, violating compliance. We need to audit session payload, remove PII, and add session data validation.
Celery task is failing because it modifies Django settings at runtime, affecting other tasks. We need to eliminate runtime settings changes, use task-local config, and add settings isolation tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet update_or_create() is causing race condition because lookup isn't atomic. We need to wrap in transaction, add unique constraint, and implement retry logic.
DRF viewsets.ModelViewSet is allowing bulk delete without confirmation. We need to override destroy(), implement safety checks, and add deletion guard tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is exposing raw password hashes in export. We need to exclude sensitive fields, implement export filters, and add admin export security audit.
Celery worker is failing because task result backend is disabled but task expects return value. We need to enable result backend or set ignore_result, validate config, and add result routing tests.
Django django.core.validators.RegexValidator is causing catastrophic backtracking on malicious input. We need to optimize regex, add timeout, and implement input length limits.
DRF authentication is failing because token isn't URL-safe, breaking email links. We need to use URL-safe encoding, validate token format, and add token generation tests.
Django django.contrib.staticfiles is failing because STATIC_ROOT isn't writable by deployment user. We need to fix permissions, validate deployment steps, and add static collection tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses datetime.now() instead of timezone.now(), causing timezone errors. We need to enforce aware datetimes, validate temporal logic, and add timezone tests.
Django django.db.models.fields.EmailField isn't validating domain existence, allowing disposable emails. We need to implement domain verification, add blocklist, and enhance email validation.
DRF serializers.ModelSerializer is failing because extra_kwargs references non-existent field. We need to validate kwargs, align with model fields, and add serializer config tests.
Django django.contrib.messages is failing because django.contrib.sessions isn't in INSTALLED_APPS. We need to add dependency, validate app order, and add framework integration tests.
Celery worker is failing because task routing key contains invalid characters. We need to sanitize keys, validate routing config, and add broker message tests.
Django django.template.defaulttags.if is evaluating expensive queryset in condition, causing slow rendering. We need to evaluate in view, pass boolean, and optimize template logic.
DRF permissions class is missing has_object_permission, causing AttributeError on detail views. We need to implement method, validate permission classes, and add object-level tests.
Django django.contrib.postgres.fields.JSONField is failing because database version doesn't support jsonb. We need to verify Postgres version, fallback to text, and add db compatibility tests.
Celery task is failing because it catches Exception broadly, masking real errors. We need to catch specific exceptions, implement error logging, and add exception handling standards.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet exists() is called on sliced queryset, causing error. We need to remove slice before exists, validate query patterns, and add ORM usage linting.
DRF viewsets custom action is missing methods parameter, defaulting to GET only. We need to specify methods, validate action config, and add HTTP method tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because list_filter references non-existent field. We need to validate filter config, align with model, and add admin configuration tests.
Celery worker is failing because task concurrency is set to 0, disabling execution. We need to set positive concurrency, validate worker config, and add startup validation.
Django django.core.mail is failing because DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL isn't configured. We need to set default email, validate mail config, and add email settings tests.
DRF serializers is failing because many=True is passed to non-list serializer. We need to validate serializer instantiation, align with payload, and add serialization tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because AUTH_USER_MODEL references non-existent model. We need to validate setting, ensure app readiness, and add user model tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses os.system() instead of subprocess, causing shell injection risk. We need to switch to subprocess, sanitize commands, and add security audit.
Django django.template.context_processors is missing static, causing STATIC_URL undefined. We need to add processor, validate context, and add template variable tests.
DRF parsers is failing because request encoding isn't UTF-8, causing decode error. We need to enforce UTF-8, implement fallback, and add encoding validation tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because SESSION_COOKIE_AGE is too short, logging users out frequently. We need to increase age, validate session config, and add UX tests.
Celery worker is failing because task queue isn't declared, causing NotFound error. We need to declare queue, validate topology, and add broker setup tests.
Django django.db.models.fields.SlugField is allowing duplicates because unique=True isn't set. We need to add uniqueness, validate slug generation, and add integrity tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because lookup_field references non-unique field, causing MultipleObjectsReturned. We need to use unique field, validate lookup config, and add detail view tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because search_fields references related field without __ syntax. We need to fix syntax, validate search config, and add admin search tests.
Celery task is failing because it returns non-serializable object, causing encode error. We need to return primitives, implement serialization, and add task return tests.
Django django.core.cache is failing because CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS is too high, serving stale pages. We need to reduce TTL, implement cache busting, and add cache freshness tests.
DRF serializers is failing because validators list contains incompatible validator. We need to align validators, validate field config, and add validation tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL points to non-existent view. We need to fix URL, validate redirect config, and add auth flow tests.
Celery worker is failing because task priority isn't supported by broker version. We need to upgrade broker, disable priority, and add compatibility tests.
Django django.template.defaultfilters.date is failing because input isn't datetime object. We need to validate input type, implement safe filter, and add template filter tests.
DRF permissions is failing because DjangoModelPermissions requires view permission which isn't granted. We need to assign permissions, validate access matrix, and add role tests.
Django django.contrib.postgres is failing because HStoreField isn't enabled in database. We need to create extension, validate field support, and add db feature tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses requests session without closing, leaking connections. We need to use context manager, implement session pooling, and add connection lifecycle tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet bulk_create() is failing because batch size exceeds database limit. We need to chunk batches, validate size, and add bulk operation tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because pagination_class is set to None but client expects paginated response. We need to restore pagination, validate response format, and add API contract tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because readonly_fields references callable that raises exception. We need to handle errors, validate callables, and add admin display tests.
Celery worker is failing because task ack timeout is too short for long jobs. We need to increase timeout, implement heartbeat, and add task duration monitoring.
Django django.core.validators is failing because MinValueValidator is applied to CharField. We need to align validators with field types, validate config, and add field validation tests.
DRF serializers is failing because source argument references non-existent model attribute. We need to fix source mapping, validate serializer fields, and add source resolution tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because SESSION_ENGINE points to removed backend. We need to update engine, validate backend availability, and add session config tests.
Celery task is failing because it modifies queryset in place, causing unexpected side effects. We need to clone querysets, enforce immutability, and add ORM safety tests.
Django django.template.loader is failing because template name contains spaces, causing resolution error. We need to sanitize names, validate template paths, and add naming convention checks.
DRF authentication is failing because token header uses wrong prefix. We need to standardize prefix, validate header parsing, and add auth header tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because choices isn't iterable, causing migration error. We need to fix choices definition, validate field config, and add migration tests.
Celery worker is failing because task result expires before consumer reads it. We need to increase expiry, align TTL with SLA, and add result lifecycle monitoring.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because fieldsets references missing field. We need to align fieldsets with model, validate admin config, and add form layout tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because filter_backends aren't installed, causing import error. We need to add dependencies, validate imports, and add filter configuration tests.
Django django.core.mail is failing because attachment path doesn't exist, raising FileNotFoundError. We need to validate paths, handle missing files, and add email attachment tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses logging.basicConfig() overriding Django config. We need to remove basicConfig, use Django logging, and add log configuration validation.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet annotate() is causing ambiguous column error because alias clashes with field name. We need to rename alias, validate annotations, and add query compilation tests.
DRF serializers is failing because write_only field is included in response serialization. We need to enforce write_only behavior, validate serialization flow, and add field visibility tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because password hasher isn't available in environment. We need to install hasher library, validate algorithm support, and add password config tests.
Celery worker is failing because task queue binding is missing, causing messages to drop. We need to declare bindings, validate routing, and add broker topology tests.
Django django.template.defaulttags.block is failing because parent template doesn't define block. We need to align template inheritance, validate blocks, and add template structure tests.
DRF permissions is failing because custom permission class lacks message attribute. We need to add message, validate permission structure, and add error response tests.
Django django.contrib.postgres is failing because ArrayField base field isn't supported. We need to use compatible base field, validate type support, and add array field tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses eval() on user input, causing security risk. We need to remove eval, implement safe parsing, and add code injection prevention.
Django django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField is failing because default isn't callable, using fixed timestamp. We need to use timezone.now, validate defaults, and add temporal field tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because http_method_names excludes required method. We need to restore methods, validate allowed verbs, and add HTTP method tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because list_display_links references non-displayed field. We need to align links with display, validate admin config, and add list view tests.
Celery worker is failing because task serializer isn't registered, causing SerializerNotRegistered. We need to register serializer, validate config, and add serialization registry tests.
Django django.core.cache is failing because CACHES setting lacks LOCATION. We need to configure location, validate cache settings, and add cache initialization tests.

DRF serializers is failing because read_only field is passed in request data, causing validation error. We need to strip read_only fields, validate input filtering, and add request sanitization tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because SESSION_SAVE_EVERY_REQUEST causes excessive DB writes. We need to disable setting, optimize session saves, and add performance tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses sys.exit() instead of raising exception, killing worker. We need to replace with exceptions, implement graceful failure, and add worker stability tests.

Django django.template.context_processors is failing because custom processor raises exception, breaking all templates. We need to add error handling, validate processors, and add context safety tests.
DRF parsers is failing because FileUploadParser expects single file but receives multipart form. We need to switch parser, validate content type, and add upload format tests.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet values() is returning dict instead of model instances, breaking downstream code. We need to align return types, validate query usage, and add ORM contract tests.
Celery worker is failing because task routing uses exchange that doesn't exist. We need to declare exchange, validate routing config, and add broker setup validation.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS list is empty. We need to configure backends, validate auth pipeline, and add login flow tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because detail_route decorator is deprecated and removed. We need to migrate to @action, validate decorators, and add routing compatibility tests.
Django django.core.validators is failing because URLValidator doesn't accept localhost URLs in development. We need to extend validator for dev, validate environments, and add URL config tests.
Celery task is failing because it accesses request.user in worker context. We need to pass user ID explicitly, remove request dependency, and add task context validation.
Django django.template.defaultfilters.floatformat is failing because input isn't numeric. We need to validate input, implement safe formatting, and add filter type tests.
DRF serializers is failing because many=True serializer receives dict instead of list. We need to validate payload structure, implement type checking, and add serialization format tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because date_hierarchy field isn't DateField. We need to use compatible field, validate hierarchy config, and add admin filter tests.
Celery worker is failing because task queue is set to durable but messages aren't persisted. We need to align persistence settings, validate queue config, and add message durability tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because null=True and blank=False causes validation mismatch. We need to align null/blank, validate field config, and add form/model parity tests.
DRF permissions is failing because IsAdminUser checks is_staff instead of is_superuser. We need to implement correct check, validate permission logic, and add admin access tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because cookie domain doesn't match request host. We need to configure SESSION_COOKIE_DOMAIN, validate domain matching, and add session cookie tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses pickle serialization with untrusted data, causing RCE risk. We need to switch to JSON, disable pickle, and add serialization security audit.
Django django.core.mail is failing because EMAIL_HOST_USER lacks authentication permissions. We need to validate credentials, test SMTP auth, and add email connectivity tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because lookup_url_kwarg doesn't match URL pattern. We need to align kwarg with router, validate URL config, and add detail routing tests.
Django django.template.loader is failing because template engine isn't configured in TEMPLATES. We need to add engine config, validate settings, and add template initialization tests.
Celery worker is failing because task concurrency exceeds database connection limit. We need to align concurrency with pool size, implement connection sharing, and add resource limit tests.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet select_for_update() is failing because database doesn't support row locking. We need to verify DB support, implement fallback, and add locking compatibility tests.
DRF serializers is failing because create() doesn't return instance, causing TypeError. We need to return created object, validate method contract, and add serializer creation tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because LOGIN_URL setting points to removed view. We need to update URL, validate auth config, and add login redirect tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses time.time() for scheduling instead of ETA. We need to use Celery scheduling, validate timing logic, and add task dispatch tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because inlines references model without foreign key to parent. We need to add relation, validate inline config, and add admin form tests.
DRF parsers is failing because JSONParser receives empty body, causing decode error. We need to handle empty payloads, validate request body, and add parser edge case tests.
Django django.core.cache is failing because KEY_PREFIX contains invalid characters. We need to sanitize prefix, validate cache config, and add key generation tests.
Celery worker is failing because task result backend isn't configured but AsyncResult is used. We need to enable backend, validate result config, and add async result tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because unique_together references non-existent field. We need to fix constraint, validate meta options, and add model constraint tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because throttle_scope isn't defined in DEFAULT_THROTTLE_RATES. We need to configure rates, validate throttle settings, and add rate limit tests.
Django django.template.defaulttags.for is failing because iterable is None, causing TypeError. We need to handle None case, validate template context, and add loop safety tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses open() without encoding, causing UnicodeDecodeError. We need to specify UTF-8, validate file operations, and add encoding standards enforcement.

Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=True but site served over HTTP. We need to align secure flag with protocol, validate environment config, and add cookie security tests.
DRF serializers is failing because validate() method doesn't return data, causing None serialization. We need to return validated data, validate method contract, and add serializer validation tests.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet aggregate() is failing because expression references annotated field incorrectly. We need to fix expression order, validate aggregation, and add query compilation tests.
Celery worker is failing because task queue is declared with wrong routing key. We need to align keys, validate routing config, and add message routing tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because password reset email template is missing. We need to create template, validate email flow, and add password reset tests.
DRF permissions is failing because custom permission accesses request.data before parsing. We need to defer access, validate permission flow, and add permission safety tests.
Django django.core.validators is failing because MaxValueValidator is applied to date field. We need to use date-specific validator, align types, and add validation config tests.
Celery task is failing because it modifies global Django cache, causing cross-task interference. We need to use task-local cache keys, isolate state, and add cache concurrency tests.
Django django.template.context_processors is failing because request processor isn't enabled, breaking URL tags. We need to add processor, validate context, and add template dependency tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because pagination_class returns incompatible response structure. We need to align pagination format, validate response contract, and add API structure tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because default callable returns mutable object, causing shared state. We need to return new instance, validate defaults, and add field isolation tests.

Celery worker is failing because task ack is delayed but worker crashes before ack, causing duplicate execution. We need to implement idempotency, validate ack timing, and add delivery guarantee tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because list_per_page is set too high, causing memory exhaustion. We need to reduce limit, implement pagination, and add admin performance tests.
DRF serializers is failing because extra_kwargs overrides required field incorrectly. We need to validate kwargs precedence, align with model, and add serializer config tests.
Django django.core.mail is failing because EMAIL_BACKEND points to non-existent module. We need to fix import path, validate backend availability, and add email config tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses subprocess.run() without timeout, hanging worker. We need to add timeout, implement process supervision, and add execution guard tests.

Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet distinct() is failing because order_by() includes non-selected fields. We need to align ordering with distinct, validate query structure, and add ORM compatibility tests.
DRF authentication is failing because token validation queries database on every request without caching. We need to implement token cache, validate auth performance, and add auth optimization tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because session table lacks index on expire_date, slowing cleanup. We need to add index, optimize cleanup query, and add session maintenance tests.
Celery worker is failing because task priority queue isn't declared with x-max-priority. We need to enable priority support, validate queue config, and add priority routing tests.
Django django.template.defaultfilters.truncatechars is breaking words, causing poor UX. We need to use truncatewords, implement smart truncation, and add filter UX tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because filter_class is deprecated and removed in new version. We need to migrate to filterset_class, validate filter config, and add compatibility tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because choices uses lazy translation incorrectly, causing migration error. We need to use gettext_lazy, validate translations, and add i18n migration tests.
Celery task is failing because it accesses settings.DEBUG to conditionally skip logic, causing prod/dev drift. We need to use feature flags, eliminate debug checks, and add environment parity tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because AUTH_USER_MODEL swap isn't handled in migrations. We need to use swappable_dependency, validate user model refs, and add migration safety tests.
DRF serializers is failing because ListSerializer child raises SkipField, causing incomplete output. We need to handle skipped fields, validate list serialization, and add field omission tests.
Django django.core.cache is failing because TIMEOUT is set to 0, disabling cache immediately. We need to set positive TTL, validate cache config, and add cache behavior tests.
Celery worker is failing because task routing uses direct exchange but queue expects topic. We need to align exchange types, validate routing topology, and add broker config tests.
Django django.template.loader is failing because template extends non-existent parent. We need to validate inheritance chain, add template existence checks, and add structure validation tests.
DRF permissions is failing because DjangoObjectPermissions backend isn't installed. We need to add backend, validate permission pipeline, and add object-level access tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet update() is failing because it references annotated field. We need to remove annotation from update, validate query constraints, and add ORM limitation tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses logging.getLogger(__name__) but logger isn't configured. We need to configure logger, validate logging setup, and add log output tests.
Django django.contrib.admin is failing because raw_id_fields references model without admin registration. We need to register model, validate admin config, and add raw ID tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because action decorator lacks url_path, causing naming collision. We need to specify url_path, validate action routing, and add URL uniqueness tests.
Django django.core.validators is failing because RegexValidator flags aren't supported in older Python. We need to remove flags, validate compatibility, and add regex version tests.
Celery worker is failing because task result backend uses database but table isn't migrated. We need to run celery migrations, validate backend tables, and add result storage tests.
Django django.db.models.fields is failing because verbose_name contains untranslated string, causing i18n gap. We need to wrap in gettext, validate translations, and add localization tests.
DRF serializers is failing because create() doesn't handle nested writable relations. We need to implement nested creation, validate relation handling, and add complex write tests.
Django django.contrib.sessions is failing because SESSION_ENGINE uses cache but cache backend is down. We need to implement fallback, validate session resilience, and add session availability tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses random without seeding, causing non-deterministic tests. We need to seed RNG, validate determinism, and add test reproducibility checks.
Django django.template.defaulttags.ifchanged is failing because loop variable isn't tracked correctly. We need to validate loop context, fix template logic, and add iteration tests.
DRF parsers is failing because FormParser doesn't handle nested data structures. We need to switch to JSON, validate parser capabilities, and add payload format tests.
Django django.db.models.query.QuerySet exists() is called after count(), causing redundant query. We need to remove redundant calls, optimize query patterns, and add ORM efficiency linting.

Celery worker is failing because task queue is declared as auto-delete, removing queue when worker disconnects. We need to disable auto-delete, validate queue persistence, and add broker durability tests.
Django django.contrib.auth is failing because password reset token generator uses weak hash. We need to upgrade hasher, validate token security, and add cryptographic strength tests.
DRF viewsets is failing because lookup_field uses slug but URL expects integer. We need to align lookup type, validate URL config, and add detail resolution tests.
Django django.core.mail is failing because attachment MIME type isn't detected, causing client rendering issues. We need to implement MIME detection, validate attachments, and add email format tests.
Celery task is failing because it uses print() for debugging, cluttering production logs. We need to replace with logger, enforce logging standards, and add log hygiene checks.

GraphQL federation gateway is dropping distributed traces because subgraph responses lack traceparent headers. OpenTelemetry context isn't propagated across service boundaries, breaking end-to-end transaction visibility. We need to inject W3C trace context propagators in subgraph middleware, validate header forwarding, and add trace continuity tests.

gRPC server-streaming endpoint is leaking goroutines because client disconnects aren't handled in the send loop. Context cancellation isn't checked, causing blocked sends to accumulate. We need to add select on ctx.Done(), implement deferred stream cleanup, and monitor goroutine counts via pprof.

API gateway rate limiter uses local in-memory sliding window, allowing clients to bypass limits by rotating across gateway pods. Enterprise SLAs are violated during traffic spikes. We need to migrate to a Redis-backed distributed counter, implement Lua-based atomic increments, and add rate limit accuracy validation.

REST API returns 406 Not Acceptable for error responses because content negotiation doesn't recognize application/problem+json. Clients can't parse RFC 7807 error payloads, breaking automated retry logic. We need to register the media type in the response formatter, validate error serialization, and add content negotiation tests.

WebSocket connections drop silently after 60s idle because heartbeat frames aren't implemented and the reverse proxy enforces a read timeout. Traders lose live quote streams. We need to implement ping/pong frames, configure proxy_read_timeout appropriately, and add connection lifecycle monitoring.

PostgreSQL logical replication slot is accumulating WAL at 3GB/hour because the downstream analytics consumer crashed and isn't acknowledging LSN. Primary disk is at 92%. We need to drop the inactive slot, implement consumer health checks, and add WAL lag alerting with automatic slot pausing.

MongoDB aggregation pipeline hits 100MB memory limit during monthly compliance reports because the $sort stage lacks a supporting index and allowDiskUse isn't enabled. We need to add a compound index on sort fields, enable disk spilling, and monitor aggregation memory consumption.

Redis cluster returns CLUSTERDOWN during failover because replica promotion takes 8s, causing cache miss storms and database overload. We need to tune cluster-node-timeout, implement client-side retry with exponential backoff, and validate failover behavior with chaos testing.

Elasticsearch shard allocation fails because the high disk watermark is exceeded, forcing indices into read-only mode. Audit log ingestion halts. We need to purge old indices, adjust cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.high, and add storage capacity alerting before thresholds are hit.

TimescaleDB continuous aggregate materialization lags by 45 minutes because the refresh policy interval is too long for high-frequency market inserts. Dashboards show stale pricing data. We need to reduce the refresh interval, enable concurrent refresh, and monitor materialization lag via metrics.

Kafka consumer group stuck in continuous rebalance loop because max.poll.interval.ms is shorter than the batch processing time. Messages are duplicated and settlement delays occur. We need to increase the poll interval, implement chunked processing, and add consumer lag monitoring with rebalance alerting.

RabbitMQ classic mirrored queues cause split-brain after a network partition, resulting in message duplication and loss. We need to migrate to quorum queues, validate partition handling policies, and add cluster health monitoring with automatic partition recovery.

Celery chord callback fails silently when one subtask raises an unrecoverable error, dropping the entire group result. End-of-day reconciliation reports are incomplete. We need to implement on_error handlers, store partial results in a tracking model, and add chord resilience tests.

NATS JetStream consumer ack floor isn't advancing because acknowledgments are sent out of order, triggering redelivery storms. We need to enforce sequential acking, switch to explicit ack policy with retry tracking, and monitor ack latency and redelivery rates.

Event sourcing projection falls 30 minutes behind because the event handler processes sequentially and can't keep up with market open volume. Read model serves stale portfolio values. We need to parallelize projection by aggregate ID, add checkpoint persistence, and monitor projection lag.

Cache stampede on product catalog endpoint causes 500+ concurrent database queries when TTL expires simultaneously. Database CPU spikes to 95%. We need to implement request coalescing, probabilistic early refresh, and background cache warming with staggered expiration.

Go service experiences 400ms GC pauses because GOGC is too high and heap grows to 8GB before collection. Trading latency SLAs are breached. We need to tune GOGC=50, set GOMEMLIMIT, profile allocation hotspots, and implement object pooling for high-churn structs.

Python FastAPI endpoint blocks the event loop because synchronous requests.get() is called inside an async handler. p99 latency spikes to 3s. We need to switch to httpx.AsyncClient, run blocking calls in run_in_executor, and add BlockHound-equivalent async validation to CI.

Java HikariCP connection pool exhausts because idleTimeout isn't configured and stale connections aren't evicted. New requests fail with SQLTransientConnectionException. We need to enable connection validation queries, set eviction policies, and monitor pool active/idle metrics.

CDN caches dynamic API responses because Cache-Control headers are missing on authenticated JSON endpoints. Users see stale account balances. We need to add no-cache, no-store, private for authenticated routes, validate header propagation, and add cache behavior regression tests.

JWT refresh token rotation fails because old tokens aren't invalidated in Redis, allowing replay attacks. Compromised sessions persist after password changes. We need to implement token versioning, blacklist rotated tokens, add replay detection, and enforce single-session policies.

mTLS handshake fails for newly deployed service because the intermediate CA isn't in the gateway trust store. Connections are rejected with certificate unknown. We need to update the trust bundle, validate the full certificate chain, and add TLS handshake monitoring with alerting on failures.

API key rate limits are bypassed because clients rotate IPv6 addresses within the same /64 subnet. Throttling only tracks full IPs. We need to implement subnet-aware throttling, enforce API key-based quotas, add WAF-level rate limiting, and validate limit accuracy under rotation.

OAuth2 PKCE flow is vulnerable because code_verifier isn't validated against code_challenge during token exchange. Authorization codes can be intercepted and reused. We need to enforce PKCE validation, add cryptographic checks, and audit the auth flow against RFC 7636.

Secrets manager auto-rotation fails because dependent services don't support hot-reload, causing connection breaks after credential changes. We need to implement connection pool refresh on secret change, add rotation-aware client wrappers, and validate zero-downtime rotation in staging.

Saga orchestrator doesn't execute the compensation step when reserve_funds fails, leaving funds locked indefinitely. Customer balances show incorrect available amounts. We need to fix state machine transitions, add compensation timeouts, implement saga audit logging, and add failure simulation tests.

CQRS read model is inconsistent because event publishing and database commit aren't in the same transaction. Events are lost on rollback. We need to implement the transactional outbox pattern, add a CDC relay (e.g., Debezium), and validate exactly-once event delivery.

Circuit breaker opens too aggressively because the failure window is only 10 requests. A single timeout blocks all traffic for 60s during low-traffic periods. We need to increase the window to 100, adjust the failure threshold, add half-open state testing, and monitor breaker state transitions.

Distributed lock using Redis SETNX lacks a TTL, causing permanent deadlock if the lock holder crashes. Subsequent batch jobs hang indefinitely. We need to add expiry, implement Redlock or Redisson with lease renewal, and add lock acquisition monitoring with deadlock alerts.

Idempotency key collision occurs because keys use timestamp + user_id, causing millisecond collisions during rapid submissions. Duplicate charges appear in the ledger. We need to switch to UUIDv4, add a database unique constraint, validate idempotency under load, and implement retry-safe handlers.

Airflow DAG skips scheduled runs because catchup=False but the cron interval is misaligned with the system timezone. Backlog accumulates unnoticed. We need to fix the schedule expression, align timezone configuration, add DAG run validation, and implement missed run alerting.

Spark job fails with FetchFailedException because shuffle partitions are too large for executor memory during month-end aggregation. We need to increase spark.sql.shuffle.partitions, tune executor memory/overhead, add skew handling with salting, and monitor shuffle spill metrics.

dbt model produces duplicate rows because the source system replays events without deduplication logic in the transformation layer. Financial reports show inflated totals. We need to add row_number() over(partition by id order by updated_at desc), implement uniqueness tests, and validate source replay handling.

Flink checkpoint fails because the RocksDB state backend disk I/O is saturated during high-volume ingestion. Backpressure builds and latency spikes. We need to switch to incremental checkpoints, increase disk throughput, tune state TTL, and monitor checkpoint duration and alignment time.

Data pipeline drops records because schema evolution isn't handled and new nullable fields cause the JSON parser to crash. Downstream tables miss critical events. We need to implement a tolerant reader pattern, add schema registry validation, and add backward/forward compatibility tests.

Prometheus scraping fails because targets expose metrics on a non-standard path and metrics_path isn't configured in the scrape job. Targets show as DOWN. We need to update scrape configuration, validate endpoint accessibility, and add target discovery validation to the monitoring pipeline.

OpenTelemetry spans are dropping because the exporter queue is full and batch size is too large for the collector throughput. Distributed traces are incomplete. We need to reduce batch size, increase exporter concurrency, add queue depth monitoring, and implement adaptive sampling under load.

Log aggregation pipeline drops JSON logs because the parser expects plain text format. Structured fields are lost, breaking compliance search queries. We need to update Fluentd/Logstash parser configuration, validate log format contracts, and add schema enforcement at the ingestion layer.

Grafana dashboard shows NaN values because PromQL queries use outdated label selectors after a metric rename in the latest exporter version. SRE team lacks visibility during incidents. We need to update dashboard queries, add metric deprecation alerts, and validate dashboard queries in CI.

Alertmanager fires duplicate alerts because inhibition rules are misconfigured and group_by labels don't match the routing tree. On-call engineers experience alert fatigue. We need to fix the routing configuration, validate inhibition logic, and add alert deduplication tests.

Kubernetes HPA isn't scaling because the custom metrics adapter returns stale data from an expired cache. Pods starve under traffic spikes. We need to fix adapter cache TTL, validate metric freshness, add scaling simulation tests, and monitor HPA decision latency.

Terraform state drifts because manual changes were made to production security groups during an incident. Subsequent apply fails with conflicts. We need to import manual changes, enforce IaC-only modification policies, and add automated drift detection to the CI pipeline.

Docker multi-stage build fails because the COPY --from=builder step references a non-existent artifact path after a refactor. CI pipelines are blocked. We need to fix COPY paths, validate build stage outputs, and add container build integration tests to catch path mismatches early.

Helm upgrade stalls because a pre-install hook times out waiting for a synchronous database migration to complete. Release is stuck in pending-upgrade. We need to increase hook timeout, migrate to an async Job-based migration, and add hook health checks with progress logging.

CI/CD pipeline deploys to production because the branch mapping regex incorrectly matches feature/prod-hotfix as a release branch. Unvalidated code reaches users. We need to tighten the regex, add environment deployment guardrails, and validate routing logic with dry-run tests.

Background job retries indefinitely on validation errors because the retry policy doesn't distinguish between client (4xx) and server (5xx) failures. Queue backs up with poison messages. We need to classify errors, cap retries for 4xx, route failures to a dead-letter queue, and add retry analytics.

File upload endpoint is vulnerable to zip bombs because archive decompression isn't size-limited. Malicious uploads fill disk and crash the service. We need to implement decompression ratio limits, validate archive contents before extraction, and add security scanning to the upload pipeline.

Timezone handling is inconsistent across services; some store UTC while others store local time. Monthly reports show shifted timestamps and mismatched totals. We need to enforce UTC storage, add a timezone conversion layer at the API boundary, and validate temporal parity across all services.

Pagination returns inconsistent results because the queryset lacks deterministic ordering. Items duplicate or disappear across pages during concurrent inserts. We need to add a secondary sort key (e.g., id), validate cursor stability, and add pagination consistency tests under load.

Health check endpoint returns 200 OK while the database connection pool is exhausted. Load balancer routes traffic to broken instances, causing cascading 503s. We need to implement deep health checks that validate dependency connectivity, add readiness probes, and monitor pool saturation.

React Context provider triggers full tree re-renders because the value object is recreated on every parent render without useMemo. Dashboard FPS drops to 18 during data refreshes. We need to memoize the context value, split providers by update frequency, and add render profiling to catch unnecessary broadcasts.

useEffect dependency array omits filterState, causing stale API calls when users change search criteria. Results don't match applied filters. We need to add missing dependencies, enable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in ESLint, and implement filter change regression tests.

useState updater function captures stale closure in async callback, causing duplicate form submissions when network is slow. We need to use functional updates prev => prev + 1, validate async state transitions, and add race condition tests.

Custom hook useWebSocket doesn't clean up event listeners on unmount, causing memory leaks and duplicate message handlers after route changes. We need to return cleanup function, validate listener lifecycle, and add memory profiling to navigation flows.

useReducer dispatch is called during render phase, triggering Cannot update a component while rendering a different component warning. We need to move dispatch to useEffect or event handlers, validate render purity, and add strict mode testing.

Zustand store selector returns new object reference on every state change, bypassing React.memo and causing list re-renders. We need to implement shallow equality selector, stabilize references, and add selector performance benchmarks.

useSyncExternalStore getSnapshot returns inconsistent values between render and commit, causing hydration mismatch warnings in concurrent mode. We need to stabilize snapshot generation, validate subscription timing, and add concurrent rendering tests.

Recoil atom family creates unbounded atoms because cache eviction isn't configured, causing memory growth during long sessions. We need to implement cachePolicy_UNSTABLE, add atom count monitoring, and validate cleanup on route exit.

useRef is mutated directly during render to track previous props, causing non-deterministic behavior in strict mode. We need to move mutation to useEffect, implement usePrevious hook correctly, and add strict mode validation.

Context consumer re-renders because provider wraps children in a new fragment on every update, breaking memoization boundaries. We need to stabilize JSX structure, validate component tree purity, and add render cycle tests.

useImperativeHandle exposes internal state directly, allowing parent components to mutate child state and breaking unidirectional data flow. We need to expose only safe methods, validate ref contracts, and add ref usage linting.

useLayoutEffect blocks painting during heavy DOM measurements, causing visible jank on initial page load. We need to switch to useEffect where possible, defer measurements with requestAnimationFrame, and add paint timing benchmarks.

State initialization function runs expensive computation on every render instead of lazy initialization. We need to pass function to useState(() => compute()), validate init cost, and add render performance tests.

useCallback wraps handler but dependencies change every render due to inline object creation, negating memoization benefits. We need to stabilize dependencies, remove unnecessary useCallback, and add memoization effectiveness tests.

Multiple context providers cause prop drilling workaround that bypasses type safety and makes state tracing difficult. We need to consolidate related state, implement composite providers, and add state architecture review.

useTransition is applied to synchronous state updates, adding unnecessary scheduling overhead and degrading responsiveness. We need to reserve transitions for expensive renders, validate usage patterns, and add concurrent feature guidelines.

Global event listener in custom hook isn't removed when component unmounts during route transition, causing duplicate analytics events. We need to implement cleanup, validate listener lifecycle, and add navigation event tests.

useId generates different IDs on server and client because component tree order changes dynamically, breaking label-input associations. We need to stabilize render order, validate ID consistency, and add a11y attribute tests.

State updates batch incorrectly across microtasks, causing UI to show intermediate loading states that flash briefly. We need to leverage automatic batching, consolidate state updates, and add visual regression tests for loading states.
useDebugValue is called conditionally, violating rules of hooks and causing runtime errors in development. We need to move call to top level, validate hook ordering, and add hook linting to CI.

Large list renders all 10k items because virtualization isn't implemented, causing main thread blocking and browser crashes on low-end devices. We need to implement react-window or tanstack-virtual, validate viewport rendering, and add scroll performance tests.

React.memo comparison function uses deep equality on large objects, causing more overhead than re-rendering itself. We need to switch to shallow comparison, normalize data structures, and add memoization cost profiling.

Component tree re-renders on every keystroke because input state is lifted to root provider instead of local component. We need to collocate state, implement controlled inputs locally, and add input latency benchmarks.

useMemo caches expensive calculation but dependency array includes unstable function reference, causing recalculation every render. We need to stabilize dependencies with useCallback, validate cache hit rate, and add computation profiling.

Layout shift occurs because conditional rendering removes elements without reserving space, causing CLS penalty of 0.42. We need to implement skeleton loaders, use CSS contain: layout, and add Core Web Vitals monitoring.

Heavy chart component blocks main thread during data parsing, causing input delay exceeding 300ms. We need to offload parsing to Web Worker, implement progressive rendering, and add INP regression tests.

key prop uses array index in dynamic list, causing state mismatch and incorrect form values when items are reordered. We need to use stable unique IDs, validate key generation, and add list mutation tests.

Component subscribes to multiple independent stores, causing cascading re-renders when unrelated data changes. We need to split subscriptions, implement selector memoization, and add render dependency mapping.

Suspense fallback flickers because data resolves faster than fallback mount, causing poor UX. We need to implement useTransition with pending state, add minimum fallback duration, and validate loading behavior.

Inline styles are recreated on every render, causing React to treat them as changed and trigger DOM updates. We need to extract styles to constants or CSS modules, validate style stability, and add DOM mutation profiling.

forwardRef component doesn't pass ref to actual DOM node, breaking focus management and third-party integrations. We need to attach ref to root element, validate ref forwarding, and add focus flow tests.

Expensive tree reconciliation occurs because component returns different element types conditionally, forcing full unmount/remount. We need to stabilize element type, use CSS for visibility, and add reconciliation profiling.
useDeferredValue isn't applied to search input, causing typing lag when filtering large datasets. We need to defer list rendering, validate input responsiveness, and add typing latency benchmarks.

Component renders synchronously during route transition, blocking navigation and causing perceived freeze. We need to wrap heavy components in Suspense, implement progressive loading, and add navigation performance tests.

PureComponent is used with context consumer, but context updates bypass shallow prop comparison, causing unexpected re-renders. We need to switch to functional components with memo, validate update paths, and add render tracing.

DOM node accumulation occurs because portal components aren't cleaned up on unmount, leaving orphaned elements in body. We need to implement portal cleanup, validate DOM lifecycle, and add memory leak detection.

useInsertionEffect is misused for data fetching, causing layout thrashing and violating intended CSS-in-JS use case. We need to move fetch to useEffect, validate effect timing, and add effect usage guidelines.

Component tree depth exceeds 150 levels due to excessive wrapper components, causing stack overflow during reconciliation. We need to flatten component hierarchy, remove unnecessary providers, and add tree depth linting.

startTransition wraps synchronous state update, adding scheduling overhead without concurrent benefit. We need to reserve for expensive renders, validate transition usage, and add concurrent rendering tests.

Render phase side effect modifies global variable, causing non-deterministic behavior in concurrent rendering. We need to remove side effects from render, validate purity, and add strict mode stress tests.

React Router v6 useLoaderData returns stale data because loader isn't revalidated after mutation. Users see outdated records. We need to call revalidate(), implement optimistic updates, and add data freshness tests.

Nested route outlet renders blank because parent component doesn't include <Outlet />. Navigation appears broken. We need to add outlet component, validate route structure, and add routing integration tests.

useNavigate is called during render phase, causing Cannot update during render error and breaking navigation flow. We need to move navigation to event handler or useEffect, validate call timing, and add navigation linting.

Route lazy loading fails with ChunkLoadError after deployment because old chunks are purged from CDN. Users see broken navigation. We need to implement retry logic, configure cache-busting headers, and add chunk integrity validation.
